name: Cliff the Truthfinder
effect: Whenever an effect you control targets a fighter: This card gains 150 Health and Power.
bio:
Expedition Log 349-B
One of our excavator boys ran into something very strange while cracking open some geodes earlier. It's some kind of [[Nyarlhotep's Razor|ceremonial knife]], and the text on it doesn't match any language in our databases, so it'll need some forensic testing. The kid that found it wouldn't take it for transport, though. Not sure why, considering that's a massive breach of protocol, but whatever. We can just get it back later; I wasn't about to argue with someone in a power loader.

name: Closing Act
effect:
Deal 700 overloaded damage to a target fighter. You gain the excess damage in life.

bio: With his last breath, [[Artemis Carter|Artemis]] ensured that [[Eisenhower Dwit|his husband's]] creation would no longer fall into the hands of those who seek to abuse it.

An anomaly recorded by the culture industry that is that it that appears once every 666 tutorials. Legends do say a fight against him is the most dangerous one because once you lose your life, you lose your life as he has taken fifty billion before yours.

Losing both of his parents and his legs in the span of a single night, the [[Apollo Scott, Visionary|child]] was devastated.
[[Sarah Greene Bailey|A nurse's]] empathetic advice was the only thing that saved him from a life of continous regret.

name: Consult the Archives
effect: Draw four cards. Discard each card drawn this way that's not played this turn. You can't cast actions this turn.
bio: [[Hallow Sinister, Patriarch|Hallow]] rifled straight past the shelf of contracts and into the cryptohistology section. [[Patric Sinister|Patric]] had a sharp eye, so finding information on this "[[Eclipse, Werewolf Colossus|Eclipse]]" would be trivial, yet Hallow paused. Pensive, he quickly signed his will and [[Sinister (Group)|his children]]'s inheritances. Just in case.

name: CopperGlow
effect: Whenever you gain life: Give yourself a copy of this card.
bio: You can call it superstition, but my fever says it's pretty real, mate.

name: Consult_the_Archives

name: Cooldude4851

"The [[Nyarlhotep (Lore)|Grand Overseer]] insists on keeping [[Warriors of Justice|the editor]] in a frail state; This Humble One can't help but question its efficacy. Surely a more robust Editor would lead to stronger healing?"

Truthfully, I still want to die. Maybe I'm already dead. Or maybe I'll get out of this world and get another chance to, y'know, not literally ruin an entire timeline. Just - just let me have something happen. Just so I'll feel better.

"Sorry al-Assad," she sighed. "It's these wee trinkets or the forest."

name: Django Haplorhini
effect:
Whenever you discard your first card each turn: Give yourself an Element.
Whenever you cast an Action: This fighter gains 50 power.
bio: REPORTED.

name: Divine Transcendence
effect: Generate 3 Yellow and Green Studs. Fill your hand with Green and Yellow actions, except they're inert in all zones and you destroy them during the next end step. You can't cast fighters for the rest of this turn.
bio: [[Havalu]]'s destruction has flooded [[Nibblex the Starkiller|Nibblex]]'s vaults with starstones. Spotting [[Azureless of the Federation|Azureless]]' [[Federation Fleet: Assimilator|Assimilator]] in the then-planet's orbit, [[Ptenda the Unconquerable|Ptenda]] knew exactly what to do with them.

name: Dmitri Shostakovich
effect: During your end step: All allied fighters spiral. If this card would spiral into a Gilmuraig, he transcends into Dmitri Cheryomushki instead.
bio: "I can't take it! This world does nothing but beat me senseless! Why can't I live a normal, decent life?!"

name: Doge
effect: Inert in play. (It card can't generate studs.)
bio: Such claws. Much stats. Very game. Wow.

name: Doge Doge
effect: Whenever an allied Doge dies: Summon a 150/150 Doge.
bio: Much Sin. Very Purge. Wow.

name: DominiusConfabricor
effect: During your end step: Both players draw a card. Destroy the card your opponent drew this way if it's not cast by the next end step.
bio: Love your neighbor as you love yourself. There is no greater commandment.

name: Domain Renovation
effect: When this card is cast: Give yourself 3 gears that improve your terrains.
bio:
"[[Deidre, Timeslayer|She]] has held onto the keys of creation for a thousand relative years."
-Technician's Notes, experience 2274675716

name: Doge Hound
effect: N/A
bio: So it was all his work!

name: Divine Pengu
effect: Whenever you cast a fighter: Unlock it.
bio: I do believe that Mister Ando is not human; no human would go PENG PENG.

name: DominatedLegacy
effect: Whenever any player gains life: This card gains 100 Health.
bio: Exile at once!!

name: Dodgeball Throw
effect: Deal 600 damage to each fighter with the lowest health.
bio: It has to be done!

name: Domain Expansion
effect:
Destroy all terrains.  | 
Draw a card.
bio:
"Each editor is given a pocket universe to change to their hearts' content, its rules limited only by their creativity. Those who squander such a gift are supposed to be cast aside; Why has the [[Nyarlhotep (Lore)|Grand Overseer]] kept so many broken people in positions of power?"
-Technician's notes, Experience [https://www.roblox.com/games/270748344/Blox-Cards-TCG 270748344]

name: Dominus Aureus
effect: Whenever this card attacks: All allied fighters gain 100 health and power.
bio: Why feel anything when you can feel great?

name: Dominus Frigidus
effect: When this card is cast: Draw a card.
bio: Why define anything when you can define truth?

name: Dominus Infernus
effect: Overload.
bio: Why control anything when you can control god?

name: Donald McGillavry
effect: Whenever you cast another Colourless fighter: Give yourself a Classic Roblox Tool card.
bio: "Well, excuuuuuuuuuse me, princess!"

name: Doneyes
effect: Whenever your opponent casts a fighter: They lose a Colourless stud. Put a Green Stud into your Baseplate.
bio: Creator of bloodfest. Many eyes will be worn.

name: Dominus Praefectus
effect: When this card is cast: It deals 600 damage to a target fighter. You gain 600 life.
bio: Why grow anything when you can grow heaven?

name: Doombringer
effect:
3 Charges.  | 
Attach to a target fighter.  | 
Whenever an allied fighter attacks: This card loses a charge. Then if it has no charges, Reset it to 3 charges and deal 600 overloaded damage to all allied fighters.
bio: When danger comes, the ones who bare witness and know the right thing to do, shall show Him through themselves and do it.

name: Dr. Michael Morpheus
effect: Whenever this card attacks: Search your deck for a fighter card.  | When you've discarded four or more cards this turn: Give yourself 2 fighter cards, then all fighter cards in your hand gain 200 health and power.
bio: You are lost, but can easily be found. The blind will see if they take my hand. Turn away from the veneer of this world and follow me.

name: Dr. Grey
effect: Dextrous (Its first attack each turn doesn't lock it.) Whenever this card attacks and destroys another: Gain 300 life. Draw a card.
bio: Head Surgeon of [[Bloxburg Messiah Hospital]]. Old friend of [[Kingrin, Surrounded by Familey|Harrison Powell]].

name: Doppel
effect: Whenever this card attacks a fighter: Give yourself a fleeting, terrified, hasty copy of that fighter that costs 2C.
bio: without a bad side, there is no good side.

name: Doomspire Terrarians
effect: Once each turn, whenever you cast an action: Deal 100 damage to a random enemy fighter. | Whenever you cast a terrain, if this card's in your graveyard: Attach this card to it.
bio: Slain with his own [[The Architect's Workshop|imperfect weapon]], [[Claymaker, Master Architect|Claymaker's]] [[Damnatio Memoriae|fanta]][[Vulcanalia, Holy City|stical]] [[The Architect's Workshop|world]] was cleaved cleanly in half.

name: DrTrayBlox
effect: Whenever this card attacks: You gain 600 Life.
bio: DrTrayBlox, also known as Dan the Diamond Minecart (DanTDM) on Youtube, he'll always strike diamonds even from his foes.

name: Doomed Adventurer
effect: N/A
bio: Bears the Curse of the [[Acolytes (Archetype)|Acolyte]], which binds him to slay [[Neodragons (Archetype)|Dragons]]. If he doesn't, his soul will become ash. If he fails, his body will.

name: Draconic Counsel
effect: Look at the top seven cards of your deck and choose three of them. Search those cards, then shuffle the rest into your deck.
bio: Their sudden meeting forced both of them to swallow their pride. The man, forced to face the chaos he had inadvertantly caused. The dragon, forced to ask for assistance from beings he thought beneath him.

name: Dragon Horde
effect: Cast this card ignoring its Coloured cost if there are three Acolytes in your baseplate. | Summon three Draconic Acolytes. | Lock all allied fighters that aren't Acolytes for two turns.
bio: The dragons of the Horde are the same ones that conquered the earth thousands of years ago.

name: DrKig
effect: When this card is cast: It deals 350 damage to all enemy fighters.
bio: Like the game to see what the like animation looks like!

name: Drager
effect: Whenever an effect gives you your first card each turn: Set all of your Studs to 3.
bio: Also known as drager980, Drager is the original scripter of Blox Cards and is secretly a wizard.

name: Dozer
effect:
When this card is cast: Return a target enemy fighter to its hand. It gains haste and fleeting.  | 
Whenever a Fleeting card is cast: This card gains 400 Power.
bio: Don't prize yourself as king, God opposes the proud but gives grace to the humble.

name: Draconic Heavenwalker
effect: When this card is cast: All fighters that are starters lose 500 Power.
bio: N/A

name: DracoSwordMaster
effect: Whenever an fighter dies: This card gains 100 Power. Deal 50 damage to all fighters.
bio: Another user implicated in the 2012 April Fools incident. Search his username to find out his fate.

name: Draconic Uprising
effect: Fading. | Cast this card ignoring its 🟢 cost if there's 3 or more Acolytes in your baseplate. | All fighters antigenerate. | Destroy all fighters.
bio: The Acolytes wished for the world to be scorched over in the name of Rebirth.

name: Drake, Vengeful Lover
effect: During your end step: Put a Vengeful Blessing onto a card in your hand.
bio: Losing money is temporary, a close one - forever. Javion's authorities learnt how this would affect their sales the hard way.

name: Dragonspine Whip
effect:
Attach to a target fighter.  | 
During your end step, if there's an allied fighter with 1000 or more power: Give yourself a Green card.
bio:
"We revere the sacred spine, hoping to climb the [[Stairway to Heaven]] and attain one. She mocks the sacred spine, beating us down the stairway's steps."
-[[Thyyrinyr, Sealed Dragon|Thyyrinyr]]

name: Dragoonxxx0
effect: When this card is cast: You lose all {R}{G}{B}{Y}. If you lost a stud of each colour this way, for the colour you lost the least of, draw that many cards and remove 4{C} from their costs.
bio: Once a mortal, this man become the sole representation of death. He can use his powers to kill or bring back anyone.

name: Drakobloxxer
effect: During your end step: Deal 100 damage to all enemy fighters.
bio: NOM NOM NOM!

name: Dread Lord Bilakuten
effect: Rageborne. |  When this card is cast or dies: Give yourself a copy of each stack of Rage in your Baseplate.  |  It's a Colourless fighter that costs 1 Colourless stud to cast.
bio:
''The clouds ran red with the colour of [[Rage]],
the air contaminated by the impact's essence.
The people of [[Javion]] looked towards the sky,
and bore witness to a frightening presence.''

name: Dreams and Delusion
effect: Attach overload to a target fighter. | Attach a dreamshield to a target fighter.
bio: The scheme for the Toolbox of Imperium Ultima was joined by two Queens; [[Queen Shedare II|Shedare]] to protect her people, and [[Deidre, Timeslayer|Deidre]] to keep her servants in line.

name: Drop the Ocean
effect: All fighters gain haste and 200 power. Return them to their hand.  | Put a Cosmic Crack into your baseplate.  | You can't cast unranked cards this turn.
bio: Kralosa's ocean fused with reality, forcing the Tainted to repair his book and the Purifier to take a bath.

name: DregSystem
effect: After this fighter attacks: Destroy what it attacked if it has 300 or less power.
bio: Multiple Keter and Euclid containment breaches? I don't see an-SNAP

name: Dreamstem
effect: Dextrous. | When this card is cast: Seek shinies.
bio: Staring down the horrors of Kralosa's depths, Skythyrkyx wished she had reincarnated.

name: Duckywow
effect: N/A
bio: He loves his ducks, but is he possessed by an evil one?

name: Drakon Kyrane
effect: At the start of your turns: Give yourself a copy of each element in your graveyard, except they're fleeting and inert when discarded.
bio: ... Dang. He always had to be so dramatic.

name: Dream Technician
effect: Whenever you cast a Colourless card: Give yourself a Nascent Stud. Then, all allied Technicians gain 100 Health and Power.
bio: The caretakers of the doomspire are extremely powerful and intelligent but unable to disobey the Code that binds them to maintain its function. If one were to somehow escape, it would be a god amongst ants.

name: Duddedud
effect: Rank 6. | Hunt 1. | Summon a Blue, Red, and Yellow Dudedud, each 400/200 fighters.
bio: Do you wanna have a bad time?

name: Drop Farming
effect:
Look at the bottom 3 cards of your deck and select 1 of them. Replace the others with copies of the selected card.
Advance your deck, then draw a card.
bio: The equivalent of banging your head against a wall until something happens, just with [[Rare Loot Pile|rare loot]] chances.

name: Ducasse Jonquil
effect:
When this card is cast: Deal 100 overloaded damage to a target enemy fighter, plus an additional 100 for each unique element in your graveyard.
Once each turn, whenever an enemy fighter dies: Give yourself an Element.
bio: No. You arrived after all your minions were beat. What sort of 'on time' is that?

name: Dued1
effect: During your end step, if you've gained 600 life since your last end step: This card gains 400 power.
bio: If I wanted to work at a pizza place, I'd just go to college.

name: Dukran the Elysian
effect: This card costs 1C less for every Alar card in play and your Baseplate. When this card is cast: Give yourself a Splintered Genesis and recur four Alar action cards. During your end step: Summon either an Alar Trainee or an Alar Herald.
bio: Still, he knew there were those who would seek the [[Alpha Brick's Presence|Brick]], destroying the peace he helped create. The Brick is now hidden, forever out of [[Telamon]]'s reach.

name: DunclubDuncan
effect: Whenever you discard your second card each turn: Reset the stats of a target fighter.
bio: His computer will be cleansed of malware.

name: DunclubDuncan (Legacy Flank Mode)
effect: After this card attacks, lock a target fighter for one turn.
bio: me me smol boy

name: Dun_Goof
effect: When this card is cast, if there's another allied Rare fighter: All allied Rare fighters gain 100 Power. Unlock this card.
bio: Name your favourite card arts. Some of them were made by this guy!

name: Dukran's Accord
effect: Draw X cards. X is the number of colours and groups among allied fighters.
bio: Under the attack of the Titans, Dukran united the desparate tribes of Old Robloxia. They scoured the world to find the Alpha Brick before the Titans devoured the world, then the Heavens.

name: Dwarvern Captain (Legacy)
effect: When this card dies, increase the health of all Dwarf fighters by 400.
bio: Captain Dwarves do everything a normal dwarf does, except with a title.

name: Dwarvern Courier
effect: Once per turn, when you discard a card, put Sentry Fuel into your hand.
bio: 'Our couriers report increasing activity all around us. Once our mechanisms are self-locomotive, we won't have to risk anymore losses to those abominations.'

name: Dwarvern Mathematician (Legacy)
effect: Can't counterattack. When this card dies, put a random Dwarf card into your hand.
bio: Development of the pick-sine and copick-sine rule allowed Dwarves to mine more efficiently.

name: Dwarvern Meteor
effect: Fading. If it's after the second player's 15th turn, cast this ignoring its Colourless cost. | Destroy all fighters.
bio: 2000 years ago, the [[Dwarves (Archetype)|Dwarvern]] Meteor destroyed [[The World of Wood|the World of Wood]]. In 2000 years, the Dwarvern Meteor will [[Worldpurge|destroy the world again]].

name: Dwarvern Gunsmith
effect: Whenever you discard your first card each turn: Put Sentry Weaponry into your hand.
bio: 'Honestly, I feel like I'm wasting my talent. All my projects end with me building a flamethrower. [[Anthrest (Group)|Mutating abominations?]] Flamethrower. [[Orinthian (Group)|Futuristic spies?]] Thermal-reading flamethrower.'

name: Dwarvern Engineer (Legacy Version)
effect: Can't counterattack. When this card dies, give all Dwarf fighters 300 power.
bio: It's the helmet that matters.

name: Dwarvern Cultivator
effect: Whenever you discard your first card each turn: Give yourself Sentry Compost.
bio: Dwarvern dialect is often quite difficult to understand. Thankfully, Caitlin's home language didn't stray far from the ingenious inventors.

name: Dwarvern Miner (Legacy)
effect: Can't counterattack. When this card dies, generate a red icon.
bio: Dwarves have their own miner's union. Oddly enough, it doesn't work out when every dwarf is signed into the union.

name: Dwarvern Energist (Legacy)
effect: When this card dies, unlock all allied Dwarvern and Sentry fighters.
bio: Energy drinks? Personally he prefers the air.

name: Dwarvern Engineer
effect: Once per turn, when you discard a card, put Sentry Plating into your hand.
bio: We're surrounded from every angle. We can't trust any of them, not even [[World of Wood (Group)|those stinkin' tree hippies]]. Sentry research is now our top priority, we must save ourselves.

name: Dwarvern Pilot
effect: When this card is cast: Search your deck for a Dwarf card. Search your deck for a Construct card  if you've discarded two or more cards this turn. Search your deck for Chromafex if you've discarded 5 or more cards this turn.
bio: The Pilots of Dwarvern Society were excited to become part of meteor-destroying sentry history, not knowing the feigned carelessness of the engineers of said sentries.

name: Dwarvern Scientist (Legacy)
effect: When this card dies, put a random Dwarf card into your hand.
bio: Dwarvern glasses were invented so dwarves could figure out more clearly how to fix their vision problem.

name: Dyna Cowsmasher
effect: While in play, Cows and Cow Gods you control deal 2000 more effect damage.
bio: Not to be confused with Dino Cowhater, her less enthusiastic and more primitive brother.

name: EXLatios
effect: Defender. (Fighters your opponent control must attack this card.)
bio: He's just a guy who loves twin blades.

name: Eclipse, Werewolf Colossus
effect: Effects can't damage this card. Thrice each turn, whenever you discard a card: Deal 600 damage to all fighters. This card gains 600 health.
bio: As the Moonbreaker rose, [[Priestess Zanzel, the Promised One|Zanzel]]'s ambitions fell.

name: EarlGrey
effect: Whenever you cast an Epic fighter: All allied Epic and Legendary fighters gain 150 power.
bio: Some ROBLOXians feel more comfortable traversing the world under more anonymous ways. As do gods.

name: Dwarvern Sentry: Delta (Legacy)
effect: After this card attacks, gain 1 red icon and deal 200 damage to all other allied fighters.
bio: DELTA STATION. COMMERCIALLY SOLD.

name: Earl of the Federation
effect: Whenever you cast an action that costs 8 or more total studs: Summon a 500/400 Fool of the Federation.
bio: "Oh, come now. Servitude is a just reward for catching our interest. Tis' a generosity to be allowed so close to us!"

name: Eclipse, the Rage Gyre
effect: When this card is cast, if you have 500 or less life, Quadruple this card's stats. Unlock all allied Lycanthropes.
bio: Eclipse retreated to his homeland to [[Channel the Call|channel the Call]] with his descendants. He returns only in the direst of times.

name: Ecocide
effect: Fading. Suspend a target fighter from play until the next end step. | Destroy your opponent’s terrain and all fighters. | Give yourself three Moonleaks.
bio: [[Nibblex the Starkiller|Nibblex]] was displeased with [[Havalu]]. [[The Federation (Group)|The Federation]] tech made it crunchy, with their screams overseasoning the meal.

name: Egregious Entryism
effect: Select a non-action card in your deck that costs 4 or fewer total studs. Inject that card.
bio: "These Astral Faith imbeciles would kidnap and immortalise others in '''my''' name? i've seen greater intelligence in wall grout" - [[Bloxburg Mayor Astarossa|Astarossa, Mayor of Bloxburg]]

name: Egg Empire Emporium
effect: When this card is cast or during your endstep, if you control an Egg Emporium fighter: Incubate. Then give yourself a non-legendary Egg Emporium fighter if you control a Pet Egg or Pet with 600 or more Power.
bio: Take a 'crack' at our highly valuable Pet Eggs! Who knows, maybe you'll find your truly faithful companion in one of them?

name: Editors Awaken
effect: Put a Cosmic Crack into your baseplate. | Draw 2 cards. | You can't cast anything else this turn.
bio: The Tainted's rebellion against Nyarlhotep was exactly why it wanted him in the Doomspire.

name: Ehj236
effect: Fading. Whenever an allied fighter dies: Summon a clone of it. Destroy this card.
bio: A butler's duty is to protect the duties of others, sir.

name: Ego Culling
effect: Obliterate all fighters that cost 4 or fewer total studs.
bio: An earlier [[Caitlin, Paladin of Nature|Caitlin]] would have accepted the [[PLURRAL (Faction)|PLURRAL's]] invitation to live eternally happy. Today, however, is a new day.

name: Eisenhower Reunited
effect: At the start of each turn: Until the start of the current player's next turn, action and terrain cards can't be cast.
bio: She [[Alpha Brick's Destruction|broke the world]], but she returned [[Artemis' Tombstone|him]] to me. Thank you, [[Zanzel Repentant|Zanzel]].

name: Eisenhower Dwit
effect: Whenever an allied card dies: Summon a clone of it except it's Fading and zombified
bio: "I can't lose you, [[Artemis Carter|Art]]... We still have so much ahead of us..."

name: Eisenhower's Apprentice
effect: When this card is cast: Give yourself a random Blue or Red action and a Morphic Goo.
bio: [[Eisenhower, the Alchemist|Mr. Eisenhower]] taught me everything I know about Alchemy. I owe it all to him. He might look heartless, but deep down... he still cares.

name: Dwarvern Reprocessing
effect: This card costs one less Red, Blue and Yellow stud if you control a Dwarf. | Cast only if you've discarded four cards this turn. When you do: Draw four cards.
bio: The biggest breakthrough in Dwarvern history was the discovery of [[Dwarvern Meteor|a fallen star]]. With it, they built impossible machinery.

name: EfanPlayz
effect: Whenever an effect targets this card: Your opponent loses 350 life.
bio: What does he play, you ask? You.

name: Eidevin
effect: If your opponent has more life than you, this card has haste. Whenever this card attacks: Draw a card.
bio: A.K.A the Lord of E.

name: Eisenhower, World Ablaze
effect: During your end step: Destroy the top card of your deck four times. This card gains 100 Power for each color in that card's stud cost.
bio:
Eisenhower stared at the havoc he had caused to Bloxburg. He stared at his [[Closing Act|dead husband]], and he stared at the [[Apex of Fantasy|culmination of his mistakes]].
"I'm sorry," he said as he prepped a flamethrower, "[[Face Your Failures|...and goodbye.]]"

name: Elaina & DuelistBC, Intertwined Journey
effect: When this card is cast: Give yourself Entwined Memory and Ascension Towards Paradise.
bio:
Who is this most beautiful witch roaming the world?
Yep, it's me!

name: Eisenhower, the Alchemist
effect: Whenever a player casts a fighter: That player can't attack or cast anything else this turn.
bio: I will take as much time as needed to avenge [[Artemis' Tombstone|my love]].

name: Elixir of Dreams
effect: Attach to a target fighter.  | After this fighter attacks: Return it to its hand
bio: [[The Purifier]] didn’t know what it was about the [[Kilnkin_(Group)|Kilnkin]] that stirred such protective instincts within him. He’d seen countless victims of war and persecution before, but these were different. Weaker. Frail.

name: Eisenhower's Thresher
effect:
When this card is cast or dies: Return all terrains in play to their hand.
Whenever a terrain is cast: It can no longer be animated.
bio: [[World of Wood (Archetype)| The World of Wood]] saw an ancient catalogue of lore. The [[Anthrest (Archetype)|anthrests]] saw a friend. [[Eisenhower, the Alchemist|Eisenhower]] saw paper.

name: Emceptional
effect: Whenever an effect gives you a card, If the newest card in your hand is a fighter: Give that card 200 health and power.
bio: Finding a Chomik is easy. Breaching the United States Pentagon Federal Mainframe for a unique 12-number code is the hard part.

name: Emerald Starstone
effect: If you control a member of the Federation, cast this card ignoring its colourless cost. Destroy a target enemy fighter if it has 450 or less health.
bio: One would think a larger ego would be a bad thing, but for [[The Federation (Group)|the Federation]] it's a whole different story.

name: Ellernate
effect: Unique. Whenever an effect draws your opponent a card: Destroy the oldest card in their hand.
bio: Just because the Terms of Service exist doesn't mean I can't choose to break them.

name: Elttob
effect: When this card is cast, if there are three Infurnished cards in your baseplate: A target fighter loses 250 Power. All Infurnished fighters in your Baseplate gain 200 power.
bio: You may call him the Chairman.

name: Emergency Rations
effect: Liberate. A target fighter gains 200 Health and Power.
bio:
"The people need help. We can't back down when we're so close to ending this nightmare."
-[[Eric Newman]]

name: Elkhorn Endurer
effect: Continued. | Once, when this card is cast or attached: Attach overload to a target fighter. Then all allied attached fighters gain 100 Health.
bio: Inhospitable due to the local wildlife and ceaseless reincarnation, conquering Disregard was written off by the [[The Shedarian Royalty|Shedarian royalty]] as an impossibility

name: Emerald Witch
effect: During your end step, if you have 8 or more cards in your Baseplate: This card gains 200 Health and Power.
bio: The first of the witch sisters, offensive by nature. She only invokes her power when the time is right.

name: Emotion Explosion
effect:
Draw 8 Fleeting cards.  | 
If there's an allied fighter with 1000 or more power, you gain 4Y.
bio: [[Negative Emotions|Emotions]] in [[Great Justice City|Justice City]] are amplified; Happiness becomes elation. Sadness becomes depression. The shops not having choccy milk causes weeklong riots.

name: Emergency Medical Team
effect: Whenever an allied fighter finishes attacking: It gains 200 Health.
bio: When word spread of a way to stop the zombie apocalypse, [[Bloxburg Messiah Hospital|Messiah Hospital]] gathered to support those who sought such a chance.

name: Emergency Repairs
effect: Destroy your baseplate, then select up to that many cards in your deck. Put them into your baseplate.
bio: While incapable of feeling emotions, the technicians unaimously desired to feel rage at how difficult the clayfestation was making their job.

name: Empathy Unit
effect: When this card is cast: Transform a target fighter into a copy of this card.
bio: For a select few nihilistic domains, the [[Nyarlhotep (Lore)|Grand Overseer]] skims positivity from [[Great Justice City|Justice City]] to those that deserve it more.

name: Emilvita
effect: N/A
bio: SQUAT! SQUAT! SQUAT LUNGE SQUAT!

name: Emporium Firemage
effect: Once per turn, whenever you cast an Egg Emporium card: Incubate.
bio: Doesn't matter the temperature; as long as it makes them crack faster!

name: Emporium Herder
effect: Whenever an allied Pet Egg transforms: Incubate. You gain a colourless stud.
bio: "Ah, discarded again, Joseph? Back to the pen you go."

name: Empty House
effect: Whenever you cast an action: Look at the top card of your deck. You may destroy it.
bio: It used to be [[Eisenhower Reunited|their]] home.

name: Emporium Ad Designer
effect: When this card is cast: Incubate, then Double the health and power of all allied Pet Eggs.
bio: The pay was secondary, she just loves designing cute critters!

name: Emporium Farmer
effect: When this card is cast: Incubate twice. (Incubate: Allied Pet Eggs gain 150 Health and Power. If you don't control one: Summon a 150/150 Pet Egg instead.)
bio: It ain't much, but it's honest work... in Hell- okay maybe this isn't so honest.

name: Emporium Salesdevil
effect: When this card is cast: Incubate twice, then Divide all allied Pet Eggs into two smaller copies of themselves.
bio: Alright, buddy. You want the best payout from the Pet Egg Dispenser? Here's the rarity rates you gotta set up.

name: Empty Sermon
effect: A target fighter gains 200 Health and Power. Attach terrified to it.
bio: Preach to the silence and you will see...

name: Emporium Soulbinder
effect: When this card is cast: A target fighter gains 100 health and power, transform it into a Pet Egg.
bio: "Soul twenty-one, Dog. Soul twenty-two, Dragon. Soul twenty-three, Cat. Soul twenty-four..."

name: Empty Office
effect: Once each turn, when you cast a card: Shuffle your hand into your deck, then draw that many cards.
bio: [[Dr. Grey]] stared down the hallway, the office door with no name returning her gaze. Feeling of regret stirred in her heart, but there's no point in deliberating over the past anymore. Time for her appointment with her next patient.

name: Emotionless Oddsmaker
effect: When this card is cast: Give yourself Blue, Red, and Green Crystals. (You may choose one to put in your Baseplate.)
bio: They coldly bet on the outcome of each fight!

name: Enchanted Gem
effect: Attach to a target fighter.  | When this fighter dies: Recur it.
bio: A large gem capable of setting a one-time waypoint. Great way to escape for when you’re being chased by Greg.

name: Endless Ice Smasher
effect: A target allied fighter gains 100 Health and Power. | Transform it into into a Immortal Wielder with the effect: | Whenever this card attacks: Lock the fighter it attacked for 1 turn.
bio: Cold to the touch, mesmerizing to the soul.

name: Enhancing Enchantress
effect:
Once each turn, whenever you Draft: Gain 2R.
During your end step, if there's no cards in your hand: Gain 2Y.
bio: The enchantress needs complete silence for her spell.

name: Enderlox1
effect: When this card dies: Summon a clone of the last dead enemy fighter.
bio: Why do they get all upset over this? It's not like they were using the body anymore...

name: Enthralled to Creation
effect: At the start of your turns: Attach a Flaw to this card, then select an unranked card in your hand that costs as many or fewer total studs than the number of gears attached to this card. Cast that card for free.
bio:
"What a base creature, obsessed with pathetic echoes of past glory. [[Dekkad Deckard|Dekkad]] would despise what [[Claymaker, Master Architect|his protége]] has become."
-[[Akasegawa the Iconoclast]]

name: Enchanted Flora
effect:
When this card is cast: Suspend a target fighter.  |  
When this card attacks your opponent directly: You gain 2C 2G.
bio: The destruction brought back the many spectres that once inhibited [[Cothran]], the last gift [[Ptenda the Unconquerable|Ptenda]] left to his niece.

name: Enter the Doomspire
effect: Select a Colour. Search your deck for 3 fighter cards of that colour. (Colourless does not count for this effect)
bio: For four different reasons, four desperate nobodies sought to destroy the doomspire in four different ways. They can't all have glory.

name: Envoy of the Consulate
effect: Continued. | When this card dies: Give yourself a Green fighter card, except it's continued.
bio: "The monsters of clay are unwilling to provide us their [[The Toolbox|magic forge]]; If we are to restore order and keep [[Thyyrinyr, Sealed Dragon|Thyyrinyr]] at bay, we will need either their assistance or subjugation." - Captain Skythyrkyx of the Consulate

name: Enriched Neutrinous
effect: Whenever you discard your second card each turn: Give yourself an epic Green card.
bio: Get up lazy [[BonesMcCormick|bones]]! While you slept and took fire, we did ALL the work!

name: Enraged Mob
effect: When this card is cast: Put an Eldritch Blessing onto the sixth card slot in your hand. During your end step, if you have three or more Blessings: Set this card's Power to 800.
bio: "Get that rock out of this planet instead of playing around with it, for brick's sake!"

name: Enzyme Runner
effect: When this card is cast: Shuffle a Necroenzyme Vial into your deck. Whenever this card attacks: Search your deck for a token card.
bio: When the enzyme became a scarcity, stealing it became a common profession.

name: Enzymic Prototype
effect: Inject a target allied fighter. Summon a Morphic Goo.
bio: Before it was repurposed to reanimate the dead, Eisenhower experimented with the necroenzyme for applications in plastic surgery.

name: Enzymic Citizen
effect: Zombified. Look at your graveyard and choose up to three cards in it. Shuffle them into your deck.
bio: Not every protester was fighting against the use of the enzyme. Some believe it to be the future and now see practices like cremation as archaic and inhumane.

name: Enzymic Saviours
effect: Zombified. Dextrous. When this card is cast: Transform all allied fighters into a copy of it.
bio: Their time is limited, but they'll ensure the city's isn't.

name: Ephialtes
effect: Whenever your opponent loses life: Draw a card. You lose 600 life.
bio: A [[Orinthian Fleet: The Lady|lady]], a warrior, a maiden. Perhaps in the future, she might assist an [[Beseech the Mastermind|intelligent mastermind]]?

name: Epic Duck Fan
effect: Whenever you cast a fighter with total stats 500 or less: Swap the stats of a target fighter
bio: "CAWM AWN, [[Epic Duck|DUCK]]! SCORE SOME HEDS M'ATE!! BETTA' SHOW 'EM WHAT ANATIDAES C'AN DO!!"

name: Ephemeris Seeker
effect: Whenever this card attacks: You gain 600 life. Put an eldritch blessing in your hand. | When this card is cast from a blessed space: Search your deck for a copy of it.
bio: "So like this moon stuff? Pretty rad"

name: Epik Nob
effect: Whenever you cast a fighter: Transform it into this card. All allied fighters gain 50 Power.
bio: Fall to breadcrumbs!

name: EpicLatiosLord
effect: When this card is cast: A target fighter gains 150 health. Attach regenerating to it.
bio: He renders snow meaningless.

name: Erase from Existence
effect: Select a card in your opponent's graveyard. Obliterate all copies of it in their graveyard, hand and deck.
bio:
"Ain't it convenient," scowled [[The Tainted|the Tainted]], "that the only weapon that can hurt a [[Technician (Group)|Technician]] was given to you by [[Nyarlhotep (Lore)|one?"]]
"It's convenient you have a [[Winona, Real Hero|small child]] besides you every time I wish you were headless."

name: Epic Duck
effect: Cast only if your starting deck had 2 or fewer Gladiators and no Duplicates. Whenever you cast a fighter with total stats 500 or less: Set the stats of a target fighter to 500/500. Search your deck for a Gladiator.
bio: "The ducks were never this big, but do you think the [[Thrilled Spectators|crowd]] would have something as trivial as "reality" get in the way of a good [[Pits of the Umberlords (Card)|show]]?"

name: EricThePianoGuy
effect: When this card cast: Set the Power of all lowest Power fighters to 500.
bio: Let's see the HOLE IN THE WALL!!!

name: Erikakat
effect: Whenever you cast your second action each turn: Search your deck for an action card.
bio: "Didn't think I'd make it this far, but that's the price for being a star." This card was designed by [[TheVoid 00f|VoidOof]].

name: Epic Sauce
effect: A target fighter gains 500 health and power. Transform it into a Sauce-Fuelled Zealot.
bio: WARNING: Contents contain the following: Ghost Peppers, Molten Lava, [[Drakobloxxer]] Saliva, Curry, Cactus Sap, Wasabi, [[Redcliff (Group)|Redcliff]] Marrow, Chili, and Beans. Side Effects include damage to skin, melting bones, heartburn, and a craving for rice. Eat with caution!

name: Eric Newman
effect: Gladiator. Liberate. Whenever this card attacks and destroys another: Remove the stud cost of all cards in your hand with Liberate.
bio: Immortality destroyed my home. It won't destroy [[McKayla, Bane of Hierarchy|my daughter's]].

name: Eternal Justice Mk.2
effect: Whenever this card attacks: Lock a target enemy fighter for 1 turn. Then Seance a card in your graveyard that was cast this game.
bio: Apollo's Pacifist orders to not shoot the invading [[Lordbreakers (Faction)|Lordbreakers]] fell on deaf ears.

name: Erik.cassel
effect: When this card is cast: Search your deck for a Common card, an Uncommon card, a Rare card, and an Epic card.
bio: One of the founders of [[ROBLOX|Roblox]]. Ancient and wise.

name: Eternal Tweety
effect: When this card is cast, ready all Birds.
bio: Does The Matriarch control Tweety, or does Tweety control The Matriarch?

name: Euphoric Vengeance
effect: A target fighter gains 400 power. Destroy the bottom four cards of your deck.
bio: "The world will be a better place without you in it; You won't be scared or sad anymore, and your spine is so exhilarating!" -[[Apex of Fantasy|Sarah, Apex of Fantasies]]

name: Essarrgee
effect: The first time an effect draws you a card each turn: This card gains 250 power.
bio: Originally known as Somerandomguysrg. Fan of horror. Made PAX.

name: Ersalin & Park
effect: When this card is cast: Select a card in your hand. Reset its cost, put it at the bottom of your deck, then draw a card. If its cost was reduced this way, draw another card.
bio: This polarizing detective duo have never failed to solve a cold case! Ersalin, the Time-Dredged and Park, the Unbound Alchemist are capable of anything! With their efforts combined, they travel the realms to unlock the secrets of the powers that were bestowed to them.

name: Essence Brewer
effect: During your end step: Set the Power of all allied fighters to 0, then all allied fighters gain 200 Power for each blessing you have.
bio: "Honestly, this green stuff tastes really good! Doubted [[Adreti, Farseeker Chieftain|Adreti]] the first time he pressured us to take some, but for some reason I'm kinda into it!"

name: Evangel of Justice
effect: Haste. | When this card is cast: Attach all gear from a target fighter onto it.
bio: The most diehard fans of the [[Warriors of Justice]] became stronger advocates for their ideals than the warriors ever were. [[Justice Merchandise|Merchandise]] is just that strong.

name: Ethyrias
effect: When this card attacks: Give yourself two Titanic Studs. You can baseplate an additional card this turn.
bio: <nowiki>--[[A New World Awaits...]</nowiki>

name: Evaera
effect: When this card is cast, set the health of a fighter to 500.
bio: Just RoVerifying if everything is in order.

name: Evil Wood Grain
effect: Whenever an effect targets this card: It gains 400 health.
bio: "My father always complained about evil trees. I never understood why until I visited [[Castle Shambeth|Hallow's castle]]." - [[Ancalagon Sword Critic|Sword Critic]]

name: EvilArtist
effect: When this card is cast, a target fighter loses 200 Power. Destroy that fighter if it has no power.
bio: My next creation? You, of course!

name: Ever-Beating Heart
effect: 2 Charges. When this card dies: spend a charge and resurrect it. At the end of your turns: Summon a 100/100 Reanimated.
bio: New Robloxia's end started from the most unlikely of places: [[Eisenhower Dwit|A widower's grief.]]

name: Excited Bouncer
effect: Zombified. | When this card is cast: Deal 200 damage to all fighters and they lose 200 Power. Then if you're in Bliss: Put a Green and Yellow stud into your Baseplate.
bio: Enter the [[The PLURRALITY|PLURRALITY]] and forget all about your troubles. Hopefully for forever!

name: Exotic Specimen
effect: N/A
bio: One of [[Javion]]'s many examples of exotic wildlife, animal rights disregarded.

name: EvilJacobthehero2013
effect: If you've cast an action this turn, this card has haste. Whenever this card attacks: Draw a card.
bio: Anyone else wonder why people put random years like 2013 in their username? That's like putting your birthday in your username.

name: Exotic Protector
effect: When this card is cast: Summon a 400/400 Exotic Specimen with no abilities. All allied Token fighters gain 100 health.
bio: The fauna of [[Cothran]] needed to be preserved to save any last possible vessel for the overflowing souls.

name: Exine
effect: When this card is cast: A target fighter gains 500 power.
bio: I guarantee you that all of my wares are nothing but the highest quality blox cards.

name: Exotic Murtic
effect: 3 charges. During your end step: This card gains 200 health. Remove a charge. When you remove the last, add 3 charges and return all Coloured fighters to their owner's hand.
bio: Kweh. // Kweh, Kweh! // Chocobooru!

name: Extant Anomalocaris
effect: When this card dies: Give yourself a Necroenzyme Vial for each Extant fighter that's died since your last endstep. (Including enemy ones.)
bio: They prided themselves over their intellect, up until they learnt too much.

name: Extant Release
effect: A target fighter loses 200 Power. Search your deck for two fighter cards that cost 0 or 1 total studs.
bio: Preserved in voidoak amber for 20,000 years, the last remnants of the [[The World of Wood|World of Wood]] will fight for their new home.

name: ExperienceWorks
effect: Whenever an allied fighter dies, if no other allied fighters have died this turn: Unlock this card.
bio: '''Gameing.'''

name: Explore the Depths
effect: Put an Eldritch Blessing on the card space this was cast from.  |  You draw X cards and gain 200 times X life. X is the number of blessings you have.
bio: A flood of essence spewed from the crack and violently transformed the trainee. Adreti was ecstatic, [[Yueliang, World Calmer|Yueliang]] was horrified.

name: Extruded Gentleman
effect: Soulbound to Extruded Lady. When this card is cast: Select an unranked card in your hand. Put a copy of it into your baseplate, except it's inert there. Whenever you cast this card's soulmate: It gains 100 Health. This effect also triggers in the baseplate.
bio: He is [[Extruded Lady|her]] vassal, a seed from which grew her tree.

name: Extant Archaeopteryx
effect: When this card dies: Summon a 0/0 Offspring that's inert in all zones. It gains 100 Health and Power for each Extant fighter that's died since your last end step.
bio: They revelled in their large numbers, up until sustenance was no longer possible.

name: Extant Titanoboa
effect: When this card dies: Your opponent loses 150 life for each Extant fighter that's died since your last end step.
bio: They dominated with their strength, until the responsibility of such power crushed them.

name: ExtolYT
effect: All allied fighters gain 250 Health and Power. Return them to your hand. Summon a 1200/400 fighter.
bio: Aha! After studying various "planets" collapsing under their own "power", I have managed to create this "contraption" which will only affect a select few "beings". The "effects" of this "contraption" not only "sends" those whom are within its "requirements" to a different "spacial position", but it also "awakens" their "true potential".

name: Eye Spy
effect: All enemy fighters lose 100 Power. Reveal your oppponent's hand. Draw a card.
bio: I spy with my floating eye, someone's about to die.

name: Eye of Overseer
effect: When this card is cast: Each Overseer in your hand gains 100 health and power.
bio: Eye of Overseers patrol their fortresses until they have to blink.

name: Extant Smilodon
effect: When this card dies: You gain a Colourless stud for each Extant fighter that's died since your last end step. (Including enemy ones.)
bio: They thrived with their vitality, until life became an excess waste.

name: Extraterrestrial Tourist
effect: When this card is cast: Select a non-colourless fighter card in your deck that costs 4 or more total studs. Put it into your baseplate, or search it if your baseplate rank is 8 or greater.
bio: ''Zoogli hear stories of gain! Zoogli and friends wish to claim gain!''

name: Eye of Heaven
effect: Ban your opponent.
bio: N/A

name: Ezebel, Pirate Queen
effect: When this card is cast: A target fighter loses 400 Power.
bio: The oceans are controlled by the pirates, and the pirates are controlled by Ez. You want anything done on the ocean, well you will have to talk to Ez first.

name: FILTHY PRANKS (Legacy)
effect:
[Effect removed for political reasons]

Current Archetype: Test
bio: [Bio removed for political reasons]

name: FabulousBench
effect: Haste. Cast only if you have Hamstermon in play. During your end step: All enemy fighers lose 150 Power.
bio: More fabulous than an [[FabulousMettaton123|inelegant robot]]!

name: FabulousMettaton123
effect: Haste. Cast only if you have KennedyLeDog in play. During your end step: Deal 150 damage to all enemy fighters.
bio: More fabulous than a [[FabulousBench|drab chair]]!

name: EzCheez
effect: During your end step, if you have 4 or fewer cards in hand: Draw a card.
bio: As opposed to [[Hard Cheese|hard cheese]]. How would one even make such a thing?

name: Factory Supervisor
effect: When this card is cast: It deals 300 damage to a target fighter. Give yourself two Cash Grabs cards. | When this card dies, if there are 6 Cash Grabs in your Baseplate: Deal 300 damage to all enemy fighters.
bio: He follows money, no matter how toxic its source.

name: Factory Worker
effect: When this card is cast: Give yourself a Cash Grab. | When this card dies, if there are 4 Cash Grabs in your Baseplate: Your opponent loses 600 life. Search your deck for a Cash Grab card.
bio: He hates this [[The Money Factory|place]], but he has to put food on the table just like the rest of us.

name: Face Your Failures
effect:
Obliterate all cards in all graveyards.
A target fighter gains 50 Power for each card obliterated this way.
bio: [[Criticism Against Inaction|Apollo's excoriation]] rang in Eisenhower's ears. The young inventor had a point; He had done next to nothing to resolve this mess. No longer.

name: Facing the Ripper
effect: Each fighter with the lowest Power gains 800 Power until the next end step.
bio: Thec cackled in unerring confidence. Apollo stared with a calm vengeance. Taking a deep breath, he answered the Ripper's laugh with a determined smile. He would pay him the debt he is owed with his own hands.

name: Failed Experiment
effect: This card is immune to transformation card effects. Whenever a fighter dies: This card gains 100 health.
bio: When [[Eisenhower, the Alchemist|Eisenhower]] left his lab to help defeat [[Priestess Zanzel, the Promised One|Zanzel]], the clever abominations on the lowest floor broke out and slaughtered us.

name: FancyFame
effect: When this card is cast: Draw a card.
bio: Fame and fortune are only given to the fanciest of fighters.

name: Faltzen
effect:
0 Charges.  | 
Whenever an action targets: You lose 300 life and give yourself a Money Stack. If it targeted an allied fighter, this card gains a charge, otherwise it loses one. Then if this card has 3 or negative 3 charges on it, it gains 300 power and transcends.
bio: hiiii :DDD thnk u for plyaing my card :3

name: Farseeker Minecart
effect: Whenever a card you cast uses up a Blessing: Unlock this card.
bio: Due to the sheer unpredictability of the Moon's interiors, minecarts have been limited to a maximum speed of 20km/h.

name: Fallen Guardian
effect: Deal 350 damage to a target fighter. Then deal another extra 350 damage if it has no Colourless studs in it's cost.
bio: And he can't get up.

name: Faith Restored
effect:
Select 1 effect:  | 
- Destroy 2 target fighters.  | 
- Put a Cosmic Crack into each players' baseplate.
bio:
"I would strike down the skybox itself if it meant protecting my gorgeous Nikolaevich."
--[[Alexandra Feodorovna]], [[the Sacrifice]]

name: Farseeker Expeditioner
effect: When this card is cast: Put an Eldritch Blessing on the third card space in your hand.  |  Twice each turn, whenever you cast a card from a Blessed card space: Draw a card.
bio: Nothing like traversing a lunar sattelite with little to no oxygen supplies - not like they'll need them.

name: Faith and Integrity, Twin Arms
effect: Dextrous. Whenever this card is targeted by an opposing effect: Seance the bottom two cards in your opponent's deck.
bio:
"Thank you, [[Thec, the Robloxcity Ripper|Thec]]."
[[Apollo, Fearless|Apollo]] smiled at the man who destroyed his parents and his childhood. 

"You forced me to put my intellect to good use just to be a person. Just to be respected. I would never have been half the man I am without you. So come."

Apollo caressed his mechanical arms.

"Let me show you the fruits of your labor!"

name: Fashionable Citizen
effect: When this card dies: Put two copies of it into your graveyard.
bio: Another wonderful day in beautiful Bloxburg! Surely nothing abhorrently awful could ruin this, eh?

name: Fatal Discovery
effect: You win the game.
bio: At last, The Scholar found what he was looking for.

name: FatalWing
effect: Whenever you cast a fighter with total stats 1500 or more: Destroy the oldest card in your hand. Give yourself two Green cards.
bio: As fatal as a wing.

name: Fat Cat
effect: Defender. This card takes 100 less damage during combat.
bio: He haz regretz of his Chezburger dayz.

name: Farseeker Tent Formation
effect: Whenever you discard this card from a Blessed space: Put it into your baseplate. A target fighter loses 300 power.
bio: Faith is a fickle thing. You need others to uphold that faith alongside you.

name: Fate_Sealed
effect: When this card is cast: Each allied fighter with the lowest Health gains 350 Health.
bio: Pfft. How would you make someone's fate sealed? With glue?

name: FatherChristmaz
effect: When this card destroys another: Your opponent loses 400 Life.
bio: Christmaz rulez! I'm not Santa but I am his cool and rad helper FatherChristmaz, and I'll help you in any battle!

name: Federation Fleet: Assimilator
effect: This card is immune to cloning card effects. | Whenever this card attacks and destroys another: All enemy fighters lose 150 Power. Summon a clone of each fighter with the lowest Power.
bio:
The few among [[Havalu]] who resisted [[Azureless of the Federation|Azureless']] rule quickly desisted when they saw his personal aircraft.
This card was co-designed by [[TheVoid_00f|VoidOof]].

name: Faultful
effect: When this card is cast: Add a copy of a random nontoken card from your baseplate to your hand.
bio: Cackletta disapproves.

name: Felicia, Fundebted Manager
effect: Whenever you cast a fighter with total stats 1500 or more: Summon a 500/200 Fundebted Fighter.
bio: Hi! I'm Felicia! Your primary FunTM Manager during your time in the Pits of the Hell-wide acclaimed [[Lord Umberhallow]]! Please, take a complementary soda can in the boxes to your right. Now then, in the count of three, let out the most blood-curdling death scream you can muster! Ready? One!

name: Febrezer
effect: When this card is cast: Put Ban-in-a-Can into your hand. (It there's 8000 total Power among all fighters, it put all enemy fighters into their baseplate)
bio: A living golem made out of pure copyrighted scent. The freshness will cause the weak to cough up their lungs.

name: Feline Fandango (Legacy)
effect: Put two Kittens into your hand.
bio: N/A

name: Fenfie08
effect: When this card is cast: Give your opponent a Nightmare.
bio: The happiest people always have the darkest secrets.

name: Fauna Feeding
effect: Cast this card ignoring its colourless cost if you recurred a card this turn. | If the top card of your graveyard is Green, a target fighter gains 600 Power. Otherwise it gains 600 Health.
bio:
CAITLIN
THE HORSE IS HERE

name: Feral Citizen
effect: Once each turn, whenever your opponent casts a fighter: Choose a target enemy fighter. This card and that fighter deal damage equal to their power to each other.
bio: He tried to die as he lived: Fashionably awesome.

name: Fenrier
effect: Once each turn, whenever an allied effect suspends a fighter: Unlock a target allied fighter and it gains 200 health.
bio: Spark the eternal strife, and turn summer into the next year's snow.

name: Federation Stratagem: Abduction
effect: Suspend a target fighter from play until the next end step. Give yourself three Moonleaks.
bio: "Dance! Beg! If you're funny enough, we might just save you from the mines!"

name: Final Tree
effect: When this card dies: Give yourself a Red card that costs 2 or less total studs.
bio: This tree is a hope that we can restore this place.

name: Federation Force: Miner
effect: Whenever you cast an Action: Give yourself a Red or Blue action, except it's inert in all zones.
bio: [[Havalu]]'s natives praised the moon religiously, as it was regarded as the Mother in the Sky, protecter of Spirits. [[The Federation (Group)|The Federation]] tore it apart, as they needed to look good for next week's gala.

name: Final Revels
effect: Unique. Cast only if you have at least 3 cards in your hand. Each player shuffles their hand into their deck, then draws four cards.
bio: A [[Sinister (Group)|Sinister]] family reunion only happens in the direst of circumstances.

name: Finland
effect: When this card is cast, if you have no Yellow studs: It generates a red stud.
bio: Sweden generates [[Blue Cards|blue]] icons, whilst Norway generates [[Yellow Cards|yellow]] ones. Scandinavia hates [[Green Cards|grass]].

name: Firebrand1
effect: Whenever an enemy fighter dies: This card gains 200 Health.
bio: Death is not the greatest loss in life. The greatest loss is what dies inside us while we live.

name: FishBubble1002
effect: When this card attacks a fighter: Deal 300 damage to that fighter.
bio: IS IT A FISH? IS IT A BUBBLE? I'M SO CONFUSED!!

name: First Contact
effect: You lose all of your coloured studs. Destroy a card of each colour from your Baseplate. | Search your deck for an Ultra Terrain card and an Ultra Fighter card.
bio: Lua's attempts to banish the portal were too little, too late. The Ultras had arrived on Robloxia.

name: Fewchsia; Pride
effect: Overload. Whenever this card attacks or your opponent targets it: Move 2 non-token cards from your baseplate into your hand. Put a Red and a Green stud in there.
bio: "The weak should lie down and perish. Only then shall the strong flourish such as a blossoming fuchsia."

name: Fire Fighter (Legacy)
effect: Can only be summoned if your opponent controls a fighter. Your opponent loses a red, a green, a yellow, and a blue icon. This effect can cause people to go into negative icons.
bio: That put a dampener on your plans, eh?

name: Flagrant Piracy
effect: Look at your opponent's deck and choose a card from it. Search that card and all copies of it in their deck into your hand.
bio: You should've kept your place copylocked.

name: Flatflyer
effect: When this card is cast, if your opponent controls four fighters: Summon seven Noobs. You can't cast anything else this turn.
bio: Secretly has been building up power for years with all the cards put in that [[List of AI#Recycling Bin|bin]]. The takeover shall soon commence.

name: Fl00fy_Bonez
effect: When this card is cast: Summon a clone of a target allied fighter. Unlock the clone and obliterate it during the end step. Then if you're in Bliss, do this again for all allied fighters.
bio: "Mweeoew! The [[Necroenzyme Vial|Nekowenzyme]] seems wike a widdle oppwotunity tew test out some [[Tear and Reshape|mew transfiguration techniques!]]"

name: FixingFailure
effect: Whenever your opponent casts a fighter, this card gains 200 health.
bio: If he fixes failure, why hasn't he fixed himself?

name: Flatflyer, The Last Aegis
effect:
When this card is cast or when it attacks, Choose one:  | 
A target fighter gains 300 health and Defender.  | 
A target fighter gains 300 power and Overload.
bio:
Thought I knew what I struggled for
Thought my future would bring me more
The beginning, so enchanting, seemed so right before

name: Flesh Centrifuge
effect:
Fading.  | 
Attach to a target fighter.  | 
At the start of each turn: Obliterate this fighter, then summon a fighter from any graveyard unlocked with a copy of this card attached to it.
bio:
"This would make a great zoo attraction."
-[[Apate, Demon Investor]]

name: Fleeing Survivors
effect: When this card is cast: Search yourself three copies of it from your deck, except they're inert when discarded.
bio: Everyone fled the [[Bloxburg in Ruins|ruined Bloxburg]],  no matter the danger. The scared refugees found the savages that ruled this forest preoccupied with the same horrors they faced.

name: Flaw
effect:
Inert in all zones. Attach to a target fighter. 
During your end step, if this card and 20 others are in your graveyard: Obliterate this card.
bio:
"Call it filth, or Imperfections all you wish. It is our variance that defines who we are."
- [[Akasegawa the Iconoclast]]

name: Flesh Fashionista
effect: When this card is cast: It gains 50 Health and Power for each different name among cards in your Graveyard. Repeat this effect if you're in Bliss.
bio: This... This is who I was always meant to be!

name: Flatflyer, Cardmancer
effect: When this card is cast or dies: Give yourself a fighter with an effect that triggers when cast. Convert all {R} and {Y} in its cost to {G} and {B}.
bio:
When you can weave the fabric of the game around you, why not have some fun with it?
With infinite thanks to: Flatflyer

name: Flatflyer, Multidimensional Guardian
effect: When this card is cast: Put the top card of your opponent's deck into your hand. Remove all studs in its cost.
bio: I've seen it before, again and again, I will break this eternal fate.

name: Fluffle & Soul, Life Debtors
effect: You can't be banned.
bio: Not everyone who steps into the Caishen ends up losing. For a few lucky individuals, they manage to truly win bigg against all odds. Others, well.. Getting in the way of two quadrillionare demigods isn't exactly a fair matchup.

name: Flufflefunz, Unforgettable
effect: Whenever this card attacks: Destroy your hand. Give yourself the hand of a player in a different match in this server.
bio: Everything will be fine from now on. I come back, and you're still here.

name: Fluffle, One Deer Army
effect: Whenever you shuffle your deck: Unlock this card.
bio: "Those who stand before me are doompilled and dyingcore.'"

name: Flufflefunz
effect: Whenever you discard a card, if you've discarded three or more cards since your last end step: Deal 100 damage to each enemy fighter with the lowest Health
bio: His self-milling is the last thing if people dared to call his Formidulosus a 'Walmart Dominus'.

name: Fleskhjerta
effect: During your end step, if the newest card in your hand is a fighter: It gains 200 Health and Power. Destroy the oldest card in your hand, then draw a card.
bio: I, THE GREAT FLESKHJERTA, used to make [[ROBLOX]] videos and bloopers....

name: Fluffle
effect: This card is immune to locking card effects. Whenever an effect locks this card: Unlock it instead.
bio: I want to chew through electric wire.

name: Fluffy Findings (Legacy)
effect: Shuffle two Kittens into your deck and draw two cards.
bio: Aww...Can we keep them?

name: Fool of the Federation
effect: N/A
bio: Federation officials keep people they conquer as humiliated playthings. Greater trophies receive greater degredation.

name: Forest of Desolation
effect: Suspend a target fighter until its next end step, then obliterate all currently suspended fighters.
bio: The depths of the Abyss feel strangely welcoming.

name: Fluzard
effect: When this card is cast: Each allied fighter with total stats 1500 or more gains 200 power.
bio: The exotic ithian highlands has given [[Lord Umberhallow|Hallow]] the most interesting beasts for the pit's spectacles.

name: Fool's Gold
effect:
Return a target fighter that costs 4 or fewer total studs to its hand.  | 
Seek Shinies.
bio: With [[Queen Shedare II|her]] eldest son sitting on the entrance to Sunken Shedare, its fallen queen discarded her crown jewels in hopes of enticing her subjects back into the monarchy.

name: Forbidden Power
effect: Deal 4000 damage to all allied fighters. | Destroy a Blue and Red card in your Baseplate, then gain four studs of those colors. | Draw two cards.
bio: "A conquerer must sacrifice everything to obtain everything else." -Evercyan, Lord of the Federation

name: Forest of Paradise
effect: When you cast this card, or at the start of each player's turn: Each card that player casts this turn costs one less colourless stud.
bio: Do you not feel the spirits?

name: Foroth Water Technician
effect: Cast this card ignoring its colourless cost if a player has a Peace Term card in hand. Whenever this card attacks: Your opponent can't cast actions until their next end step.
bio: The brain-eating amoebas in all of Foroth's icy waters do their work subtly; Only the tiny handful of people who know they exist know how to control them, and others.

name: Found Familey
effect: If you've obliterated a card this turn, this card has Haste. | Whenever this card attacks: Look at the top two cards of your opponent's graveyard. Put one into your hand and the rest into your graveyard.
bio: There is nowhere safer than beside the Smileys and nowhere more dangerous than in front of them.

name: Forothian Immigrant
effect: When this card is cast: choose one:  |  - Summon a 450/450 Moongeist. |  - Draw a card. Put an Eldritch Blessing onto 2 cards in your hand.  |  - Deal 150 damage to all fighters. Destroy your opponent's terrain.
bio: The people of Foroth looked amongst each other, now without an authority controlling their every move. They all now sought the same thing - a new beginning.

name: Forest's Final Defense
effect: Recur nine fighter cards from your Graveyard. except they're Zombified
bio: [[Caitlin, Paladin of Nature|Caitlin]] felt rather remorseful, having to revive old warriors to fight in her stead. They, however, had been itching for a fight against a common foe.

name: Frank East
effect: Combomaker. | During your end step: Move a gear from each adjacent fighter onto this card. If none are moved this way, attach a gear with +0/+50 stat bonus to this card.
bio: "I've covered demon wars, ya know."

name: Foroth
effect:
When this card is cast: Give each player two Peace Term cards.
At the start of each player's turn, if that player has no Peace Terms in their hand: Give that player any card.
bio: N/A

name: Freaky Friday
effect: Give yourself two Moonleaks. Summon two 500/300 tokens. One evolves fighters, and the other devolves fighters.
bio: Eternal punishment like no other, caused by using the term anthrofiction to describe a body of work.

name: Freddyland Utility Tunnels
effect: At the end of your turns: Summon a 50/300 Revenant with overload.
bio: Below fantasy and fun.

name: Fractal (Legacy)
effect: Give yourself six Blue or Red action cards. You gain 6 Red studs.
bio: The [[Paraselene Sage]] thought he found the most [[Forbidden Power|forbidden of powers]]. He was wrong.

name: Fractality
effect: Whenever this card's stats are swapped: All allied fighters gain 200 Power.
bio: Creator of Chaos Washers. First-person mode is highly reccomended.

name: Fraying Pipes
effect: Reveal your opponent's hand and select a non-starter card in it. Add 4C to its cost.
bio: S c r a p e ,    G r i n d ,    C r e a k ,    R a t t l e ,    W h i n e ,    S h r i e k .

name: Freed Spirits
effect: When this card is animated or at the start of your turns: If an effect would shuffle a card into a deck this turn, it shuffles an extra copy in.
bio: The last victim's escape was accompanied by a myriad souls, and a myriad embattled demons jockeying for their aid in their petty wars.

name: FreeThePolarBear
effect: During your end step, if there are 10 or more Green studs in your fighters' costs: Summon a clone of this card.
bio: Never let the bears out.

name: Frenemy's Bargain
effect: Draw three cards from your opponent's deck. Your opponent draws three cards from your deck.
bio: One [[bengbeng14]] coming right up, my dear frenemy. This will cost you your soul, however.

name: Friend Request Spammer
effect: When this card is cast: Your opponent draws two cards.
bio: PLEASE PLEASE PLEASE PLEASE PLEASE BE MY FRIEND PLEASE PLEASE PLEASE I'LL DO ANYTHING PLEASE

name: Fried One Cultist (Legacy)
effect: Put a '''fried one limb'''100px100px100px100px into your hand.
bio: Let's cause an apocalypse over here!

name: Frightful Blade of Bone
effect: A target allied fighter gains 100 Health and Power. | Transform it into into a Immortal Wielder with the effect: | Whenever this card destroys another: Give yourself a Titanic Stud.
bio: "Frightful" Blade of Bone? That's not very scary. I don't--

name: Friaza
effect: Once each turn, whenever you cast an action: Unlock this fighter.
bio: THIS ISN'T EVEN MY FINAL FORM!

name: Frinigus
effect: When this card is cast: Give yourself a random Green or Yellow Action.
bio: "People keep having those strange nightmares. My lab is overran with experiments on the issue."

name: Frozen Phoenix
effect: This card is immune to targeting, and returning card effects. Whenever this card attacks and destroys another: Unlock it. Return all fighters to their owner's hands.
bio: Renders wildfires meaningless.

name: Fried Acolyte
effect: During your end step: All allied Acolytes gain 50 Health and Power and generate.
bio: He's not an acolyte of [[Shedletsky the Fried One|the fried one]]. He's just been fried.

name: Friendly Salesdevil
effect: Whenever an effect you control targets a fighter for the second time each turn: You gain 300 life and two colourless studs.
bio: "Come one, come all! Visit the greatest show of all time, featuring your favorite Roblox™️ Developers and Influencers!"

name: Frigid Flufflefunz
effect: When this card is cast: Give yourself Green Titanic Stud.
bio: [The imperfection has been disposed of. Some eras are better left forgotten.]

name: Fruitful Reunion (Legacy)
effect: Cast only if you control no fighters. Shuffle Beeism and Teaism into your deck, then draw two cards.
bio: The prophecy came true.

name: Frying Pan
effect: Attach to a target fighter.  | When you've gained life this turn: Give yourself a food card. Convert its colour and all {R}{B}{Y} in its cost to {G}.
bio:
"Your curry is excellent. I'm grateful you shared it."
[[The Sacrifice]], staring at the starchy slop, hoped her cooking wasn't being compared to military rations.

name: Froot Ninja
effect: Whenever you cast a Ninja fighter: A target fighter gains 200 power.
bio: He tests his blades on watermelons and walnuts. That's practically familicide.

name: Fuchsia Eyes Red Dragon
effect: When this card is cast: A target fighter gains 200 health, then deal 200 damage to all fighters.
bio: It took an aeon to rebuild after the Fuchsia Devastation.

name: Funderworld Decadent
effect: Inert in play. When this card is cast: Give yourself 3 100/200 Copycats that are inert when discarded.
bio: "Get ready for a Pits Trial!" The cat cheered. "Tonight's host..."

name: Fundebted Fighter
effect: Whenever you cast a fighter with total stats 1500 or more: This card gains 200 Power.
bio: Soulless husks doomed to fight for freedom from [[Lord Umberhallow|Hallow]].

name: Fundebted Coach
effect: When this card is cast: Exchange its power with a target fighter.
bio: Hi I’m Joshriel, your very own FunTM Coach! Here at pits we care deeply about the mental wellbeing of ALL our FunployeesTM. Here, have a lollipop! Anyways about your next match, how good is your death rattle.

name: Funzcorp Flagship
effect:
| 
Give yourself a copy of a target fighter.  | 
Give yourself a copy of a target fighter, except it's a gear with -300/-300 stat bonus.  | 
Give yourself a copy of a target fighter, except it's an action. Remove 1W1R1G1B1Y from its cost. |
bio: Can we really call it “narcissism” if we’re just better than you?

name: FuryBlocks
effect: Dextrous.
bio: Don't touch his bucket at all.

name: Funeral Eulogist
effect: When this card is cast: Recur an allied Ranked card, except it's fading. Then destroy a Ranked card in your deck.
bio: In a world of immortality, graceful death to old age is worthy of discussion, be it stupid or sublime.

name: Fut_re
effect: Whenever an enemy fighter dies: Your opponent loses 200 life. This card gains 200 Power.
bio: Ｎｏｗ ｔｈａｔ＇ｓ ａ ｌｏｔｔａ ｄａｍａｇｅ

name: FutonJohn
effect: When this card is cast: Swap the stats of all enemy fighters, then all enemy fighters lose 150 power.
bio: "Huh?"

name: Fuse Bomb
effect:
Attach to a target fighter.  | 
When this fighter dies: Destroy all terrains. If an allied terrain was destroyed, also deal 200 damage to all fighters.
bio: A common tool in revolution and suppression alike.

name: Fut_re, Ablaze
effect: Whenever this card attacks: Your opponent summons a fighter that costs 4 or fewer total studs from their graveyard unlocked. Deal 200 damage to all enemy fighters.
bio: "6 Years in the making, and just as disappointing as expected."

name: G0Z
effect: This card is immune to targeting, damage, healthgain, powerloss, powergain, returning, destruction, transformation, suspension, division, setting, and swapping card effects.
bio: As the demons looked for [[Priestess Zanzel, the Promised One|Zanzel]], the innocent people realised a fatal mistake: The enemy of their enemy is not their friend.

name: Future Falchion
effect: A target allied fighter gains 100 Health and Power. | Transform it into into a Immortal Wielder with the effect: | Whenever an effect draws you a card: This card gains 100 Health and Power.
bio: The mass arrival of extraterrestrial species around the [[Heights Expedition Site|Heights]] was already enough to influence the evolutionary phenomenon overtaking it.

name: GUCCI
effect: When this card is cast, if you've ever cast a fighter onto a full board this game: Double its stats.
bio: Under the creative direction of Alessandro Michele, Gucci is redefined as a luxury brand with a contemporary approach to fashion.

name: GY-RObot
effect: When this card is cast: You may select a card in your hand and destroy it. If you do, deal 50 damage for each stud in that card's cost to a target fighter. If a fighter dies this way, give yourself a copy of it, Convert all Red and Blue in its cost to Green and Yellow.
bio: $GYRO fell -44%. It is evident that drastic times justify drastic measures. We will make them afraid again.

name: G_RE
effect: Haste. Once each turn, whenever you discard a card: Mark a target fighter.  | Whenever this card destroys a marked fighter: Summon an unlocked copy of that card, except it's terrified.
bio: '''<span style="color: #5FFF5F">"I am ultimate."'''

name: GGGGraded
effect: When this card is cast: Select any number of fighters in your hand and add {G}{G} to their cost. They gain 200 Health and Power.
bio: Why must you spoil me with a sweetness that requires sacrifice?

name: Galaxy
effect:
Inert in play.
When this card is cast: Select an unranked terrain in your deck that costs 4 or fewer total studs and search it.
bio: Can you hear me, Major Tom?

name: Fweerobuxyay123
effect: When you've discarded your 5th card each turn: Give each player a Robux Bundle. Destroy this card.
bio: Does anyone remember those gameshow groups where instead of getting robux you just got a useless rankup in the group that hosted it or is it just me?

name: GalaxyFlame
effect: Haste. When this card is cast: A target fighter loses 100 power.
bio: I torch noobs like you for breakfast, lunch and dinner.

name: Galilea, Faithful Explorer
effect: When this card is cast: Destroy your hand, then draw a card for each token fighter in your baseplate.
bio:
The Farseekers needed illicit information regarding the very nature of [[Cothran]] itself, who to convince on a life-threatening journey to fetch the samples?
[[Adreti, Farseeker Chieftain|Adreti]] could sniff out the gullible.

name: FuuTuu
effect: Whenever this card attacks: You lose 200 Life.
bio: A very fashionable sheriff with a powerful revolver who often comes on and off on [[ROBLOX]].

name: Gabytaby
effect: When this card is cast: Select an unranked fighter card in your baseplate with total stud cost 5 or less. Summon 3 copies of it, each with 400 Health and Power.
bio: I wake up with an itch to play green ramp

name: Gaius, Champion of Vitality
effect: Cast only if your starting deck had 2 or fewer Gladiators and no Duplicates. Whenever you cast a Colourless fighter: Give yourself a Green card. You gain 200 life. Search your deck for a Gladiator.
bio: "[[Herrus, Elder Thought Demon|He]]'s watching me. That demon will not invade my thoughts like he did to my kingdom."

name: GamesBloxx
effect: When this card is cast: Return a target enemy fighter to the hand. Your opponent loses life equal to its Power.
bio: Noob toys are his favorites, and he'll make a noob toy out of you.

name: Gaomon94
effect: Whenever this card gains a lock: It gains 200 Power.
bio: Retired [[ROBLOX]] Community forum poster. If you upset him, he'll say, 'Knock it off' before you're done for.

name: Games
effect: Inert in play. When this card is cast, or when it dies: Give yourself a Classic ROBLOX Tool.
bio: He loves games.

name: Gatekeeper of Entropy
effect: Overload. | When this card is cast: Attach a gamerule to it. Delete the gamerule when the attached fighter dies.
bio: The Technicians screamed their whalesong for [[Nyarlhotep (Lore)|Nyarlhotep's]] orders in cleaning the chaos; The only reply was quiet satisfaction.

name: Gather My Memoirs
effect: Look at the top five cards of your deck and choose one of them. Search that card and destroy the rest.
bio: Eisenhower brought the pictures of him and husband, the only form of solace he'll provide himself in the dilapitated laboratory.

name: Gattai!
effect:
Obliterate a target allied fighter.  | 
Select an unranked fighter card in your deck that costs 2 more total studs than that card and summon it. When that fighter dies, summon the obliterated card as a 500/500 fighter.
bio: "The last time they did their ultimate combination was when my wife tried her hand at world domination! You must've kicked her into despair!" - [[Blackmoore, Invented Evil|Blackmoore]]

name: General's Firerate Boost
effect: Search your deck for 3 cards with Station, except they're fleeting. | All gears on your terrain generate.
bio: It takes a great leader to triumph over insurmountable threats, and even greater leaders to stop them for good.

name: Gardi Nakara
effect: When this card is cast: Give yourself 2 Elements.
bio: Hah! Writes itself.

name: Gato Luz
effect: When this card is cast: Ready all allied fighters thrice, then lock them for 1 turn. Reveal your opponent's hand.
bio: This robotic cat is basically the mascot of 'The robots'. Don't worry, you won't be in the darkness when you're with it.

name: Gebbo's Meat Cleaver
effect: Give yourself a green Epic card. | Divide all allied epic and legendary fighters into two copies of themselves.
bio: SAND FLIES?! AAAAAAAAAAA

name: Ghealach of the Paraselene Sages
effect: Moonward. Gladiator. Whenever you cast an action: Deal 150 damage to all fighters.
bio: "Those [[Thrilled Spectators|demons]] know who I am, what I mean to their kind. Yet [[Crowd's Favour|they cheer all the same]] for me...Could this be the [[Pits of the Umberlords (Card)|Pits]] influence?"

name: Ghxstying
effect: Whenever this fighter is cast or attacks: Choose a target grouped unattached fighter. Attach a fighter from its group to this fighter and that fighter as a +0/+0 gear.
bio: The VFX Viper

name: Ghashendex's Mole
effect: During your end step: Return this card if there's a command attached to it. Otherwise attach 3 commands to this card and draw a card.
bio: 4000 years of obeying Code without question had made Telamon's victims rather pliable to manipulation.

name: GemInNight
effect: When this card is cast: Deal 300 damage to a target fighter. It gains 300 power.
bio: Midnight is where he shines the brightest.

name: General Store Owner
effect: During your endstep, if three or more fighters have died this turn: This card gains 500 Power.
bio: Do '''not''' mess with a person who's willing to work for their tax pay.

name: Giant Worm
effect:
Inert in play.
Whenever you cast a card that costs exactly 2 total studs: Attach a gear to this card.
When this card dies: You lose 500 life. For each gear on it, search your deck for a card that costs exactly 2 total studs.
bio: The Herald of all decay radicalises its children in vengeance for those who look down upon its work.

name: Ghost Invisibility Elixir
effect: Attach to a target fighter. | Whenever a player discards a card: This fighter loses 200 health.
bio:
"An intruder? Impossible. The moon is so fiercely defended that only a ghost could get inside."
-[[Claymaker, Master Architect|Claymaker]]

name: Ghostphased Citadel of Itera
effect: Whenever a fighter dies: Give its owner a copy of it, except it’s a 0/0 Apocryphantom action that’s fading.
bio: "Such divine astral monsters do not mean to hurt us; Even good dragons cannot help but trample the weak. We must be ready to greet them with open arms when they arrive." - [[Priestess Zanzel, the Promised One|Priestess Zanzel]]

name: Giggling Gangsters
effect: Whenever a card leaves your graveyard: Deal 50 damage to all enemy fighters.
bio: One's a smile, three's an audience, ten's a mob.

name: Giftsplosion
effect: Give yourself six rare cards.
bio: Christmas is for December despite advertisements starting in August; It's time to rebel against the system!

name: Gilfred Swordfrost
effect: Rageborne. | During your end step: This card generates for each stack of Rage you have. Whenever this card attacks: You lose all of your Colourless studs. This card gains 100 power for each stud removed this way.
bio:
''"The Autocracy fell against the Eater,
engulfed in an eternal winter.
Decades of freedom long gone,
prisoners' shackles now undone."''

name: Gilmuraig
effect: N/A
bio: RAAAAAAAAAAAGH MEN WON'T DATE ME AAAAGHGHHRRRAAH

name: Glaciem Mage
effect: When this card is cast: Lock a target fighter for 1 turn.
bio: All frost mages befriend a [[The Toothy Deer|toothy deer]] from birth. This teaches them not to give random animals frostbite.

name: Giver Trap
effect: Return a target allied fighter and a target enemy fighter to their hands.
bio: A truly inhumane contraption from Old Robloxia.

name: Glint of Perception
effect: Once each turn, whenever an effect gives you a Cat's Eye card: Search your deck for a Cat's Eye card two rarities above it. This card generates.
bio: Deception requires one to care about the truth.

name: God Forsaken
effect:
Haste. Dextrous.
When this card is cast: Set the power of a target fighter to 250. Once each turn, whenever you shuffle your deck: Return this card to your hand and remove its cost
bio: All he ever wanted was to be free from the shackles of life. He'd literally been through hell for it - four times! The Alpha Brick wasn't going to let him off that easy, though. He still had a job to do, and the Brick needs a new protector.

name: Glaecium
effect: When this card is cast, if you control a non-Green fighter: It deals 300 damage to itself and a target fighter. They both gain 300 power.
