bio: Outclassed but not outmatched, [[Cothran]]'s natives quickly reverse-engineered the tech of the their [[The Federation (Group)|Federation]] invaders.

name: GodzGalaxy
effect: Whenever a fighter is cast: Destroy all token fighters.
bio: Only the strong can endure the tribal council. That's the way it's been, and the way it always will be.

name: Goldfish
effect: Once each turn, whenever an effect you control suspends a card: Summon a Zombified 1000/200 clone of it to your field and unlock it. Obliterate it during your next endstep.
bio: For all the decks [[Goldfish (AI)|he's]] helped test, you'd think he'd have grasped the game by now...

name: Glorious Monument
effect: When this card is destroyed: You lose 500 life. Draw 2 cards.
bio: Would the leader of the revolution be happy with all the empty tokens built in his name?

name: Godmodding
effect: Until the end of your next turn, allied fighters can't die and can't be destroyed.
bio: Millenia-old developers, with centuries of experience, defeated in minutes by a [[Alex, Developer Depraved|brat]] saying "''(dodges)''"

name: Golden Egg Beatings
effect: Deal 300 damage to each fighter with the highest Health. Repeat this process twice, Then Summon a 200/100 Inert Lagomorph.
bio: When the [[Doge (Group)|Doges]] demanded tribute from Dragonkind, they responded with enthusiastic generousity.

name: Godlysinha
effect: When this card is cast: Give yourself a Titanic Stud card of a colour not in your baseplate (or any if all colours are present).
bio: The lesser known apprentice of [[Drager]], don't read his code or your eyes might melt in horror.

name: Goo Golem
effect: Whenever this fighter attacks: Give yourself a Morphic Goo. A target fighter gains 100 Health.
bio: A less refined version of the Morphic Goo. It is living, but lacks the ability to transform like the final product does.

name: Good Service (Legacy)
effect: A target fighter gains 250 health. Lock it for 2 turns.
bio: I hope I was of some use to you, sir.

name: Golden Bloxxer
effect:
Attach to a target fighter.
Once each turn, whenever you cast a gear: Unlock this fighter.
bio: So many KOs, so little time.

name: Goodknight, Infurnished Bunker
effect: After this card attacks: Summon three 50/300 Hellish Infurnitures. Unlock each fighter with the lowest health.
bio: [[Lord Umberhallow|Umberhallow]] was doing all of us a favour.

name: Gooplast
effect: Cast this card ignoring its Colourless cost if you control a Goo-related fighter. Summon a Morphic Goo, then a target fighter loses 600 power and is locked for 3 turns.
bio: Goos weren't designed to be combat effective in their base form, but they will immobilize anything or anyone stupid enough to trip into one.

name: Gork, The Caveman
effect: Whenever this card destroys another: Both players generate two Colourless studs.
bio: Gork mad. Gork go hit you with rock. Ooga chaka.

name: GordonRox24
effect: Whenever you cast an allied fighter: It gains 150 health and power.
bio: GordonRox24 is a former forum moderator and administrator. He used to moderate All Things [[ROBLOX]] and Help(Technical Support and Account Issues). While he is no longer an administrator, he is still on the platform from time to time and remains a huge fan to this day.

name: Goreswimmer
effect:
Stealth.  | 
Whenever you cast a card: Attach Blood to this card. This triggers only once per card type.
bio: [[Queen Shedare II|Shedare's]] old servants are so easily distracted by all that pretend to flicker and sparkle.

name: Grand Couch (Legacy)
effect: Effects can't damage Grand Couch. Cast only if you control two Chairs. Whenever you cast a Chair-related fighter: Deal 1000 damage to it. Cards you cast cost one neutral icon less to cast this turn.
bio: The Slumbering.

name: Graalgamer
effect: Once each turn, Whenever an enemy fighter dies: Unlock this card.
bio: [[Javion]]'s economy is entirely tourists flocking towards [[The Lunar Spire|the Lunar Spire]]. The awesome beaches are an added bonus.

name: Graded
effect: When this card is cast: All other allied fighters in play and in your hand lose all triggered effects.
bio: A broken man’s final effort. All for nothing.

name: Grand Chicken Lord
effect:
When this card is cast: Search your deck for Infinite Chicken.  |  
Once each turn, whenever you cast an Infinite action: Remove 1RGBY from the cost of all Infinite cards in your hand.
bio: You PC bro? What's PC? Pre-clucked of course!

name: Grand Glaciem Mage
effect:
When this card is cast: Search your deck for Infinite Frost.  | 
Once each turn, whenever you cast an Infinite action: Remove 1RGBY from the cost of all Infinite cards in your hand.
bio: In Grand Wizard school, he was head to head with [[Grand Ignis Mage]] in the classroom... destruction.

name: Grand Ignis Mage
effect:
When this card is cast: Search your deck for Infinite Flames.  | 
Once each turn, whenever you cast an Infinite action: Remove 1RGBY from the cost of all Infinite cards in your hand.
bio: Grand Ignis Mage is actually a really nice guy if you don't make him burn your flesh off.

name: Grand Ivory
effect: A target allied fighter gains 100 Health and Power. | Transform it into into a Immortal Wielder with the effect: | Whenever you draw a card, if it's the third one since your last end step: Unlock this fighter.
bio: Valor. Integrity. Justice.

name: Grand Vitality Totem
effect:
When this card is cast: Search your deck for Infinite Wishes.  | 
Once each turn, whenever you cast an Infinite action: Remove 1RGBY from the cost of all Infinite cards in your hand.
bio: A forgotten religious heirloom, still filled with potent life-energy. Once worshiped by [[Meeboid (Archetype)|peace-loving, dark creatures]]. It's not certain why these creatures stopped worshipping the Totem...

name: Gravity Coil
effect: Return a target fighter to the hand.
bio: War drives innovation; [[The Federation (Group)|The Federation]] create wars solely to drive progress.

name: Grave Scavenger
effect:
0 Cogs.  | 
Whenever you cast a Colourless Card: This card finds a cog.  | 
During your endstep: This card loses a cog. You gain 1C.  | 
These abilities also trigger in the graveyard.
bio: "Make the best of it even when you're out."

name: Grand Pirate King
effect: Inert in play. When this card is cast: Give yourself Infinite Cannonballs.
bio: The reason he's the king is because his name sounds the coolest.

name: Gravity Inspector
effect: Once each turn, whenever you cast a Police fighter: Unlock that fighter and a target allied fighter, then lock them for 1 turn.
bio: To inspect gravity. To cause the fall.

name: Great Beastbreaker
effect: This card is immune to damage card effects. Cast this card ignoring its Colourless cost if there are no Yellow cards in your Baseplate. | Whenever you cast another fighter, deal 4000 damage to that fighter and deal 300 damage to a target fighter.
bio: "Freedom is coming, to all beasts that bend their will."

name: Great Pal Bigwig
effect: Once each turn, whenever you discard a card: Your opponent draws a fleeting card.
bio: "I'm not Bigwig! I'm the opposite of big!"

name: Great Lord Egotist
effect: This card is immune to transformation card effects. During your end step: Give your opponent a Night Fright. This card gains 300 health.
bio: Once, I was human. Now, I am much more.

name: Great Justice City
effect:
Whenever an allied fighter dies: Move all gear from it onto this card.  | 
Whenever you cast an allied fighter, if there's 6 gear on this card: Move all of them onto that fighter, then destroy this card.
bio: A wonderous playground for heroes to play out their fantasies.

name: Greenbelt Gharial
effect: When this card destroys a fighter: Give yourself a Necroenzyme Vial.
bio: nom!

name: GreenHearted
effect: Whenever this card destroys another: Give yourself a random rare card.
bio: Why does he have a green heart you ask? Serious medical condition.

name: Greenbelt Patrolbot
effect: Whenever a card leaves your graveyard: This card gains 100 Health.
bio: Made to electrocute poachers and bellyrub cute animals!

name: Greenbelt Surveyor
effect: During your end step: The top card of your graveyard generates.
bio: With the trusty Land-Marker! Much more reliable than a Magic-Marker.

name: Grey, Mending the Lost
effect: Gladiator. After this card attacks: Deal 500 damage to a target allied fighter, then summon two 100/200 Lucid Catgirls and all allied fighters gain 100 power. Then if you're in Bliss, all allied fighters gain 500 Power instead.
bio: [[Bloxburg Messiah Hospital]] was going to lose a doctor. There was nothing she could do about it.

name: Grimclaw The Sacred
effect:
During your end step, if this card's in your Graveyard and your opponent controls exactly four fighters: Recur this card, then you gain a Green stud and a Blue stud. 
Whenever this card attacks: Obliterate your opponent's deck.
bio: A [[Grimclaw The Unholy|dragon of pure destruction]] brought back by [[Necroenzyme Vial|profane creation]]. [[Greygnarl]] did not succeed.

name: Grey Goo Scenario
effect: Cast only if there are two morphic cards in your Baseplate. All non-Goo-related fighters lose 800 power. Summon four Morphic Goos.
bio: [[Eisenhower, the Alchemist|Eisenhower]] feared the worst out of his experiments.

name: Greygnarl
effect: When this card is cast: All allied Acolytes gain 300 health and power.
bio: Greygnarl is the only dragon with the ability to match up against [[Grimclaw The Unholy|his brother]].

name: Grimclaw's Moonbeam
effect: A target fighter loses 400 Power. Then obliterate it if there's exactly one colour in its stud cost. (Colourless isn't a colour and is ignored.)
bio: Grimclaw sneered at the charred catgirls. '''"These 'PLURRAL' remind me of my brother's sycophant supporters back in the day."''' "Why's that, ken like?" '''"Their only value in this world is the nice popping noise they make when they die."'''

name: Grimclaw The Unholy
effect: Overload. Cast only if there's exactly 4 enemy figthers.. ([https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sic sic])
bio: A dragon of pure destruction, only to be stopped by [[Greygnarl]].

name: Grinning Goliath
effect: When this card is cast: Ransack 3 nonfighter cards. If you do, destroy the opponent's terrain and the oldest card in their hand.
bio: The Smilies make great gym buddies. Just don't mock the masks.

name: Growling Guardian
effect: During your end step, if there's two or fewer cards in your graveyard: Summon a Colourless 200/200 Citizen with no abilities.
bio: "Feel weird 'bout protecting outsiders. But whatever [[Kingrin, Surrounded by Familey|Big K]] does is for the Familey's good!"

name: Grin Reaper
effect: When this card is cast or after it attacks: Ransack 4. If you don't, destroy this card. During your end step, if this card is the only one in your graveyard: Recur it.
bio: "Everyone who died in this little war is not worth living and should be forgotten, only those who survive are allowed to know the truth about my goals for this world."

name: Guardia Bladesmith
effect: During your end step: You gain a Blue stud.
bio: Personally, he prefers making shields.

name: Guardia Custodian
effect: During your end step: You gain a Red stud.
bio: Home isn't where you rest. It's what you believe in.

name: Guardia Angel
effect: During your end step: You gain a Yellow stud.
bio: Heaven is just jail for the kind.

name: Guardia Fallen
effect: During your end step: You gain a Green stud.
bio: After The Fall, the remains of Guardia splintered into smaller kingdoms, exiled to the dark forests of the Western Wilds.

name: Guardia Knight
effect: During your end step: You gain a yellow stud.
bio: Stop! You have violated the law! Pay the court a fine or serve your sentence! Your stolen goods are now forfeit.

name: Growth Technician
effect: During your end step: Give yourself a Colourless card and a Green card, except they're fleeting and inert when discarded.
bio: The engineers and antibodies of the Cosmic Scab are not good or bad; They simply exist, living and growing like the rest of us.

name: Guardia Seeress
effect: During your end step: Gain a Blue stud.
bio: Blessed with the power of foresight, cursed with the knowledge it entails.

name: Guest
effect: Twice each turn, whenever you discard a card: You lose 150 Life.
bio: Wanna be Friends?

name: Grieving World
effect: When you cast your first fighter each turn: set its stats to 1000/1000.
bio: Bloxburg's residents, Zanzel's phantoms, Eisenhower's experiments and Hallow's workers shared the same thought upon the [[Alpha Brick's Destruction|Brick's destruction]] - Horror.

name: Guns N' Ammo Shopkeep
effect: Whenever an effect gives you a card: This card gains 50 health. | Whenever you cast a smuggled card: All allied Bargetown fighters gain 150 power.
bio: "I just sell guns. But I suppose I could rent out or even lend a few for the cause…"

name: Guardian Of Soul
effect: When this card is suspended: It gains 200 Health and Power.
bio: Even if [[Ptenda the Unconquerable|Ptenda's]] body had dissipated in the [[Nibblex the Starkiller|Planet Devourer's]] onslaught, his will to protect his descendants would not.

name: Guest 666
effect: During your end step, if you have 666 or less life: Your opponent loses 666 life, set your life to 666 and summon a Corrupt Guest.
bio: Can you guess why [[Lycanthrope (Group)|wolves]] built heaven?

name: Gurt
effect: When this card is cast, if you've ever cast a fighter onto a full board this game: Draw two cards.
bio: His benevolence knows no bounds.

name: Guston, Jury of Winds
effect: Gladiator. When this card is cast: Choose a target fighter. Each player shuffles all cards in their graveyard that shares a colour with that card into their deck.
bio: The destruction of time brought forth an old era of the Pits, before the demons had taken it for their own explotation.

name: Gusmanak
effect: Whenever this card attacks and destroys another: Reset its stats.
bio: Time to blox zombies and eat [[Tom's Beans|beans from a can]]!

name: H3LP3R
effect: Twice each turn, whenever you cast a rare fighter: Draw a card.
bio: EDUCATE YOURSELF.

name: Haggie125
effect: Cast only if you control at least 2 rare fighters. When this card dies: Draw two cards.
bio: Give me money...NOW!

name: Hack The Failsafe
effect:
Fading. Choose one:
-All fighters become Zombified.
 | -All fighters lose Zombified and Fading.
bio: Bloxburg and the Astral Faith found their final conflict within the [[Polluted Vitality Wellspring|Wellspring's]] [[Jestorder's Failsafe|underground basin]]. There, the fate of the mortal and immortal would be decided.

name: Hadean Mudfall
effect: Zombified. | When this card is cast: Attach 6 Dreamshields to it.
bio: The [[Stairway to Heaven]] wasn't imagined to handle amorphous clay; What was supposed to be reincarnation instead became a landslide of cancer.

name: Hal
effect: During your end step: All allied fighters gain 100 power.
bio: Syndicate member and bartender. Don't ask him about his kids.

name: Hallow Sinister, Patriarch
effect: This card is immune to returning card effects. Cast this card using four yellow and four red studs if you have 2 or more Pacts of Condemnations in your baseplate. During your end step, if your opponent has 13 or more Colourless studs: Return all allied fighters to your hand, then summon each other member of the Sinister family. This effect only triggers once.
bio:
I would do anything for my family. Sadly, [[Kalman Sinister|Kalman]] wants your soul. He's been into lamp-making lately, and what dad wouldn't support his boys? Or girls. [[Claudia Sinister|Claudia]]'s a hassle. Did I tell you about that time she took a bath in...//
"I was not kidding when I said that I would do anything for my family, dear. Prepare yourselves!"

name: Hallow's Accountant
effect: The first time an effect draws you a card on your turns, put a Pumpkin Bomb into your hand.
bio: Everyone must pay the fun tax. Even [[Beseech the Mastermind|abominations from space]].

name: Hallow's Extraction
effect: All fighters lose 200 power. Transform them into Fundebted fighters. Give yourself Hallow's Wealth.
bio: "If you are not paying for it, you're not the customer; you're the product." -[[Lord Umberhallow]]

name: Hallow's Bargain
effect: All players summon a random fighter.
bio: He drives a hard bargain, but only on Friday.

name: Hallow's Knight
effect: When this card is first cast or when it dies: Summon a 300/300 Survivor. Each fighter generates.
bio: When the survivors from [[Bloxburg in Ruins|Bloxburg]] poured into [[Castle Shambeth|Shambeth]], [[Hallow Sinister, Patriarch|Hallow]] wanted nothing to do with them. [[Kalman Sinister|Kalman]], ever the bleeding heart, was all that was needed to change his mind.

name: Hallow's Adjudicator
effect: When this card is first cast or when it dies: Each player gains three Colourless studs.
bio: "Your vibes, [[Lua, Paraselene Evincar|Lua]]. Hand them over."

name: Hallow's Boon
effect: When this card is cast: All allied fighters gain 100 Health and Power. | When this card dies: Allied fighters lose 100 Health and Power.
bio: [[Hallow Sinister, Patriarch|Hallow]] regrets having anything to do with him.

name: Hallow's Enforcer
effect: When this card is cast or when it dies: deal 100 damage to all non-Vibesharks. All allied Vibesharks gain 100 power.
bio: The Vibesharks always collect on their debt. Their debt being a good time.

name: Hallow's Eradicator
effect: When this card is first cast or when it dies: Each player destroys the oldest card from their hand, then draws a card.
bio: [[Hallow Sinister, Patriarch|Hallow]] wishes to give all his [[Sinister (Archetype)|children]] all the fun in the entire world. What responsible parent wouldn't?

name: Hallow, Extortionist of Fun
effect: During your end step: Replace all cards in your hand with Yellow cards that cost equal to or more total Yellow and Colourless studs than that card.
bio: I have seen the future. This Thursday does not include you, [[Beseech the Mastermind|Ghashendex]].

name: Hallow's Treasurer
effect: Stealth. Fading. | Whenever you cast an allied Vibeshark, or an allied Vibeshark dies: Summon an 100/100 copy of it. Deal 150 damage to this card.
bio: Credits to the slicksters of a certain resort for their lessons in slickery.

name: Hallowed Reliquary
effect: When this card is cast: It gains 250 Power for each fighter your opponent controls.
bio: Even in death, [[Shedletsky, the Fried One|the Savior]] oversees his people through his watchful eyes.

name: Hallow's Treats
effect: Destroy all fighters with 350 or less health. You can't attack fighters or cast anything this turn.
bio: Not for the faint of wallet.

name: Halogenic Sprayer
effect: Thrice each turn, whenever you discard a card: Seance a card in your graveyard that costs 1 or fewer total studs.
bio: "[[Apollo Scott, Visionary|Apollo]] must be an idiot if he thinks this can't be abused. You could zombify entire crowds at once with this." -[[McKayla, Bane of Hierarchy|McKayla Newman]]

name: Halo4master233
effect: Haste. When this finishes attacking: Lock a target fighter for 1 turn.
bio: Heads up!

name: Hamstermon
effect: When this card is cast: Enemy fighters lose 100 power.
bio: It's time to add some color to this battlefield!

name: Harken
effect: When this card is cast: Draw a card, then obliterate a target allied fighter and put it on top of your deck. | During your end step: Reveal the top card of each deck. If your opponent's card costs more or equal studs to yours, this card gains 880 Power until the next end step.

name: Happy Clown
effect: Haste. Whenever this card attacks and destroys another: Give each player two random cards. You gain a Yellow stud.
bio: [[Hallow, the Sugarlord|Hallow]] always loved a jester.

name: Hard-hat Immortal
effect: When you cast your third action this turn, if this card has died this game: Recur this card.
bio: Safety is unimportant when you're immortal.

name: Hard Cheese
effect:
Attach to a target fighter.  | 
Whenever this fighter attacks another fighter: This fighter loses all power until your next end step. If this fighter survives that attack: It deals the power it lost as damage, divided evenly among all enemy fighters.
bio: Originally used on [[Rorvik Atoll]] to mine multiple ores at once. Your fighters have found... other uses... for it.

name: Harrison Powell
effect:
When this card is cast, if you've obliterated a card this turn: Unlock it.
Whenever this attacks: Ransack 5. If you do, summon a Colourless 200/200 Citizen with no abilities. All allied fighters gain 100 Health and Power.
bio: "This city is my family."

name: Hampunk Mecha
effect: When this card is first cast: It locks itself for 4 turns, then loses a lock for each fighter your opponent controls. Whenever this card attacks: It gains 500 power.
bio: This machine runs on pure pig. Don't ask how.

name: Harrison's Studio
effect:
When this card is cast: Deal 600 damage to a target enemy fighter and note its name.
At the start of your turns: Ransack 1. If you do, your opponent summons all cards with the noted name in their graveyard as 50/50 fighters.
bio: Kingrin is a humble yet passionate artist, with terror as his medium and gore as his paint.

name: Harrowing Rejection
effect: If you're in Bliss, cast this card ignoring its colourless cost. | Look at your graveyard and choose two cards in it, each with total stud cost 4 or less. Summon those cards and unlock them. Obliterate them during your next end step.
bio: "I-I revived your daughter! I cured her arterial thrombosis! I know it took a decade, but better late than n-never, right? Why do you hate me? '''WHY DO YOU HATE ME!?'''"

name: HatdaCat
effect: Once each turn, whenever your opponent discards a card: This card gains 100 Health and Power.
bio: The cops of the frozen north have their own culture.

name: Harvest Creativity
effect: Fading. Save the boardstate. Give yourself a card that loads that boardstate.
bio: [[Telamon|Ｔｈｅ Ｃｒｕｅｌ Ｇｏｄ]] ｃｈａｉｎｅｄ ｈｉｓ [[Technician (Group)|ｆａｖｏｕｒｉｔｅ ｐｅｏｐｌｅ，]] ａｎｄ ｇａｖｅ ｆｒｅｅ ｗｉｌｌ ｔｏ ｔｈｅ [[Species (Lore)#Noobs|rats．]]Ｔｈｅ Ｃｒｕｅｌ Ｇｏｄ ｃｏｅｒｃｅｄ ｔｈｅ ｆｒｅｅ ｒａｔｓ ｔｏ ｗｏｒｓｈｉｐ ｈｉｍ ａｎｙｗａｙ， ｙｅｔ ｇａｖｅ ｉｍｍｏｒｔａｌｉｔｙ ｔｏ ｔｈｅ jellyfish．

name: HashtagWatermelon
effect: Haste. Whenever you lose life: Unlock this card.
bio: Nom.

name: Haunted Mansion
effect: At the start of your turns: All fighters lose 50 power, then destroy all enemy fighters with 0 power.
bio: It'll grind your sanity into [[Dust|dust]].

name: Haunted Korblox Armor (Legacy)
effect: When this card is targeted, transform this card into a Korblox Archmage, then unlock all Korblox. Fading.
bio: The Korblox would have been a great asset, had they not earlier tried to destroy all of [[Eisenhower, the Alchemist|Eisenhower]]'s stitchers.

name: HatHelper
effect: When this card is cast: Deal 200 damage to all Colored fighters.
bio: The late ROBLOXian who helped with free models such as hat helper scripts and his notable strategy game.

name: Haunted Doge Head (Legacy)
effect: When this card is targeted, transform this card into four doges, and ready them. Fading.
bio: Doge heads aren't good enough armour against [[Hallow, the Sugarlord|hallow]]'s manipulation.

name: Haunted Overseer Armor (Legacy)
effect: When this card is targeted, give all fighters 150 Health and Power, give all Overseers an additional 150 Health and Power, and transform this card into an Eye of Overseer. Fading.
bio: [[Priestess Zanzel, the Promised One|Zanzel]] spited the Overseers. Their name was a lie in itself. Only Zanzel knew everything.

name: Haunted Redcliff Armor (Legacy)
effect: When this card is targeted, transform this card into a Redcliff Elite Commander, then give all Redcliff  200 health and power. Fading.
bio: The soul of the commander Phyrrus resides in this armor, taken by [[Priestess Zanzel, the Promised One|Zanzel]]'s might.

name: Havemeat
effect: Whenever an effect gives you your first card each turn: This card gains 200 power.
bio: Best known for his Havemeat Minigames and WordFall.

name: Havaluvian Immigrant
effect: When this card is cast: Give youeself three choices - [sic]  |  - Draw three cards, then shuffle the oldest card in your hand into your deck.  |  - Summon a 250/250 Fighter with Defender.  |  - Unlock a target fighter and deal 150 damage to it.
bio: With their old planet destroyed, the remaining Havaluvians sought for their next method of pursuing decadence.

name: HauntedUSA
effect: Continued. | Whenever an allied fighter dies: This card gains 100 Power.
bio: The grandfather of the horror genre. Without him, we likely wouldn't have many of our well-known horror games on the platform.

name: Have a Seat! (Legacy)
effect: Cast only if you control a Chair. Summon a random common Chair and deal 150 damage to a target fighter.
bio: You need to start chair racing somehow!

name: Haz3mn
effect: Once each turn, whenever an effect draws a player a card: Seek Shinies.
bio: "Splash the pot with some gold, my friend!"

name: Havalu
effect:
When this card is cast: Give yourself a Medic Kit.
During your end step, if you've gained 600 or more life this turn: Give yourself a Moonleak and you gain a colourless stud.
bio: N/A

name: Hazenwyld, Dying Sanctum
effect: When this card is cast: Search your deck for "Umwelt Shift". During your end step, if you control a fighter and it's Soulmate: Draw a card.
bio: [[Vagabonds (Group)|They]] wander forth, searching for a new home.

name: Haydebug2003
effect: Haste. Overload. | Whenever this card attacks: This card gains 300 Power.
bio: Just floating around...

name: Hatestand
effect: Once each turn, whenever you cast an Infurnished fighter: Put a Hellish Infurniture into your Baseplate.
bio: Go on. Wear us.

name: Heartwood Defender
effect:
When this card is cast: Search your deck for 'The World of Wood.'
Once each turn, whenever you cast a World Of Wood Terrain: This card deals 300 damage to a target fighter.
bio: This tree has been infested by the [[Anthrested Tree|futuristic filth]]. Chopping down an ancient legacy is necessary to preserve the World of Wood.

name: Heated Debate
effect:
If you have 3 or more blessings, search your deck for 2 Green cards.  | 
Put an Eldritch Blessing on a card in your hand.
bio:
There are many Javionese who consider [[Yueliang, World Calmer|Yuéliáng's]] compassion as a sign of cowardice -- choosing to pick less extreme options out of fear of backlash or worse. In truth, she believed in the pursuit of mediation and understanding. The Paraselenes needed to adapt with the changing world, lest be left behind in the pages of old. A lack of integrity and allies could not be fixed with their lunar magic without breaking their oaths.
A belief she held onto passionately. A belief that the energy within the fallen satellite planted its [[Hou Yi, World's Fury|festering emotions]] into.

name: Hazing Ritual
effect: Deal 400 damage to a target fighter. Ransack 4. | If you do, give yourself 2 Nascent Studs.
bio: Anyone can join the Familey on one simple condition: Impress the boss with your brutality.

name: Hedonist Acolyte
effect: When this card is cast: Summon a clone of it, except it's Yellow.
bio: I'M DIRTY RICH AND DIRTY HAPPY AHAHAHAH!!!!

name: Heights Expedition Site
effect:
During your end step, if you control a Bioblader: Draw a card from your Immortal Sword Deck.
Whenever you cast an Immortal Sword: Summon a 100/300 Bioblade Digger.
bio: The Heights had fallen. The swords - disappeared. Perhaps this'll be a '''galactic''' chance to make great archaeological discoveries!

name: HeavenLogin
effect: When HeavenLogin is cast, target a fighter. HeavenLogin joins that fighter's Group.
bio: Compared to modern roblox, the crimes of this copycat ain't much.

name: Hellish Infurniture
effect: Inert in Baseplate. If you have five Infurnished cards in your Baseplate, this card has Haste. Whenever you cast a Yellow fighter: All Infurnished cards in your Baseplate gain 50 power. Put this card into your Baseplate.
bio: how can you be so sure theres no infurnished among us?

name: Helliura
effect: During your end step, if this card's in your hand and costs fewer than 10 total studs: Add 1G to its cost. It gains 50 health and power for each Green in its cost. When this card is cast: Your opponent loses life equal to half of this card's Power and you gain that much life.
bio:
"I have readied myself for ten-thousand years for this moment, you are NOT prepared.
ソウルディープ
soul deep"

name: Helperbot
effect: During your end step: All allied rare fighters gain 100 power.
bio: Hello there robloxian, what do you need help with?

name: Helliura, Life Lost
effect:
Overload. Effects can't target this card.
During your end step, if this card's not in play: Its Red cost becomes your total life divided by 100.
bio: To those who have everything more will be given. To those who have nothing everything will be taken.

name: Hermeien Sandalwood
effect: This card is immune to damage card effects. | Rageborne. |  Whenever you enter Rage, Or this card is cast while raging: Deal 4000 damage to all fighters.
bio:
''"Voices of spirits deafened,
the souls of many engulfed.
An anguish held within,
a purpose still kept in."''

name: Heroic Survivor
effect: When this card is cast: Deal 100 damage to a target fighter. Then if there's four or more allied Survivors: Search your deck for each copy of Search the City.
bio: "Hope shines the brightest in these dark times."

name: Her0z
effect: When this card is cast: Summon a card that's a clone of a target allied fighter. Lock it for one turn.
bio: Mummy of Front Page Games in the past.

name: Headless Horseman
effect: When this card is cast, if you have 2000 or less life: Deal 450 damage to a target fighter.
bio: "Wandering around the [[Bloxburg_in_Ruins|Ruins of Bloxburg]] for victims, they truly are enigmatic specimens. Try not to alert these fiends." - [[David Crissbach]]

name: Hexocus
effect: Haste. Liberate. Whenever you cast another allied fighter with Liberate and Fading: it can't be countered.
bio: "I did this one time."

name: Herrus, Elder Thought Demon
effect: Gladiator. Whenever you gain life: Give yourself two 300/300 Thoughtlings.
bio: Herrus, the last of his kind, loathes his fate. Fundebted to [[Lord Umberhallow|Hallow]], he is forced to partake in the [[Pits of the Umberlords (Card)|games]]. Extremely intelligent and highly manipulative.

name: HeyItsColin
effect: Whenever you lose life, if you've lost less than 1000 life since your last end step: Your opponent loses 200 life. Draw a card.
bio: Or is it?

name: Hickteck
effect: When this card is cast, if there's 2 or more colours among cards in your baseplate: Each player draws a card. Give each player 2 '$GYRO'. | Once ever, when '$GYRO' is cast: This card gains haste. Return it to its hand.
bio: "Kids are competing to steal ‘[[Mitch Mangoton|Brainrot]]’ NFTs in the GyroVerse. Here’s what this means for crypto prices:"

name: His Masterpiece
effect: When this card is cast: Draw 2 cards and shuffle the stats of all fighters. For the rest of the game, the subject is interpolated into a postdeconstructivist capitalism that includes art as a reality.
bio: N/A

name: Hijack
effect: Summon a 500/500 copy of a target enemy fighter. Trigger its effects as though it was cast.
bio: "Share and share alike!"

name: Hideaki
effect: When this card is cast, if you control another Rare fighter: A target fighter gains Defender.
bio: Hideaki is the master of disguise, you probably didn't even know this card existed until now!

name: Histor, Seeker of Wisdom
effect: Overload. Whenever you take fatigue damage: Your opponent loses that much life. You gain 300 life.
bio: Nothing of her former self remains. She is a husk, only driven by a desire to learn.

name: Hip-Star Hellish Guitar
effect: Encore. Summon a 600/0 Guitar with Overload. It gains 100 Power whenever you cast an action.
bio: Left unchecked, a little sound can grow into a fully fledged performance.

name: Hodif
effect: When this card is cast: Each player loses 250 life.
bio: Powerful fighter with his MLG-certified meal to keep him ready for more foes.

name: Histor
effect: Whenever you lose life: Summon a 400/150 Noob that's inert in play.
bio: Historically, you're a scrub.

name: Hive Terminal
effect: During your end step, if the top card of your graveyard is Green: Recur the top card of your graveyard. It gains Fading. | Otherwise, this card gains 300 Health and Power.
bio: Despite the distances between some of them, members of the Arkhive are so tightly connected.

name: HolyGuacamole
effect: When this card attacks: Select a fighter card in your hand that costs 6 or fewer total studs. Set its stats to 200/200 and its cost to WBY.
bio: Even flow, thoughts arrive like butterflies!

name: Holy Cultist
effect: When this card is cast, if you have 2000 or fewer Life: It gains 600 health. Put a copy of it into your Baseplate.
bio: Oh [[Noli, Heaven Seeker|Heavenly Father]]! Guide us to your beautiful light! Bring us salvation and bestow your refuge upon our sinner hearts!

name: Homeless Man (Legacy)
effect: Cast only if you control a Lycanthrope. Haste. Whenever you cast an action, transform this card. Fading.
bio: 'ey boys, the moon's risin'. All the better to watch 'im beg for mercy!

name: Homermafia1
effect: Whenever this attacks and destroys a fighter: Summon a 300/300 Rebel that's inert in all zones.Whenever an allied fighter dies: Your opponent loses 200 life.
bio: What are otherworldly beings and highly skilled killers going to do against a heavy heaping of bullets? Nothing, that's what.

name: Homemade_Meal
effect: Whenever you discard your second card each turn, if it's blue or yellow: You gain a Nascent Stud, except it's fleeting.
bio: Aperture? Never heard'a her.

name: HomingBeacon
effect: When this card is cast, if you've ever had a full board this game: Steal a target enemy fighter.
bio: It's all fun and games until the beacon goes homing.. or the homing goes beacon?

name: Honeystorm!
effect: If you control eight Bees, cast this card for free. All allied Bees gain 300 health and power.
bio: You think it is all over? No, it has only just beegun.

name: Hoote
effect: When this card is cast: You gain 800 life.
bio: The paper bag hides his identity, even though you can just read the name of the card.

name: Honey Bee
effect: When this card is cast, if you control another Bee: Give yourself a Bee card.
bio: A satisfied bee always full with the finest honey. If you're lucky it will share some.

name: Hoosierdaddy22
effect: Whenever you cast an Epic fighter: Give yourself a Red Legendary card.
bio: It's all about them.

name: Hope for Mending
effect: Whenever an effect you control searches a card from your deck: Search your deck for a copy of that card.
bio: The four listened to the diety's plan in restoring the Alpha Brick. Zanzel decided to right her wrongs. Eclipse went forth to save his kind. Eisenhower became adamant to help those who were suffering. Hallow saw an business opportunity.

name: Horde of Editors
effect: Whenever you cast a gear: Attach a copy of it to this card. Then draw a fleeting card if there's an allied fighter with 1000 or more Power.
bio: [[The Tainted]]'s zeal against the Doomspire was infectious; A common cause caused common friends.

name: Hop Lee
effect: Whenever you cast a fighter, if there are less than two colourless studs amongst the cost of fighter you control: Summon a clone of this card with no effect.
bio: You're not hopping to the task fast enough.

name: Hoshpup
effect: Overload.
bio: We will never know what he certainly is.

name: Horse Breeder (Legacy)
effect: Whenever you cast an action, transform this card, then summon a 200/200 Weremare. Fading.
bio: I love my horses. This one won a race, and this one won a dressage contest!

name: Host Farm of Svakarataja
effect:
While in play, allied token fighters can't attack or counterattack.
At the start of your turns: You lose 750 life. Summon a 300/500 Tender Servant that's inert in play.
Whenever an allied token fighter dies: You gain 500 life. If it's a Tender Servant and it's your turn, draw a card.
bio: Fully confident in their morality, the Hex allow all to inspect their host farms for signs of abuse or suffering.

name: Hospital Attendant
effect: Twice each turn, whenever an effect gives this card health: Recur an allied card with total stats 500 or less, except it gains Fading.
bio: Some people couldn't leave town, unable to willingly part with their sickened loved ones.

name: Hou Yi, World's Fury
effect: Rageborne. |  When this card is cast: Search all of your zones for Yueliang, World Calmer and put her into play. | Whenever you cast an action: This card Deals 200 damage to a target fighter
bio: The coming of our kind could only end in two ways: Our domination, or our eviction. [[Lunar Silencing|She chose]] the latter.

name: Humorous
effect: This card has haste if you control another Colourless fighter. Whenever this card destroys another: A target allied fighter gains 200 health. If it's Colourless, it gains 200 Power.
bio: "It's... it's not that funny tho not gonna lie"

name: How_inconvenient
effect: Whenever your opponent targets a card: deal 200 damage to all enemy fighters.
bio: This effect is really inconvenient.

name: Hunt the Godbeast
effect: Summon an 800/400 Godbeast Whelp with Haste. Deal 100 Damage to all fighters.
bio: "Godbeasts are theoretically impossible to exist in our material plane. Tonight we hunt one, dear." [[Hallow Sinister, Patriarch|Hallow]], to [[Terry Sinister|Terry]]

name: HungryBloxBoy
effect: During combat, this card deals double its power in damage to fighters and players.
bio: Hungry for some justice.

name: Hunting Party
effect: When this card is cast: Mark all enemy fighters. Then if you're in Bliss, deal 50 damage to all enemy fighters. They lose 50 Power.
bio: "OwO! We bwetter find that [[Caitlin Nixon, Hunted|robo-lady]]<nowiki/> and twear her apawt, nya!~♪"

name: Hyliehaven - Black Nihilism
effect:
Inert in all zones. | This card costs W less for each blessing in your hand.
Once each turn, whenever you use up a blessing: You gain WRGBY. Put a Doomed Blessing on a card in your hand.
bio: Forget about using a Blessing. '''Let's show this world the power of a Curse.'''

name: HuntarioRBLX
effect: Haste. When this card attacks: It gains 200 Power.
bio: An eye for an eye. A feather for a... Wait, humans don't have feathers. That analogy just went nowhere...

name: Hyliehaven - Blue Logic
effect:
When this card is cast: Put a Humble Blessing on a card in your hand. | 
When this card dies, if you control a locked fighter: You gain 1C 1R 1G 1Y.
bio:
After losing her fight to Guren and letting him escape, she was requested to accompany the seafront commander, Xastien. "I know ya got something in ya that makes you strong but you ain't gonna let it out if your minds all jumbled up y'know?" Much to her chagrin, she knew he was right.
If she wanted clarity, she would need to let go of what once was.

name: Hyliehaven - Red Dominance
effect: Whenever this card is cast, or once each turn, whenever you discard a card: put a Horrific Blessing onto a card space in your hand. |  When this card dies, if you have 3 or more blessings: you gain 1C 1G 1B 1Y.
bio:
"You're weak, Hylie. I could never change the world with your pathetic power."
She couldn't believe that Guren, someone who she shared many fond memories with would be so cruel.
Her soul felt like a pool of boiling lava...
And for the first time in a long time, she let it out.

name: Hyliehaven - Master of Blessings
effect:
This card is immune to destruction card effects.  | This card has haste if there's 4 or more blessings in your hand.  | 
Whenever this card attacks: If there's 2 or more blessings in your hand, remove 2 of them and destroy a target enemy fighter. Otherwise put a Virtuous blessing on a card in your hand.
bio:
After being acknowledged by Grandmaster Tilington for her unmatched proficiency in weaving Blessings, she was given the title of "Master". Hyliehaven was one step closer to finally reaching her biggest inspiration.

[[Iris, Master of Studs|The Master of Studs]].

name: Hyliehaven - Yellow Revel
effect: When this card is cast, or once per turn whenever an effect targets this card: Put an Exuberant Blessing on a card in your hand. |  During your end step, if there's R,G and B in the stud costs of allied fighters: You gain 1C 1R 1G 1B.
bio:
Ever since her trip to the seafront, she felt lighter. Her mind no longer felt shrouded by doubt, anxiety and pain. She began to dream about the joyous times she had and what were to come. It almost felt childlike. In fact, she was childlike! She couldn't explain it! She couldn't contain it! She couldn't help but scream and shout!
This freedom she felt, it was exhilarating! Such bliss.

name: Hyper Max Dai Henshin Shin Goldfish Kiwami V-MAX
effect: Overload. Whenever an allied fighter attacks, destroys, and deals excess damage to an enemy fighter: This card gains Power equal to the excess damage.

display_name: Hyper Max Dai Henshin Shin Goldfish Kiwami V-MAX

name: Hyliehaven - Green Vitality
effect: Once each turn, whenever you gain life: Put a Bounteous Blessing on a card in your hand. During your end step, if your baseplate rank is 8 or higher: You gain 1C 1R 1B 1Y.
bio:
Although she gained many skills and talents, she still felt like something was missing. She reached into her past, the past when Guren was still around. Her chest felt tight yet warm; She hadn't realised just how much she cared about him.
This affirmation gave her tranquility, it gave her life.

Become a Grandmaster of Studs!

bio: "You finally got a morpher mask and yet you still look sad. Why are you upset? You can truly become like me!" With a long pause, Julez answered. "Well you mean why do WE look sad. The answer to that is that I'm not sad, I'm just still disappointed." He stared into the mask. "It's just that perfection never looked so ugly."

When this card is cast: Put a Rare Loot Pile at the bottom of your deck.
Once each turn, after your deck advances, if its top card is advanceable: Draw a card.
bio: Despite the appealing theming, most areas are the same few enemies and weapons, just with different stats.

name: Newman's Advocate
effect: When this card is cast: All cards in play and in your hand lose Fading.
bio: "If you wanna keep that beard, start talking, [[Biggs, Liquidated|Bigshot]]."

name: NewFissy
effect: When this card is cast: A target fighter gains 1000 Health. Set its power to 0.
bio: Hi, I'm the scripter of [[ROBLOX|Roblox]] Plague, TreeLands, and Adopt M-HEY! Stop it, that tickles!

name: New Hazenwyld
effect: Whenever an action is cast: Your opponent loses 200 life.
bio: After [[It that was Silenced|Eclipse]] was [[Lunar Banishment|banished]], the [[Lycanthrope (Group)|Lycanthropes']] home was left unguarded.

name: News Reporter
effect: Whenever you cast a coloured Epic or Legendary fighter: Put a copy of it into your baseplate.
bio: Now ain't that legendary? I'd say it's pretty epic!

name: Nexus
effect: At the start of your turns: You may select an allied fighter and return it to your hand. | Whenever an allied fighter is returned to your hand: It gains 50 health and power.
bio: The start of your adventure. Which path will you take?

name: Newbie
effect: Whenever an effect draws you a card: This card gains 300 Power. | During your end step: Reset this card's stats.
bio: But alas, the [[Noob|common noob]] has been predated on ever since a new species of newb entered its flock. The common noob faces extinction from war and loss of habitat.

name: Nexx
effect: When this card is cast: Draw two cards.
bio: A web contractor and a card developer too!

name: Ni'Raya Sinz
effect: When this card is cast: Put a Vengeful Blessing on the 6th, 7th, 8th, 9th, and 10th card space of your opponent's hand.
bio: From the [[Solar Conquest|conquest]] that shook the [[Chart the Vecross System|Vecross System]], to the mass [[Apocrypha (Group)|ghostification]] wrought by a [[Zanzel's Visions|girl blinded by perfection]], despair seeped into every corner. Every crisis left their scars. Amid the ruins, a new root emerged; fractured and undeveloped, yet undeniably. [[Roots of Despair|It must end]].

name: Nibblex the Starkiller
effect: This card is immune to damage card effects. Whenever a fighter dies: This card gains 100 Health and Power. During your end step, if four or more allied fighters died since your last end step: This card deals 10000000 damage to all fighters.
bio: "If you were an ageless, cosmic force with insatiable hunger, how would you sate it? Would you not do as I do? Would you not at least pick justified meals?"

name: Nick Nebula
effect: Once per turn, Whenever you cast a non-red action: Recur a non-red action, except it's fading and inert in all zones.
bio: "Hasn't death itself been mankind's enemy since the very start?"

name: Nicolas1015
effect: This card is immune to powerloss, and destruction card effects. Stealth. Cast only if you control no fighters. Whenever you cast an allied fighter: This card gains half its health and power, then destroys that fighter.
bio: Probably richer than you.

name: Nicky Raum
effect: When this card is cast: Select a Colourless fighter in your baseplate and give yourself a copy of it. This card gains 50 health and power for each {W} you have.
bio:
I-I ain't just a mere asset, nor are my friends who brought me to where I am! Who the heck is this anyway? HELLO?!
With reliable thanks to: impatientSheep

name: Night Fright
effect: Can't be discarded. You lose 300 Life.
bio: Spooky.

name: Nightmare (Token)
effect: Can't be discarded. Each player draws a card. Destroy the card you drew if it's not cast this turn.
bio: It begins.

name: Nightmare Knights
effect: Once each turn, whenever you cast a fighter with total stats 500 or less: Attach Moonward to a target fighter. Draw a card if the target has total stats 1500 or more.
bio: Fluffle, sidestep to your left.

name: Nimblz
effect: When this card is cast: summon two inert 300/300 Egz.
bio: They certainly are.

name: NinWasTaken

Hi ying.
This card was designed by [[Flufflefunz]]

name: Nine Lives (Legacy)
effect: Summon three Kittens. Put three Kittens into your hand and deck, then ready all Kittens. They gain 200 health and power.
bio: It's time for the uprising to begin.

name: Ninja Ambush
effect: Return all allied Ninjas to their hand. Deal 300 damage to all fighters.
bio: They make for valuable moving target practice.

name: Ninja
effect: When this card is cast: Give yourself Grandmaster's Ninja Dojo.
bio: Ninjas actually wore a dark-blue, not pure black. This prevented moonlight from exposing them.

name: Nikilis
effect: Haste. When this card is cast: Deal 350 damage to a target fighter.
bio: He knows how to stop any potential murder. Great for the festival.

name: NinWas...
effect: Haste. | Whenever this card attacks: Attach a passive to all fighters. Gears attached this way are fading.
bio:
Who, Where, What am I?
With the special thanks to: NinWasTaken

name: Ninja Assailant
effect: When this card is cast: All allied Ninjas gain 100 Health.
bio: Ninjas very rarely killed people, as they were all mostly spies.

name: Nina Hellensoft
effect:
Gladiator.  | 
During your end step: Recur the top card of your graveyard. If it was Blue, Draw a card. Otherwise, gain 1000 life.
bio:
"Dealing with the deaths of the past is an archaeological gig.
Dealing with the death of a friend is harder."

name: Ninja Kitty (Legacy)
effect: Whenever an allied ninja dies, deal 50 damage to all non-ninjas.
bio: Ninjas used the dilation in the eyes of a cat to figure out the current time.

name: Ninja Trainee
effect: When this card is cast: Search your deck for a Ninja card.
bio: During Sengoku Jidai, Samurai were all completely backstabbers. The only truly loyal were ninjas.

name: Ninja Combatant

bio: In order to protect the secrets of ninjutsu, many families only passed down their knowledge to their children, if found worthy. Family members would begin teaching children certain skills at a young age by playing games.

name: NinjaBluz
effect: When this card is cast: Lock a target fighter for 1 turn. Gain a Red Titanic Stud.
bio: He's not an imaginary friend, but his codename is feared by operatives of a whole LEAGUE of sectors.

name: NintendoZACHERY
effect: When this card is cast, if effects have drawn you four cards since your last end step: unlock all allied fighters.
bio: I AM the speeding wall!

name: Noli's Domain
effect: Whenever a player discards their first card each turn: Until the next end step, skip all of that player's effects that trigger during their end step or when a fighter is cast.
bio: [[Priestess Zanzel, the Promised One|Zanzel]] squinted into the distance. Normally, such a [[Noli, Demon Seeker|demon]] would make her blood boil. Yet, now, she sighs. She knows [[Alpha Brick's Destruction|what happens]] when you try to restore the world.

name: NobleDragon
effect: Dextrous. Whenever this card attacks: Your opponent draws a card. Each fighter in their hand loses 100 power.
bio: I think it's time to take this game to the next level. Don't you?

name: Noob Gunner
effect: Whenever this card attacks: Summon a 400/50 Noob that's Inert in All Zones. Then summon a fighter card in your graveyard that costs 2 or fewer total studs, except it's Fading.
bio: "I shudder to think about those meeboids rats being fired out that cannon." -[[Dukran the Elysian]]

name: Noob
effect: Inert. (It can't generate studs.)
bio: And here we see the common noob, socializing on his natural habitat.

name: Noli, Heaven Seeker
effect: When this card is cast: Search your deck for 'Unspeakable Summoning' and three 'Holy Cultists'. You lose 1000 Life.
bio: Who is he? Sitting on thine throne as our kind and fair world slowly rots into oblivion? A land once populated by our people has been usurped. Never once giving us a moment of time for our kind to flourish. His greed knows no bounds...but now. It is time for retribution.

name: Noob Golem
effect: This card has haste if there's an allied 'Noob' token.
bio: I feel like I must put you in your place, [[Newbie]].

name: Ninja Elite
effect: When this card is cast, if there's 2 or more Ninja cards in your Baseplate: It deals 200 damage to a target enemy fighter.
bio: Ninjas were only ever around 5 feet tall. Any higher would make it hard to be maneuverable.

name: Nostalgia Knights
effect:
When this card is cast or attacks: Select one of the following costs you haven't paid yet to activate the corresponding effect.
WW — Give yourself a Classic Roblox Tool card.
 | RR — Deal 150 damage to all enemy fighters. 
 | GG — All allied fighters gain 250 Health. 
 | BB — Lock a target fighter for 1 turn and draw a card.
 | YY — Summon a 300/100 Noob, then all allied fighters gain 100 Power
bio: These warriors with a desire to reconstruct and reshape the world created a  project known as ClassicBLOX, building this realm to provide peace for those seeking refuge from the outside.

name: Noumenal Stalker
effect:
Overload.  | 
Whenever this card destroys another: Put a Stud into your baseplate.

name: Nooooooo
effect: Level 1 (Max 7). | During your end step, if there's no enemy fighters: Level this card up. Each player summons an unranked fighter from their graveyard that costs this card's level in studs or less, except it's zombified. | If this card is max level, all allied Zombified fighters gain 1500 Health and Power.

effect: Attach to a target fighter. | Whenever you discard your third card each turn: Unlock this fighter.

"The speed and power it gives to its wielder is super!"
Haha, Super? Nova?, get it?"
"Shut up Yuki."
-Bill, Black Justice

Overload.  |

name: Nyarlhotep's Razor
effect:
Attach to a target fighter.  | 
Whenever this fighter attacks: Reveal the top card of each players' deck. Choose to have all players draw their card or destroy their card.
bio: The blade is barely visible; Its sheen is a mirror through which the world is peeled back [[The Noumenon|and seen as it truly is.]] Shame it also made me hideous!" - [[The Tainted]]

name: Nymn the Redrune Leader
effect: When this card is cast: Deal 500 damage to a target fighter.
bio: When one sees the flames of Nymn, the world goes red. Then [[nevermore]].

name: Oasis Isle

bio: N/A

bio: [[Nightmare (Group)|Nightmares]] and [[Celestial (Group)|Celestials]] share one atribute: they feast upon the mind of anyone daring enough to call upon them. That's why the main prerequisite needed to become a Nyxian Acolyte is to be an idiot.

name: ObamaXJesus
effect: When this card is cast: Search a card that costs three or fewer studs from your deck. | Whenever you discard your first, second, and third card each turn: Deal 300 damage to this card and a target fighter.

name: Old Robloxian Tree
effect: When this card dies: Put a copy of it into your baseplate. Whenever a card leaves your opponent's graveyard: Deal 500 damage to all fighters.

name: Oligarchs of Foroth
effect: This card is immune to destruction card effects. | Whenever your opponent casts their fighter each turn: Give that player a Peace Term card. | During your end step, if your opponent has a Peace Term in their hand: Your opponent loses 1750 life.
bio: N/A

bio: Someday this war's gonna end...

name: Open Floor Plan
effect: Each fighter card in your hand and baseplate gains 500 Health and Power.
bio: In the grimy basement of the [[Pits of the Umberlords (Card)|Pits]] were the [[Infurnished (Group)|infurnished]], forced to toil for their prison's upkeep. [[Kara Sinister|Kara]] took no pity; Rescuing them was merely a valuable asset to bring her [[Arthur, Lawyer of the Meek|husband]]'s [[Lord Umberhallow|murderer]] down.

name: Onett
effect: When this card is cast: All allied Bees gain 50 health and power for each Bee you control.
bio: Here comes the [[Honeystorm!]]

name: Olafisawesome100
effect: When this card is cast: A target enemy fighter loses 300 Power until its next end step.
bio: Hiding behind a wall with a paintball gun.

name: Oozlebachr
effect: When this card dies: Put a Green Stud into your Baseplate.
bio: Sleeping voice of nature. Forumer too.

name: Opportunistic Coward
effect: Haste. During your end step, if you have two or fewer cards in your hand: Ready and return this card to your hand. Reset this card's stats.
bio: The worst kind of person.

name: Ordairy Workers
effect: When this card is cast: Select a fighter in your hand. It gains 300 Health and Power.
bio: [[Claudia, Preordained Hero|Claudia]] only gets her pets from the best farmers!

name: Orinthian Fleet: The Lady
effect: When this card is cast: Lock a target fighter for one turn, then Steal it. It becomes Mindbroken.
bio: [[Beseech the Mastermind|The Mastermind]]'s personal ship, piloted by The Mastermind's personal warrior-maiden.

name: Organoid Officer
effect: When this card dies: You gain a Blue Stud and a Yellow Stud. Seance a card in your graveyard that was cast this game.
bio: "I know it's a bit weird being grafted onto me like this, Steve," commented Susan. "But I appreciate your decades of cop experience, and your company. " The brain wiggled in affirmation.

name: Orinthian Base: Deportation Depot
effect:
When this card is cast: Ready and return a target allied fighter to your hand, except it's Mindbroken.
Whenever you cast a Mindbroken fighter: All allied fighters gain 100 power.
bio: The holding cells of all the people the Orinthians abduct. They're treated very well.

name: Orinthian Fleet: Falcon
effect: This card is immune to targeting card effects. | Haste. | When this card is cast: Choose a target allied fighter. Search your deck for an Orinthian card with the same total stud cost (or less) as that fighter, then return it to the hand and ready it.
bio: [[Eisenhower, the Alchemist|Eisenhower]] could not hide his fascination when he saw the Orinthian fleet. A whole [[The World of Wood|forest]], absorbed into a ship.

name: Orinthian Force: Pilot
effect: This card is immune to targetting effects. When this card is cast: Ready and return a target allied fighter to your hand, except it's Mindbroken.
bio: Compared to dogfights with [[Vaktus|Vaktovian]] destroyers, [[Orinthian Stratagem: Mass Abduction|abducting]] some [[Terrarians (Playstyle)|woodland barbarians]] is far beneath my pay. What gives, [[Beseech the Mastermind|Mastermind]]?

name: Orinthian Fleet: Valkyrie Mech
effect: When this card is returned to your hand: Give yourself an Orinthian Force, an Orinthian Fleet and an Orinthian Stratagem.
bio: [[Beseech the Mastermind|The Mastermind]] has abandoned its fight with [[Vaktus|Vaktovia]]. Each of its ships are instead sent to Robloxia for an unknown purpose.

name: Orinthian Force: Secret Guard
effect: When this card is returned to your hand: Your opponent loses 300 life and you gain 300 life. Search your deck for an Orinthian Stratagem Card. This card becomes Fleeting.
bio: We were told to be clandestine, yet those primitive [[Dwarf (Group)|dwarves]] saw us. Hopefully, news of this doesn't spread out to these savages.

name: Orinthian Stratagem: Forced Disappearance
effect: Cast only if you control an Orinthian. Ready and return a target allied fighter to your hand. It gains 300 health and power.
bio: After the explosion at [[Mount Xargasdon]], the Orinthians weren't seen for weeks. They were definitely seen again when [[Hallow, Extortionist of Fun|Hallow]] disappeared.

name: Orinthian_Base:_Deportation_Depot
effect:
When this card is cast: Ready and return a target allied fighter to your hand, except it's Mindbroken.
Whenever you cast a Mindbroken fighter: All allied fighters gain 100 power.
bio: The holding cells of all the people the Orinthians abduct. They're treated very well.

name: Orinthian Gate: Power Parallax (Legacy)
effect: Effects can't target this card. Cast only if you control an Orinthian.  When this card is cast, if you haven't replaced a card to your hand since your last end step: Return it and a target fighter to their owners' hands.
bio: Time was broken, so anything from the distant past could now be easily found in it's original state. *If* the machine really has a weakness, the answer lies in Robloxia.

name: Otub
effect: Thrice each turn, whenever you cast an action: A target fighter loses 200 Power.
bio: A businessman who narrowly evaded [[Havalu]]'s destruction, he sells the last few relics of his home.

name: Orinthian Stratagem: Mass Abduction
effect: Cast only if you control an Orinthian. Ready and return a target fighter, then each fighter with the lowest power to their owners' hand.
bio: Emboldened by [[Hallow, the Sugarlord|Hallow]]'s kidnapping, the Orinthians went more brazen, eventually stealing the whole [[The World of Wood|World of Wood]].

name: Orinthian Force: Soldier
effect: Defender. When this card is returned to your hand: Draw a card.
bio: We hurt you for your own good! You don't know what you're dealing with!

name: Out of Retirement
effect: Look at your Graveyard and choose a non-ranked fighter that costs 9 or fewer total studs. Summon that card, except it's Zombified.
bio: Astarossa savoured the great irony of his situation. In the world of immortality he built, one must do more than merely die for their principles.

name: Orphaned Survivor
effect: This card is immune to returning, transformation, and setting card effects. When this card is cast: Transform allied fighters into a copy of it.
bio: It was the [[Fleeing Survivors|people]] fleeing [[Bloxburg in Ruins|Bloxburg]] that gave [[Eisenhower, the Alchemist|Eisenhower]] attention to something worse than the death of [[Artemis' Tombstone|his loved one]].

name: Orinthian Stratagem: Retreat
effect: Cast only if you control an Orinthian. Ready and return a target allied fighter to your hand. Draw two cards.
bio: One month after the [[Alpha Brick's Destruction|destruction of the Alpha Brick]], strange creatures appeared. These cryptids - these "Orinthians" - kidnapped several [[Dwarf (Group)|dwarves]] before [[Mount Xargasdon]] exploded.

name: OstrichSized
effect: At the end of your turns: Summon an inert 300/150 Ostrich.
bio: Funnily enough, Ostriches aren't that much taller than humans. Though he can hardly fit in Japanese houses.

name: Outlaw
effect: Station. | Once each turn, Whenever an allied fighter attacks and destroys another: Give yourself a CY 100/0 Cowboy that's fleeting.
bio: Seeking shelter for their crimes, they've come to the AWG to right their wrongs. Or so they say, at least.

name: Outraged Octogenarian
effect: Once each turn, whenever an allied fighter attacks: Lock this fighter for one turn, then unlock the attacking fighter.
bio: "I have been loyal to Astarossa for the past 50 years and he spits on my face. I spit on his dream!"

name: Overleveler
effect: Haste.  | Whenever this card attacks: Advance your deck. Then if there's an EXP card in your baseplate: Destroy it and draw a card.
bio: Some players find the process of leveling up addictive, and as such, do it more than necessary to advance.

name: Overlapping Consciousness
effect: When this card is cast: Divide a target allied fighter into two copies of itself.
bio: The Aeonite Cult imbue multiple spirits into singular people. The more minds that exist in a single space, the more alive that space is.

name: Outskirts Scout
effect: When this card is cast: Target a fighter. Give yourself a Green card of the same rarity of that card.

name: Overseer Beast

name: Overseer Drake

bio: Although frail and feeble, these drakes are capable of destruction.

name: Overseer General
effect: When this card is cast: Summon a clone that's a copy of it. The clone preserves this card's current stats.

name: Overseer Growth Ritual

effect: When this card is cast: Recur each fighter with less health than this card. This card's effect only triggers once.

effect: When this card is cast: A target enemy fighter loses 350 Power. Also deal 350 damage to it if this card gained Health in your hand.

"A sky of lava, a sea of air... Such creativity is perfect for the Cosmic Scab's healing."
-Technician's Notes, Experience [https://www.roblox.com/games/642780544/VAPORWAVE-PLAZA 642780544]

Randal, [[Warriors of Justice|Red Justice]]

name: Owen0202

effect: N/A

name: Pact of Condemnation
effect: N/A
bio: "Enjoy your new house. I promise the bed bugs won't bite."

name: Panicking Victim

bio:
"Hey, kid," threatened Gyesta. "You shouldn't wander the streets at night. You don't know when a monster'll pop out."
Jyoheil jumped him from behind, kickstarting the new [[Gilmuraig|gilmuraig's]] transformation.

bio: Papa got drakobloxxers on his side.

name: Panwellz
effect: Whenever you cast a fighter that costs 4 or fewer total studs: Give yourself a card that's a clone of it, except it's a 0/0 action that's inert in all zones.
bio: In all his years committing insurance fraud, few people have been as gullible as the [[Earl of the Federation|Federation Earls]].

name: Paraselene Moondog
effect: Moonward. If this card would take effect damage: Draw a card.
bio: The common man would panic if they knew of [[Lycanthrope (Group)|what]] was out there. Keep them in bliss to keep society running.

name: Paraselene Projection
effect: Moonward. When this card is cast: A target allied fighter and a target enemy fighter gain Decaying.
bio: "Those who spread the enzyme of the method of how to will face the full vengeance of the Paraselene Sages." -Proclamation of [[Lua, Paraselene Evincar|Paraselene Evincar Lua]], 427 AD

name: Paranormanbiggestfan
effect: Whenever an effect gives your opponent a card: They lose 500 life. Until each player's end step, effects can't give that player cards.
bio: A lot of thought and letters went into Paranormanbiggestfan's name.

name: Paraselene Sage
effect: Moonward. If this card would take non-combat damage: Give yourself a random Blue or Red action card.
bio: [[Priestess Zanzel, the Promised One|Zanzel]]? [[Hallow Sinister, Patriarch|Hallow]]? [[Eisenhower, the Alchemist|Eisenhower]]? Imbeciles compared to the moon.

name: Paramon Trainer
effect: When this card dies: Remove 1C from all Colourless cards in your hand.
bio: He's going to catch them all, and be the best like no one ever was.

name: Paraselene Ascetic
effect: This card is immune to damage card effects. Whenever you cast an action, if you control another Lycanthrope: You draw a card and lose 500 life. Double this card's stats. Transform it.
bio: Let my [[Paraselene (Playstyle)|traitors]] writhe about with technology and magic...

name: Paraselene Starsleuth
effect: Moonward. Dextrous.
bio: "We've had reports of a powerful reanimation formula being circulated around a backwater called Bloxburg. Get in there, assess an appropriate threat response, then get out." - Lua, Paraselene Evincar

name: Parking Lot Attendant
effect: Whenever a fighter is cast, if it has 400 or less power: Lock it for 2 turns. Suspend this card until the next endstep.
bio: The first night isn't usually that bad in any of these jobs.

name: Paraselene Trainee
effect: Moonward. | If this card would take noncombat damage: It gains 300 Health.
bio: It is our noble duty to defend the ignorant from forces they cannot understand.

name: Parrot of Eternal Dominion
effect: Can't be counterattacked. When this card is cast, increase the power of all birds by 100. Draw a card.
bio: The best birds are those with birds of their own.

name: PassTheToiletPaper
effect: Whenever an action is cast: Your opponent loses 300 life.
bio: A fearsome bounty hunter, attacking [[The Federation (Group)|The Federation]] bases in vengence for what they took from him.

name: Parting Words
effect: Fading. Obliterate all fighters on the left side of the board.
bio:
[[Lore Comic: Parting Words|In the midst of regrets and memories overwhelming her mind]], [[Caitlin Nixon, Hunted|Caitlin]] knew she had to leave this world with one last thing:
A prescription to cure a [[Fl00fy Bonez|delusional doctor]].

name: Patchwork of Disease
effect: When this card is cast: Summon all copies of this card from your graveyard that have died this game.
bio: With the [[Necroenzyme Vial|Enzyme]]'s supply rapidly dropping, many of the zombified stuck together, sharing their supplies.

name: Passive Gears
effect: Inert in all Zones.  |  Unique in graveyard.  |  Attach to a target fighter.  | This fighter is Fading while this is attached to it.
bio:
"The [[Arkhive (Faction)|Arkhive]] wanted their little plaything. The evil empire got it!"
-[[Dekkad Deckard|Dekkad]], The Cornered Rat

name: Patacorow
effect: Whenever your opponent discards a card other than their first one each turn: Destroy the oldest card in their hand.
bio: Are we getting anywhere with this!?

name: Pathetic Oddsmaker
effect: When this card is cast: Give yourself Yellow, Blue, and Green Crystals. (You may choose one to put in your Baseplate.)
bio: They pitfully bet on the outcome of each fight!

name: Patient Rebuilding
effect: Liberate. Select a card from the bottom two of your deck. Put that card into your Baseplate and the other into your Graveyard.
bio: "You have to rest, 'Kayla. Bloxburg lost so many today, and you [[Will to Survive|lost your arm]]. We can help now that we have a tomorrow." -[[Eric Newman]]

name: Patric Sinister
effect: During your end step, if your opponent has 5 or more Colourless studs: Deal 150 damage to all enemy fighters. Put a Pact of Condemnation into each player's Baseplate.

name: Peaspod
effect: When this card is cast: Choose a target fighter. If it's in a group, give yourself another fighter that shares its group.

bio: "Nyan, nyew, nyree! Get your paws on me! ~♪"

name: Pedromony
effect: When this card is cast: Both players gain two Colourless studs. You gain 400 life.
bio: She treats her friends or foe alike, but her friends come first.

effect: During your end step: This card gains 150 health and power. You lose two Colourless studs.
bio: THIS IS A LATE BIRTHDAY GIFT, ISN'T IT

effect: When this card is cast: A target fighter loses 150 power. Lock it for 1 turn.
bio: N/A

name: Pencil Pusher

name: PencilWizard
effect: When this card attacks and destroys another: Summon a copy of this card without this effect.

name: Peace Term Actions
effect: You can't discard this card. | All allied fighters lose 200 power.
bio: N/A

name: Periastron Strike

name: Perigee Visionary
effect: If your hand has three or more Blessings in it, this card has haste.  |  Whenever this card attacks: Put an Eldritch blessing on a card in your hand.  |  Then draw a card if your hand has three or more Blessings in it.
bio: "These rocks may spell good fortune! I think?"

name: Persistent Peeper

After this card attacks, or at the start of each turn: Reveal your opponent's hand and the top card of their deck.
Whenever this card attacks: Destroy the top card of your opponent's deck.
bio: [[Eisenhower Dwit|Eisenhower]] just wanted some privacy with his [[Artemis Carter|husband]] while it lasted.

name: Permission to Move On
effect: Cast this card for 🔵🔵 if your graveyard is empty. | Draw 4 cards.
bio: Caitlin's funeral was a bittersweet celebration of her, of Bloxburg, of mortality.

name: Person299
effect: When this card is cast: Deal damage to a target fighter equal to the target's Power.
bio: Out of all the usernames you could choose in 2008, why choose *Person299*? Most of the good usernames haven't been namesniped yet!

name: Pet Egg
effect:
Inert in all zones. Can't attack. 
Whenever this card would attack, if you have 2 or more colourless studs: You lose 2 colourless studs. Transform this card into a Pet, then Unlock it.

name: Person299's Minigames
effect: During your end step: Destroy your hand. Give yourself six Rare cards.

name: PhireFox
effect: Whenever an effect you control targets this card, if you targeted two or fewer times this turn: You gain a Green and Yellow stud.

name: Pharaoh LuckyTux
effect: When this card is cast: Give yourself a 'Artifact from the Future'.
bio: In seeking to recover the secrets of immortality, [[President LuckyTux]] accidentally sent himself back in time to the era of the Tycoon Simulator where he now must find a way to come home.

name: Philabob's Indephilagability

name: Phoenix Hondo
effect: When this card is cast, if you control a non-blue fighter: Give yourself a Blue or Red action.
bio: The flower of man always scatters.

name: Pier

Whenever this card attacks: Train a target fighter, then this card gains '''[200]''' power. 
If this card gains 500 or more power at once from this effect: Transform it.

He pillages for a light chicken
with rice and gravy.

name: Pilgrim
effect: N/A

effect: N/A

name: Pirate
effect: When this card is cast: A target fighter loses 250 Power.

name: Pikachukiller101
effect: N/A
bio: Some people are gen wunners. He's a gen sixer.

name: PixelFlame
effect: Whenever you cast a fighter, if you control another fighter: You lose 250 life. This effect triggers before any other cast effects.
bio: Freedom is good. Punching faces is bad.

name: Pixellus
effect: When this card is cast: Deal 300 damage to a target fighter.
bio: Adventure Club enthusiast. Bit cheesy. Likes McNuggets.

name: Pits of the Umberlords (Card)
effect: At the start of each player's turn: Each fighter generates.
bio: A carnival of delight and revel, for all those looking for a great time. Watch the world's [[Gladiator (Group)|strongest and most mysterious beings]] battle eachother! Brought to you by [[Lord Umberhallow]]!

name: Pixie Dust Trail
effect: Put a Pixie's Mischief in your opponent's baseplate. Draw a card. You lose 500 life.
bio: The magical trail left behind by a pixie is enough to entice any explorer of [[The World of Wood|the World of Wood]] to follow behind, hoping to be lead to something important.

name: PixelPistol
effect: When this card is cast, a target fighter gains 500 Power.
bio: Futuristic AWOL soldier who wants to escape his past self.

name: Pixie's Mischief
effect: Inert in all zones. Draw a card.
bio: The pixies of the [[The World of Wood|World of Wood]] are most known for their mischievous behaviour, playing tricks on [[Xylem Student|others]] of their enjoyment.

name: Pixie Troublemaker
effect: When this card is cast: Put a Pixie's Mischief in your opponent's baseplate. Then if your opponent has 6 or more Pixie's Mischief in their baseplate: Give yourself a Common or Uncommon Pixie fighter card, then draw a card.
bio: Other pixies will always be hiding nearby, to either observe or join in the mischief. Those whos think they have escaped from the tricks of one pixie will soon find themselves in the hands of another.

name: Pixie Trickster
effect: When this card is cast: Put a Pixie's Mischief in your opponent's baseplate. Then if your opponent has 6 or more Pixie's Mischief in their baseplate: Reset a target enemy fighter's stats and put it onto the top of your opponent's deck.
bio: While many pixies will simply divert the uninvited away from [[The World of Wood|the World of Wood]], some of the more experienced pixies enjoy playing with their targets, tricking them for hours on end.

name: Planet Meka
effect: Once each turn, whenever you discard a Meka card: You may return a target allied fighter to its hand. Train it. It costs 1 less Colorless, Red and Yellow stud and gains Haste.
bio:
Rumors of a powerful fighter resting within Planet Meka's core are common to find in space forums.
Unfortunately for the Mekas, a [[Pier|certain legendary super bouncer's]] looking for his next rival.

name: Pizzablawk
effect: N/A
bio: Spicy :^)

name: Place
effect:
This fighter has Defender while you have 5 or fewer cards in your hand.
This fighter has Dextrous while you have 6 or more cards in your hand.
bio: A sentient creature, whose fall none doth ken, didst proclaim that it hath forsaken all. Its eyes of azure flame, ne'er failing it, do burn withal in the murk of night. Though bound and unable to rove by reason of its plight, it yet doth ever seize upon its quarry. Long hath it wandered, giving naught to others and letting none slip its grasp, forsaking what once it called its own.

name: Planet3arth
effect: When this card dies: Search your deck for a Green card.
bio: Who knew searching for brown fabric bricks can earn you eternal fortune?

name: Plankton1245
effect: When this card attacks: Deal 500 damage to your opponent.
bio: Not a fan of Sponge baths.

name: Planet Salvager
effect: When this card is cast: Draw a card. Then deal 300 damage to all allied fighters. Draw a card for each allied fighter destroyed this way.
bio: With most of the Vecross system destroyed, any remaining evidence of their history was invaluable.

name: PlatinumFalls
effect: When this card is cast: Give yourself a Studling card of each color in your Baseplate. (Colourless is not a color.)
bio: The grand creator of games where you jump over things, climb things, jump over more things and slide into a giant toilet.

name: Player
effect: When this card dies: Fighters in your hand gain 150 power.
bio: If you've ever pressed Play Solo in Studio you know this name.

name: Player Points
effect: Select up to 3 fighters in your hand. They gain 300 Power.
bio: What even were the point of these? Heh, get it...

name: Playful Pixie
effect: When this card is cast: Put a Pixie's Mischief into your opponent's baseplate. If your opponent has 2 or more Pixie's Mischief in their baseplate: Put a Pixie's Mischief on top of their deck.
bio: Younger pixies tend to be the ones to divert away lone travellers who have ventured into the [[The World of Wood|World of Wood]] with small tricks and misdirection.

name: Pleasant, Goddess of Unknown Saturations
effect: During your end step: You gain 1C 1R 1G 1B 1Y if you have 3 or more Blessings. Then put a copy of those studs into your baseplate if you have 6 or more Blessings.
bio: N/A

name: Playtime's Over
effect: Destroy all gear on a target fighter. Draw a card.
bio: [[The Tainted]] refused to play along with the Justices' twisted game of hero and villain. Fictional characters though they may be, their feelings were real.

name: Plea for Guidance
effect:
The most expensive fighter in your deck gains 400 health and power.  | 
Draw a card.
bio: Too weak to stop the oceans boiling, Robloxia's traumatised weaklings begged into existence [[Shedletsky, the Fried One|a being strong enough to]].

name: Poke631
effect: When this card is cast, if your opponent controls a Terrain: Destroy it. They draw a card.
bio: An exile from Pokémon Brick Bronze. Can still tame a good pocket monster.
