effect: Inert in play. | Hunt 2. | At the start of your turns: Give yourself a Nascent Stud.
bio: garfield you fat cat

name: Poklolio
effect:
Overload.
When this card is cast or dies: Summon 3 fighters from your deck that each cost 15 or fewer total studs. One of them is secretly Boomie, which destroys all fighters when an effect targets it if it's revealed. Give yourself Boomie's Radar.
bio: Time to summon.. my OWN skeleton army!!

name: Police Combatant
effect: When this card is cast, if you control 3 Police: Lock all fighters that costs 6 or fewer total studs for 1 turn. Give yourself a Police Officer.
bio: This cop doesn't use pepper spray, it prefers mowing you down with bullets instead.

name: Police Taskmaster
effect: When this card becomes Locked, if there's 3 or more Police cards in your Baseplate: Give yourself a 600/600 Police Spec Ops with no abilities.
bio: He cracks down on dodgy people and those that dodge the law.

name: Police Officer
effect: When this card is cast: Lock a target fighter for 1 turn, then suspend it from play until the next end step.
bio: Jailing people for making bomb-clocks since 2015.

name: Police Call Operator
effect: Haste. Can't attack. Twice per turn, whenever this card becomes locked: Search your deck for a Police card.
bio: A famous Robloxian did WHAT to you? We'll get a detective on the case immediately.

name: Portable Translator
effect: At the start of your turns, if the top card of your graveyard costs 5 or fewer total studs: Recur it. It gains Fading.
bio: Don't worry, it can translate cursive and blessive.

name: Polluted Vitality Wellspring
effect: During your opponent's end step, if they spent more than 15 seconds during their turn: They lose 1500 life.
bio: When we poison the earth, we poison ourselves.

name: Pop-Star Substitune
effect: When this card is cast: Give yourself a Token Star Action. When this card attacks: Encore.
bio: Musicians come from all walks of life, it isn't just talent that stops them from becoming Stars.

name: Pop-Star Cheerubus
effect: Whenever you cast your second or third Star action each turn: Unlock this card. Whenever this card attacks and destroys another: Search your deck for a card in the Stars band.
bio: Some Stars possess the ability to ease the sorrows of others, revitalizing their wounded spirits.

name: Porcelain Psychopath
effect: Overload. When this card is cast: Attach 2 Flaws to all fighters.
bio: The [[Claymaker, Master Architect|claymaker]] [[Enthralled to Creation|despises]] his [[Kilnkin (Group)|creations]] for the [[Impossible Standards|slightest deviation]] in what he intends them to be. A broken clock is right twice a day.

name: Power of Popularity
effect: Cast this card ignoring its Colourless cost if this is the only card in your hand. | Draw two cards.
bio: Everyone rushing to play disaster survival stopped them from surviving a real disaster.

name: PoptartNoahh
effect: Whenever this card attacks: Both players lose 250 Life. Ready this card if it attacked a fighter.
bio: I'm not locked in here with you, you're locked in here with ME!

name: Povvo Street
effect:
During your end step:
The player with the fewest cards in hand draws a card. | 
The player with the fewest fighters in play summons a 200/200 Citizen. | 
The player with the fewest cards in graveyard puts two Citizens into their graveyard.
bio: Bloxburg's poorest live on a single street, abandoned by wider society. So, they banded together, forming a pact.

name: PowerCat123
effect: This card is immune to returning effects. When this card is cast: All allied fighters that cost 2 or fewer total studs gain 100 Health and Power. Unlock and Return them to the hand.
bio: A follower of [[Shedletsky the Fried One|Shedletsky, the Fried One]].

name: Powerstone Tower
effect: Whenever an allied fighter attacks: Transfer this card's Power to the attacking fighter until your endstep.
bio: [[Orinthian (Group)|Orinthians]] needed a way to establish waypoints from the vast regions of space to specific planets: This was how.

name: Precise Bee
effect: Whenever you cast a Bee, if it's the second fighter you've cast this turn: Search your deck for a Bee card.
bio: This sharpshooting bee is always on point and expects the same of you.

name: Pre-War Technology
effect: All enemy fighters lose 100 power. Give yourself 2 smuggled fighter cards that each cost 6 total studs.
bio: Pre-war tech can be worth quite the coin. If you’re caught smuggling any, you best be ready for a fight.

name: Prep for Survival
effect:
Attach to a target fighter.  | 
This fighter has Dextrous for as long as this is attached to it.
bio: Knowing the forest was one thing. Having the right tools to navigate is another.

name: Preservation Isn't
effect: When this card is cast: Give yourself 2 Ancient cards from a choice of 4.
bio: Ａ ｐｈｏｔｏｇｒａｐｈ ｃａｎ＇ｔ ｓｅｎｄ strangers ｂａｃｋ ｔｏ ｙｏｕｒ ｐａｓｔ．

name: President Duck (Legacy)
effect: Unlock all police. Give them 100 power and health.
bio: My three main policies: Make sure aether wins war, make sure roblox takes your cash, and fire all of my employees!

name: Prestwick
effect: Haste. (This can attack the turn it's cast.)
bio: He'll make your candle go out.

name: President Doge
effect: When this card is cast: All allied Doges gain 150 Health and Power.
bio: Trading leadership secrets for dog biscuits and internet fame.

name: Preston
effect: When this card is cast: It deals 50 damage to a target enemy fighter. They lose 50 Power.
bio: Don't call him Midnight Droid, or else he'll ramble on about it in his Q&As. His name is Prestongo on [[ROBLOX]].

name: Prince's Treaty
effect:
Attach Regenerating to a target fighter.
Then if there's 3 or more allied attached fighters, draw 2 cards.
bio:
"By all means, try and sort [[Queen Shedare II|me ma]] out! I don't have to worry about your descent turning you insane; You clearly already are!"
-[[Wonktooth, Prince Regent|Wonktooth]], to the [[The Auteur|Auteur]]

name: Priestess Zanzel, the Promised One
effect: This card is immune to transformation card effects. | When this card is cast: You can't attack or cast anything else this turn. | Whenever your opponent targets this card: Set their Life to 1. | When this card attacks the opponent directly: They instantly lose the game.
bio: Mankind shall soon tread upon the path to perfection.

name: PrismDraco
effect: When this card is cast: Give yourself a Crystal card.
bio: Future updates to Blox Cards can't buff or nerf PrismDraco. PrismDraco can't be banned from [[Tournament|tournaments]].

name: Primal Gato
effect: During your end step: This card gains 250 power.
bio: GRAWR!

name: ProjectSlayer
effect: When this card is cast: Your opponent loses a colourless stud.
bio: [[The Federation (Group)|The Federation]] destroyed [[Kathara]], but not its [[Kathara Refugees|people]].

name: Prosperity
effect: Summon a 300/300 Studling of each colour. Then if there's 4 colours among cards in your Baseplate, all allied fighters gain 100 health and power.
bio: "There's more to fortune than the wealth in your hands; love, life, family... those to care for, and who will care for you"

name: Profane Bargain
effect: Destroy two Red and two Green cards from your Baseplate. Give yourself three Red and three Green cards. You may baseplate an additional four cards this turn.
bio: One would have to be insane to make a deal with an [[Nibblex the Starkiller|intergalactic catastrophe]]. [[Ptenda the Unconquerable|Ptenda]] was fine with the label, for that would be the only way to save his home.

name: Providence Shot
effect: This card costs one colourless stud less for each card in your opponents graveyard. When this card is cast: Obliterate your opponent's graveyard and a target fighter.
bio: Borrowing' [[Beseech the Mastermind|Ghashendex]]'s orbital cannon was a tough job, but nothing new in terms of cruelty for the [[Hallow, Extortionist of Fun|ex-Lord of the Pits]].

name: Pseudosanity
effect: Once, when your opponent has 3 or more Nightmare cards in hand: Each allied Nightmare card in play and in your hand gains 300 health and power. Actions buffed this way manifest into fighters.
bio: The more you hold on to what's left, the less the world holds on to you.

name: Princess Erisyphia, Master Orthotist
effect: This card is immune to transformation card effects. Whenever an allied fighter is cast, if your Anthrestation has advanced 9 times this game: Transform all fighters into Anthrested Knights. All enemy fighters lose 100 health and power.
bio: That [[Priestess Zanzel, the Promised One|Zanzel]] lady talks about [[Apocrypha (Group)|spirits beyond this world]]. Should they exist, surely they would love a facelift.

name: Protracted Murder
effect: Your opponent loses a colourless stud. A target fighter becomes Zombified and starts Decaying.
bio: "Counteract eternal life with eternal suffering." - Kingrin, Head of the Smileys

name: Psychic Ward
effect:
Attach to a target fighter. Gears can't be attached to this fighter while this card's attached to it.  | 
When this card is cast: Draw a card.
bio:
"I see why [[Wonktooth, Prince Regent|His Illuminance]] handed me this trinket now; Anyone without my fortitude would've succumbed to [[Queen Shedare II|her]] mind control. Your mother will be my magnum opus, Wonktooth."
-[[The Auteur]]

name: Ptenda the Unconquerable
effect:
Overload.  |  When this card is cast: Select a grouped card in your graveyard. Search your deck for a card in its group.
During your End Step: Reset this card‘s stats.
bio: Ptenda sought the counsel of the 3,000 spirits grafted into his body. Their reply was unaniamous:

name: Public Immortality House

Whenever your opponent casts a fighter: A fighter in your hand becomes fleeting.  |

Haste.
Whenever this card attacks: Draft. All Drafted cards in your graveyard gain 100 Health and Power.

bio: "Would you live your life in the darkness in fear of the light? No? Then show me what it means to be Katharan!"

bio: N/A

Haste. During your end step: Destroy this card.

Already a pioneer of cloning, [[Eisenhower, the Alchemist|Eisenhower]] had the perfect body. He just had to get to the lower floors of his [[Collapsing Laboratory|laboratory]]...

"Look, dude. You aren't forgiven for what you did, but we're clearly on the same side."
[[Queen Shedare II|Shedare]] took [[Wonktooth, Prince Regent|Wonktooth]]'s narrow grace to heart. If she had to pay for her crimes afterwards, so be it.

check this out.

"Two drifters, off to see the world
There's such a lot of world to see
We're after the same rainbow's end
Waitin' 'round the bend
My huckleberry friend
Moon River and me"

name: Scare & Crow
effect: N/A
bio: Crow once belonged to the [[List of AI#The Matriarch|Matriarch]]. Scare once belonged to [[Hallow, the Sugarlord|Hallow]]. Now, they belong to themselves, on a mission to undo their black-hearted past.

Draw a card. Destroy five Stagnation cards in your deck.  |

"Alex's death revealed the Alpha Brick once again, causing the death of millions of demons as they subjugated Robloxia in a bloody, intergenerational war to obtain it. Thus the wheel of fate resets."

effect: This card is immune to returning card effects. When this card is cast, if you have no Green cards in your baseplate: Return a target enemy fighter to their hand and ready it. Destroy the oldest card in their hand.
bio: He's the most FAMOUSEST person in Blox Cards ... ''FAMOUSEST'' person?

name: The Gentlemaniac
effect: If an effect would heal this card: Give yourself a random '''Chair'''100px100px100px first.
bio: He'll be gentle... For a while.

name: The Last Flufflefunz
effect: Haste: Level 1. When this card attacks and destroys another: Unlock it. Reset its stats. Level it up. It gains 1500 Health and Power and Destroys a target fighter at Level 5 instead.
bio: Escaping the deathloop incurred by that accursed brick, I'd finally gained everything I could have ever wished for - true immortality, the strength to rival gods, you name it. I'm the living equivalent of a Mary Sue. Yet... I feel nothing. No urge to do good for the world, no desire to make use of what I've earned. It's ironic - I spent all this time trying to avoid death, yet now it's the one thing I crave most but can never attain. Funny how that is.

name: The Great Tree
effect: Whenever you cast an fighter from the World of Wood: All allied fighters from the World of Wood gain 100 health. You gain two colourless studs and 300 life.
bio: The seat of power of [[The Wanwood Dryad|the Wanwood Dryad]]. As long as it stands, every denizen of the World of Wood is forced to defend it.

name: The Ghosdeeri
effect: This card is immune to targeting card effects. Gladiator. Whenever you cast a non-Gladiator fighter: Put it into your Baseplate. Give yourself a Green card, a Blue card and a Yellow card, except they're fleeting.
bio: Cursed to wander the Ruins of Wood alone, it joins the Pits to pull others into spectral companionship.

name: The Golden Suite
effect: During your end step, if there's 2 or more cards in your hand: Obliterate the 2 oldest of them. Search your deck for a fighter card and give yourself a copy of it. They each gain 200 power.
bio:
''Alone it stands, eyeing those who could only dream of such luxury, What a callous flaunt of wealth.

''With gilded thanks to: 0StratA0''

name: The Geomancer
effect: Cast only if your starting deck had 2 or fewer Gladiators and no Duplicates. When this card is cast, or whenever you cast a Terrain: Animate your terrain into a fighter. Search your deck for a Gladiator. Draw a card.
bio: Raid bosses are her speciality. Her destiny, if you will. She comes from Raid Boss Destiny.

name: The HoiBoys
effect: When this card is cast: Summon a 150/150 Stupid Cat.
bio: 🙏BLESS🙏

name: The Killer (Necrosyndicates)
effect: At the start of your turns, if you have seven or more Red cards in your Baseplate: Summon this card from your graveyard unlocked. You lose 400 life.
bio: "For as long as people would fear his name, his spirit would return. The hunt is always on."

name: The Imperfect Ones
bio: The last survivors of the Old Imperium, creating a hopeful future for the next one.

name: The Malignant Ones
effect:
When this card is cast: Select 1 effect.
-Give yourself a 1C Federal Farce that's inert in all zones, then Draft. Repeat this effect 2 more times. | 
-Draft the top 5 cards of your deck, then obliterate your deck.
bio: "Tell me, o' commander of riffraff. Will you leave this wasteland with us, or fight for the nothing you have left?!"

name: The Money Factory
effect: When this card is cast: Give yourself a Cash Grab card. Whenever you cast a fighter: Deal 50 times X damage to it. During your end step: Gain X Red and Yellow studs. X on this card is the number of Cash Grabs in your Baseplate.
bio: Lodsamone.

name: The Lunar Spire
effect: This card costs one less Colourless stud for each allied Token fighter you control. Summon a 1200/0 Fighter. During your end step, it makes all allied token fighters gain 150 Health and Power.
bio: Home of the Caishen. Pride of Javion. Any resemblance to a certain other tower is purely coincidental.

name: The Lunar Arch
effect: Liberate. Cast this card ignoring its Colourless cost if there's an allied Fading fighter. Whenever your third fighter attacks each turn: It gains 750 Power until the next end step. Destroy this card.
bio: A reminder of [[Javion]]. Of why they're here now. Of what they need to do to rebuild.

name: The Morphium Project
effect: Cast only if you control a Morphic fighter. When you do, if you control a non-Blue fighter: Summon a card that's a clone of target enemy fighter.
bio: Goos were invented out of grief. This one, out of anger.

name: The Noumenon
effect: When this card is cast or destroyed from play: Put a Cosmic Crack into your baseplate. | Once each turn, whenever a card leaves your baseplate: Draw a card.
bio: The world as it truly is.

name: The Newport Asylum
effect: When this card is cast: Give yourself a Rose. Whenever you discard a Rose: Shuffle 2 Roses into your deck.
bio: Why did your friend come here, why did you decide it was a good idea to follow him?

name: The Master Acolyte
effect: Once: You lose all your {R}{G}{B}{Y}. | Destroy this card unless you lost 8 or more studs. | Whenever you cast another Acolyte: You gain {W}{W}{W}{W}{R}{G}{B}{Y}.
bio: The rats' worship inflated [[Greygnarl]]'s ego; If [[Telamon]]'s favourite people loved him more than his father, surely he deserved to take his deity.

name: The PLURRALITY
effect:
When this card is cast: Summon two 100/100 Zombified Catgirls. 
During your endstep, if four or more allied fighters have died this turn: Draw 2 cards.
bio: The club of the PLURRALs allows people to drown their sorrows away in pleasure.

name: The Oddsmakers' Cabal
effect: This card costs 2 Colourless less for each colour among allied fighters. | When this card is cast: Put a stud of each colour into your Baseplate.
bio: They bet on the outcome of each fight, as well as the lives of the [[Fundebted Fighter|Fundebted]].

name: The Oddsman, Spirit of Money
effect: When this card is cast, or whenever you cast a Robux Stack, if you have 8 or more Money Stack cards in your Graveyard: This card gains 200 Power: Give yourself two Money Stacks, except they're 200/200 fighters. This effect only triggers once per turn.
bio: A significant collection of wealth had been observed to hold a potency for magic catalysation that could rival the Alpha Brick's, if only one percent. Yet, that sort of power would be considerable all the same.

name: The Phantom Mask
effect:
Attach to a target fighter.
Whenever this fighter attacks: Give yourself an Element. Then, if you have 4 or more unique elements in your graveyard: Double this fighter's power.
bio: One half of the Phantom King's Mask, Wielded by [[Cielo de la Asad]]. The mask is said to cause its user to go into a berserk like state that leaves them blind to who they are.

name: The Parade
effect: When this card is cast or at the start of your turns: Give yourself a fleeting 'Vote.'
bio: After [[President LuckyTux]] rose to power after the events of Necrosyndicates in Bloxburg, he chose a powerful cabinet of leaders. However, he has gone missing. Where could the president be?!

name: The Perfectionist
effect: When this card is cast: Select a non-colorless fighter from the bottom 5 cards of your deck and put it into your baseplate. | When this card dies: Summon a copy of the selected card and attach fragile to it.
bio:
I will make you in my image.
With kind thanks to: Shababiii

name: The Prophet
effect: Gladiator. When this card is cast: All allied fighters generate. Ready all allied fighters. Draw a card.
bio: With the power of time on his side, the Prophet moves forward toward his fateful encounter beyond the [[Pits of the Umberlords (Card)|Pits]].

name: The Piece Maker
effect: A target allied fighter gains 100 Health and Power. | Transform it into into a Immortal Wielder with the effect: | Overload. | Whenever this fighter attacks and destroys another: Your opponent loses 800 life.
bio: [[The Piece Breaker|Once, it brought destruction]]. Now, it still brings destruction, but more reliably.

name: The Purifier
effect: Unstoppable. | Whenever this card attacks: Destroy all terrains. For each terrain destroyed this way, this card gains 1000 power.
bio: The last able-bodied of the Emerald Knights of the Seventh Sanctum, Candidate 1 will stop at nothing to restore Robloxia to its former glory.

name: The Paraselene Archives
effect: Whenever you cast your first, second, or third action each turn: Deal 200 damage to a target allied fighter. | Recur an Action from your graveyard, except it's Inert in all zones and Fading. Destroy it if it's not cast this turn.
bio: When dealing with possible events of irreversible catastrophe, there is no such thing as 'too much knowledge'.

name: The Robloxian Overlay
effect: Shuffle each player's hand together, then equally distribute that hand back to all players. Repeat this process for each player's deck and baseplate. Put two colourless studs into each player's Baseplate.
bio: With [[Javion|Javion's]] stability breaking down [[Beat The House|without]] its [[Rageborne Coffers|wealthy coffers]], [[Yueliang, World Calmer|Yuéliáng]] had only one option.

name: The Piece Breaker
effect: Haste. Whenever this fighter attacks and destroys a fighter: Your opponent loses 1200 life. Destroy this card.
bio: Greet death with an open mind and with a sword in hand.

name: The Ratcatcher
effect: Overload. | When this card is cast: Attach all fighters with 250 or less Health to it.
bio: Although it stealthily aids the Candidates, removing [[The Cornered Rat|difficult obstacles]] as they descend to the baseplate of the doomspire, it can't help but question why [[Nyarlhotep (Lore)|Nyarlhotep]] would command such a thing.

name: The Putrid Gnat
bio: "[[Deidre, Timeslayer|Grandmother]]... Surely even you have limits on how much you'll cling onto an awful life?" — [[The Sacrifice]]

name: The Rusting and the Missing
effect: Once each turn, whenever you cast another allied fighter: Attach a copy of it to this card as a +0/+0 gear. | Once each turn, whenever this card attacks and destroys another: All gear on it triggers as though they were cast
bio: RustedHelmet and MissingInvestigat0r, bygone artists from bygone times.

name: The Saviour
effect: Gladiator. | Inert in all Zones. | When you discard this card: A target fighter becomes inert in all zones. When you've discarded 2 cards this turn: Give yourself 2 Gladiator cards.
bio: "We've all learnt our lessons these past 4000 years, cousin. Let me teach you what the Cymoniacs taught [[Beseech the Mastermind|me.]]"

name: The Sacrifice
effect:
Whenever you cast a Terrain: Summon 2 300/300 Shadowbeasts that're inert in play.  | 
When this card dies: For each fighter that's died since this card entered play, You gain 1C 1G and give yourself a Green card.
bio: Born into a lineage of maidens who slaughter themselves to stop the spire's growth, Candidate 2 would die a thousand times over to live up to her ancestor's lofty expectations.

name: The Shadow Realm
effect: Fading  |  Return all non-Nightmare fighters to their owner's hands.
bio: Stops even hope from escaping.

name: The Shedarian Royalty
effect: Gladiator. | Whenever this card attacks: Seek shinies. Then all allied attached fighters gain dextrous and overload.
bio: The chaos of a broken family fixes itself admist the chaos of the Doomspire.

name: The Skull Collector
effect: Whenever an enemy fighter dies: Give yourself a Skull card.
bio: "Us demons are a friendly bunch. Don't hate us for a few bad noggins."

name: The Stalker
effect: During your end step: Deal 300 damage to all enemy fighters.
bio: A true monster turns hunters into hunted.

name: The Tainted
effect:
Effects can't target this card.  | 
If a fighter or action would target this card: Suspend it until the next end step. Each player shuffles their hand into their deck, then draws 6 cards.
bio: Transformed into a murderous monster by an [[Nyarlhotep's Razor|orphaned fragment of the cosmic scab]], Candidate 4's motherly instincts compel him to return that scar to its rightful father.

name: The Toolbox
effect: At the start of your turns: Give yourself a fleeting Flaw. | Whenever an allied fighter dies: Attach a gear in your graveyard to this card. Then if there's 4 or more gear on this, destroy them all and summon a 600/600 Kilnkin Newt with no abilities.
bio: The magic forge of Imperium Ultima can create anything its owner wishes for, but is corrupted to always be inconveniently [[Flaw|flawed]].

name: The Ultimate Trade
effect: If a target enemy fighter has 350 or more health, divide it into seven copies of itself. You can't cast anything this turn.
bio: [[Azureless of the Federation|Azureless]] isn't one to negotiate with outsiders, but overwhelming wealth speaks louder. The [[10000 Stars|entrepreneur]] unsettles the conqueror.

name: The Toothy Deer
effect: When this card is cast: Set the stats of a target fighter to 500/500, then transform it into Toothy Deer's Blessing.
bio: I look like a toothy deer, so I'm hiding!

name: The Transcendent Voidoaks
effect: Cast this card ignoring its Colourless cost only if you've 'cast all other terrains from the World of Wood this game. | At the start of each player's turn: Unlock all allied fighters. They gain 100 Health and Power. Search your deck for 'The Wanwood Dryad.'
bio: It was these woods, warped by coil and stone, that [[Eisenhower, the Alchemist|Eisenhower]] was interested in. Such energy needed to keep them afloat! That power could be used for anything! Even...

name: The Ultra Gate
effect: Players may cast Common Ultra cards.
bio: The [[Paraselene (Playstyle)|Sages]] enclose the portal with grim determination. Whatever could emerge from this cannot be good.

name: The Ultimatum's Altar
effect: Cast only if your opponent controls a fighter. When this card is cast: Choose a target enemy fighter and shuffle it into their deck. | Whenever your opponent casts a card with that card's name: Destroy this card. | At the start of your turn: Your opponent loses 600 life.
bio: The Titans gave the Celestials a choice: Return the Alpha Brick, or watch the world below crumble into dust.

name: The Uncommonwealth
effect: Whenever you cast your first card each turn, if your starting deck contains only Common or Uncommon cards: Give yourself a copy of it, except it's inert when discarded, Zombified and Fleeting.
bio: "The Uncommonwealth seeks to preserve quality citizen life in the face of any and all strife by providing healthcare, rehousing, and financial aid. Regardless of location, time period or current history." -Mission Statement

name: TheChakraTree
effect: Inert in play. When this card is cast, if you have no Yellow studs: Gain 3 Yellow studs.
bio: He's not dead. Just un-living.

name: The World of Wood
effect: Whenever an allied fighter from the World of Wood dies: Draw a card.
bio: The centre of the World of Wood. In 2000 years, a [[Dwarvern Meteor|meteor]] will descend from the heavens, destroying wood as we know it. Maybe the temporal halo wasn't such a bad thing after all.

name: The Wanwood Dryad
effect: When this card is cast: Shuffle all World of Wood cards in your graveyard into your deck. | Whenever this card attacks: Summon a copy of your terrain, except it's a 300/300 fighter.
bio: Come, [[Eisenhower, the Alchemist|Eisenhower]]. The queen requests your presence.

name: The Visitor
effect: Gladiator. When this card is cast: Lock all allied fighters for 3 turns. They gain 100 Health and Power. | Whenever you discard your fifth card each turn: You gain 600 life. Unlock all allied fighters, then lock this card for 1 turn.
bio: As Time broke, so did the patience of  those who controlled it.

name: TheAmazeMan
effect: Whenever an effect targets this card: Deal 200 damage to it. It gains 200 power.
bio: Nobody really knows whats so amazing about TheAmazeMan, is it his username?

name: TheDeathEagle
effect: Hunt 4. | Once each turn, whenever you cast a card hunting: All allied fighters gain 100 Health and Power.
bio: If you read this bio YOURE AWESOME!!!!!

name: The Temple of Telamon
effect: When this card is cast: A target allied fighter and its adjacent fighters gain 200 Health and Power. Whenever you cast a fighter: Search your deck for a copy of it.
bio: No sole person should wield the power of gods, especially not arrogant manchildren. The miracle of eons past taught this.

name: TheCoderBunny
effect: If an effect would target this card: All fighters gain 200 Power instead, then this card transforms to lose all abilities.
bio: Bunnybros should stick together, right?

name: TheEnderCorp
effect: When this card is cast: Both players draw a card. Reveal your opponent's hand.
bio: ALRIGHT, LOOK. I'll let you draw an extra card if you let me look at your hand! Just once! I promise! That's a good deal, right?

name: TheGamer101
effect:
If you have 10 or more Common or Uncommon cards in your graveyard, cast this card as though it was a Terrain.
At the start of your turns: A target allied fighter gains 100 Health and Power.
bio: After so much time forgotten, seeing [[Mewsitive|this up and coming dev]] get the [[Bloxy Victory|trophy]] angered the legendary swordfighter. He hates having his crowds stolen from him.

name: TheGuestToBlame
effect: Once each turn, whenever you gain life: Draw a card.
bio: i used gorilla glue to stick a tin pot to my head

name: TheInnovative
effect: During your end step, if there are four colors among cards in your Graveyard: All allied fighters generate. Give yourself a Ban Hammer.
bio: Regardless of who opposes me, I will be the last man standing.

name: TheJazzCat22
effect: Whenever you cast an Epic fighter: This card gains 200 Health. | Whenever you cast a Legendary fighter: This card gains 200 Power.
bio: Ya' like jazz?

name: TheVoid_00f
effect: During your end step: Each card in your hand generates.
bio: "ok"

name: TheShipArchitect
effect: Whenever this card attacks: A target fighter gains 200 Power. Swap its stats. They gain 200 power.
bio: Time for a strategic TONK strike!

name: TheMediamogul99
effect: Whenever you cast a Doge: Summon a 150/150 Doge.
bio: Much Summon. Many Doge.

name: The_Skull_Collector
effect: Whenever an enemy fighter dies: Give yourself a Skull card.
bio: "Us demons are a friendly bunch. Don't hate us for a few bad noggins."

name: TheNStar
effect: Stealth. Whenever you cast a fighter: Obliterate it. Summon a clone of this card without its effect.
bio: Star #789 has gone supernova. Put Star #790 on the Dinner Table, please.

name: TheSongList
effect: When this card is cast: Unlock all allied Epic and Legendary fighters.
bio: A longtime ambassador to the game. Happy 1.6k!

name: The_Chairman_(Necrosyndicates)
effect: Gladiator. During the start of your turns: Give yourself a Lesser Treasure card.
bio: The struggles of Bloxburg were nothing but a thrilling drama to the denizens of the Underworld.

name: The_Gentlemaniac
effect: If an effect would heal this card: Give yourself a random '''Chair'''100px100px100px first.
bio: He'll be gentle... For a while.

name: The_Basket
effect: During your end step: This card and a random enemy fighter deal damage equal to their power to each other.
bio: Don't worry, i KNOW what i'm doing ',;3

name: TheSteelEagle
effect: Whenever you cast an Action or Terrain card, if you have cast 4 or fewer cards this turn: You lose 400 life. Search your deck for an Action or Terrain card.
bio: [[Kathara]]'s desertification systems turned against them, scorching invader and invaded alike.

name: Thec, the Robloxcity Ripper
effect:
Overload.
Whenever your opponent targets this card: They lose 3000 Life. | Whenever this card attacks: Obliterate the top 3 cards of your opponent's graveyard. This card gains their total stats.
bio: The scariest thing in the world is a person who's completely aware of the limits of their cruelty.

name: Thebenster
effect: This card can't attack. During your end step, if there's an allied Noob Token: Draw a fleeting, inert card.
bio: Where does he get all the cakes to feed this noob anyways?

name: Thesupernessiiiii
effect: Whenever your opponent casts an action: Destroy the oldest card in their hand.
bio: A wandering bard, playing his music so loud that nothing that hurt him.

name: Therapy Dog
effect: Whenever you cast a fighter, if there's exactly two colours in its stud cost: That fighter gains 200 Power.
bio: Even when the world is ablaze, you can always count on a man's best friend.

name: Theawesomist19
effect: Whenever you cast a fighter with total stats 1500 or more: A target fighter gains 50 power. Swap its stats.
bio: This is Theawesomist19. He has over 300 four-letter usernames. And no life.

name: Thomas
effect: When this card is cast: Attach 3 'Medicines' to this card. | At the start of your turns: Destroy a gear attached to this card. | Whenever this fighter destroys another: Give yourself Medicine, then transform this fighter if it has no gears attached to it.
bio: N/A

name: Thoughtgnaw
effect: Destroy the oldest card in your opponent's hand.
bio: The Alpha Wars led to famine. Famine led to despair. Despair fed the nightmares.

name: Thrilled Spectators
effect: During your end step, if you control 3 fighters with total stats 500 or less: All allied fighters gain 100 power.
bio: [[Crowd's Favour|GO]] [[Epic Duck|DUCK]] GO GO! GO DUCK GO GO!

name: Thunder Bolt
effect: Fading. Destroy all fighters and all non-Colourless cards in your Baseplate.
bio: The world is bored of war.

name: Thrillville
effect: Whenever you cast a Token: All allied fighters gain 100 power until their next end step.
bio: Thrillville is not responsible for any death or injuries on the premises. You have been warned.

name: Thumpo the Great
effect: When this card is cast: All fighters lose 200 Power.
bio: *Trombone Noises*

name: Tige1111, Fowl Play
effect: When this card is cast: Select a fighter card in your opponent's graveyard that costs 6 or fewer total studs. Summon that card, triggering effects as though it was cast.
bio:
''[[The Beast|Beast]] Syndrome: Dying at the end of turn due to 3W4R and 500 Health.''
''With joyous thanks to: tige1111''

name: Tiger370
effect: When this card is cast, if your baseplate rank is 4 or lower: Obliterate all fighters. You can't cast anything else this turn.
bio: YOU DON'T NEED ALL YOUR LIMBS TO WIN A DESTRUCION DERBY!!!

name: Tinfoilbot
effect: This card is immune to damaging effects. When this card is cast: It deals 200 damage to a target fighter. Then deal another 200,000 damage to it if it's Colourless.
bio: Only 90's kids will remember this ROBLOXian.

name: TimmyMcPwnage
effect:
Once each turn, whenever you discard a colourless card: Give yourself a Classic Roblox Tool card.
When this card dies: All Classic Roblox Tools in your graveyard gain Liberate.
bio: Imagine owning your friends on the Pillars of Pillage. Couldn't be me.

name: TigerCode
effect: When this card is cast: A target enemy fighter loses 400 Power. You gain 400 life
bio: The president of ROGO magazine. I didn't know ROBOTIC pogo sticks was such an interesting topic.

name: Timmy
effect: Whenever this card attacks: Draw a card, then destroy it if it's an action or fighter.
bio: TIMMEH!!!

name: Tiny Tank
effect: Whenever this card becomes locked: It gains 100 health and power.
bio: Check out Tiny Tanks by [[Sharksie]] if you like fun games like this one!

name: Titan of the Deep Below
effect: If there are 7 Titan cards in your Baseplate, cast this card using 6 Blue studs. When you do: All fighters that aren't allied Titans lose 500 Power. Put a Titanic Stud of each other colour into your Baseplate.
bio: Cthulhu's cousin's cousin's cousin. He's like, BASICALLY the reason he became popular.

name: Titan of the Fried One
effect: If there are 7 Titan cards in your Baseplate, cast this card using 6 Yellow studs. When you do: All allied Titans gain 500 Power. Put a Titanic Stud of each other colour into your Baseplate.
bio: Didn't you know? [[Telamon]] likes fried chicken almost as much as [[Shedletsky the Fried One|Shedletsky]]!!!

name: Titan of the Holy Chamber
effect: When this card is cast, if there's 2 or more allied Titans: This card gains defender. Give yourself 'The Forgotten One' and a titanic stud of each colour.
bio: As the world turns their eyes to the skies, this servant delves deeper into the earth, weakening the chains for It.

name: Titan of the Dying Forest
effect: If there are 7 Titan cards in your Baseplate, cast this card using 6 Green studs. When you do: All allied Titans gain 1000 health. Put a Titanic Stud of each other colour into your Baseplate.
bio: Are humans the real natural disaster?

name: Titan's Stone
effect: Stealth. Inert in play. Whenever you cast a Titan: Give yourself a Titanic Stud card.
bio: WOAH!!! IT'S A ROCK!

name: Titan-Infused Monstrosity
effect: Whenever you discard your first card each turn, if it's a Titan card: Recur this card.
bio: The prescence of the Titans tore Old Robloxia asunder.

name: Titanic Coalescence
effect: Give yourself six Titanic Stud cards.
bio: Telamon unleashed the Titans to find the Alpha Brick stolen from him. They influenced the world and its fauna, turning them into titan-infused horrors.

name: TigerCaptain
effect: Inert in play. When this card is cast: Search 'Living World' from your deck.
bio: He mastered [[Action And Terrain Cards|terrain]] years ago, only for his own [[Terrarians|earth]] to turn against him.

name: Titania, Pixie Monarch
effect: When this card is cast, if your opponent has 8 or more Pixie's Mischief in their baseplate: Transform all enemy fighters into Pixie's Mischief, then put all enemy fighters onto the top of the deck with their stats reset.
bio: While pixies have freedom to do as they wish within [[The World of Wood|the World of Wood]], Titania acts as their guide and leader in any situations where [[The Wanwood Dryad|the Wanwood Dryad]] calls upon them for aid.

name: Titan of the Infernal Abyss
effect: If there are 7 Titan cards in your Baseplate, cast this card using 6 Red studs. When you do: Deal 500 damage to all fighters that aren't allied Titans. Put a Titanic Stud of each other colour into your Baseplate.
bio: Guarding a pit of fire isn't as cool as it sounds.

name: Token Appraiser
effect: Whenever an allied token dies: Give yourself a token card, except it's Yellow. Convert all {R}{G}{B} in its cost to {Y}.
bio: N/A

name: Titanwarped Terror
effect: Whenever you cast a card: Give yourself a card of each colour in its cost, then obliterate the 2 oldest cards in your hand.
bio: ''Dukran hated the Valkyrie's experimentation with titanic stud magic.''

name: Titanic Studs
effect: Cast only if you control two Titans. A target fighter gains 200 Power. Put this card into your Baseplate.
bio: The corruption of the Titans infused Robloxia's inhabitants with meekness and obedience.

name: Tix Fanatic
effect: When this card is cast: Give yourself two Money Stacks. Whenever you cast a Tix Stack: Allied High Rollers gain 50 Power.
bio: "I just LOVE Tix! They just look so nice... I hope Tix lasts forever!"

name: Token Ultras
effect: Inert in all zones. Cast only there are 15 or more Ultras in your deck.Search your deck for Ultra Annihilator, then draw a card.
bio: Only primitive Ultras were seen among the edges of their territories, before a breakthrough in technology happened. Now a properly trained person can delve as deeply as they want.

name: Token Star Actions
effect: Encore. Deal 50 damage to all enemy fighters
bio: A friendly reminder to never criticize a Star's music face-to-face.

name: Tom's Beans
effect: A target fighter gains 500 Health. Return it to its owner's hand.
bio: "Hey Smiff, I found beans!" - "Find any ammo, Tom?" - "No ammo at all, what about you, Smiff?" - "Oh, just one mag."

name: Tomfl
effect: Overload. When this card is cast: A target fighter gains 200 power and overload.
bio: Time to end this.

name: Toothy Deer's Blessing
effect: Set a target fighter's stats to 500/500.
bio: If you look like a [[The Toothy Deer|toothy deer]], make sure to hide.

name: Tomarty
effect: Cast only if you control 2 Rare fighters. When you do: Summon a copy of this card from your Baseplate, then put a copy of this card into your Baseplate.
bio: "It's a mistake to say turtles hide in their shells. They merely need time to contemplate how best to bite your head off."

name: Totem of Pixel
effect: During your end step: All allied fighters gain 1/4th of their Health and Power.
bio: Built for [[PixelFlame]], it brings wisdom and antics.

name: Tootso
effect: N/A
bio: Tootso is a friendly toothy wizard! He loves to plant fruit trees wherever he goes! He is a pacifist by nature. He can also burst your lungs open by magically summoning pineapples inside you. Don't mess with Tootso.

name: Tone
effect: When this card is cast: All fighters with 300 or fewer power gain 200 power.
bio: Merely red.

name: Tomspick
effect: Once each turn, whenever you cast an action: This card deals 300 damage to a target fighter.
bio: He accepted [[The Federation (Group)|The Federation]] as a new group of friends wholeheartedly. They poisoned his cake in return.

name: Total War
effect: Once each turn, whenever you attack: Unlock the attacking fighter.
bio: Live in conflict for too long and you'll soon become lost in bloodshed.

name: Torturing Turncoat
effect:
0 Charges. Whenever a card leaves your graveyard: This card gains a charge. 
During your endstep, if this card has 8 or more charges: Remove 8 charges. Give yourself two Red and two Yellow cards.
bio: The only way to free yourself from the Smilies' cruel torture is an answer they want.

name: Tourist Trap
effect: When your opponent casts a fighter: Steal it. Then destroy this card.
bio: [[Javion]] has its ways of pulling people in, both figuratively and literally.

name: Tour Ship Pilot
effect: When this card is cast: All allied Token fighters gain 150 Health and Power.
bio: "Welcome to the Vecross System! Home of six grea- oh wait, I meant two great planets. Whoops."

name: Tour Ship Stowaway
effect: When this card dies: Summon an 100/100 Tourist.
bio:
You'd think the authorities would be more forgiving of stowaways due to the recent [[Ecocide|ecocide]].
Unfortunately, it's a [[Javion]]-owned Tour Ship.

name: Toxic
effect: When this card is cast, if it's the only allied fighter in play: Draw three cards.
bio: Britney Spears left her alone.

name: Toy Jet Fighter
effect: Once each turn, whenever you cast an action: Lock this card and a target allied fighter for 1 turn. Then, if this card has 5 or more locks, unlock it and all allied Toys gain 100 Health and Power.
bio: ZOOM ZAM ZOW, IT'S A REUSED BIO!

name: Toxic Goo
effect: Can't attack. During your end step: Give yourself a Morphic Goo.
bio: The byproduct left behind upon the creation of Morphic Goo. Highly poisonous. Tastes very sweet.

name: Toy Boss Dino
effect: Can't counter. Whenever you cast a Toy: Lock this card for 1 turn. Then, if this card has 8 or more locks, unlock it and steal a target fighter
bio: The mafia is the hiding place of the dinosaurs.

name: Toy Car
effect: Whenever you cast a Toy: Lock this card for 1 turn. Then, if this card has 5 or more locks, unlock it and a target fighter.
bio: VROOOM!

name: Transcendental Hug
effect:
Destroy all gears on all fighters and terrain. Summon a 100/100 Maladeity's Pustule.  | 
It gains 100 Health and Power for each gear destroyed this way.
bio: [[The Tainted|Two]] [[Warriors of Justice|souls]] soaked in trauma used the Doomspire to cope, but they learnt they could use each other to heal.

name: Toy Remote
effect: Lock a target allied fighter for 2 turns. It gains 100 power for each lock it has, but can't gain more than 500 Power this way.
bio: Can't wait? GO AHEAD! Unless you're taking turns with your annoying siblings.

name: Toy Teeth
effect: Whenever you cast a Toy: Lock this card for 1 turn. Then, if it has 5 or more locks, unlock it and gain 2C.
bio: WARNING: DO NOT ACTUALLY WEAR THESE AS TEETH

name: Toy Plane
effect: Haste. Whenever a fighter dies: Lock this card for 1 turn. Then if it has 5 or more locks, unlock it and draw a card.
bio: Nyeauwwww!

name: Toy Train
effect: Twice each turn, whenever you cast a toy fighter: Lock a target allied fighter for 2 turns. That fighter gains 100 Power.
bio: Chugga chugga. The train is late.

name: Traumaturge
effect: When this card is cast: Deal 50 damage to each enemy fighter for each Nightmare you control. Give each player two Night Frights.
bio: A nightmare of a choice.

name: Trapped Spirit
effect:
This card can only be cast if your opponent has 7 or more cards in their graveyard.  | 
When this card is cast: Obliterate 7 cards in your opponent's graveyard.  | 
When your opponent discards a card, if this card and 20 others are in your graveyard, put this card into your opponent's hand.
bio: Trapped away in the Onmyoji's grip, it did not realize it could simply fly away.

name: Traumadumping
effect: Destroy a target fighter, replacing it with 4 unlocked 200/200 copies of that fighter. One of them is traumatised, spiralling all allied fighters into gilmuraigs when targeted. | You can't cast anything else this turn.
bio: Tormented by fiction, the Auteur exacted revenge on what he perceived as Winona's tormentors.

name: Toy Truck
effect: Whenever you cast a Toy: Lock this card for 1 turn. Then, if it has 5 or more locks, unlock it and recur an allied Toy card.
bio: Vroom Vroom!

name: Traumatic Overload
effect: At the start of your turns: Summon a fighter card from your opponent's graveyard that's died this game, then your opponent does the same with your graveyard. Unlock those fighters and attach Fragile and Terrified to them. (Fragile fighters are obliterated upon taking damage from any source.)
bio:
"[[Warriors of Justice|She]] is a child, so weak of mind that any sadness sends her manic. It questions why the [[Nyarlhotep (Lore)|Grand Overseer]] hasn't found a new editor."
-Technician's Notes, Experience 12690288701

name: Transdimensional Preythings
effect:
When this card is cast: Start its journey. This card moves from one zone in its journey to the next whenever an effect destroy an allied card in the next zone.
When this card journeys into your hand: Draw 5 cards and remove the cost of all cards in your hand.
bio: <font color="yellow">"Are we being cruel to ourselves by allowing this endless chase to where if we stop for even a moment, we die?" <font color=#C4A484>“lol idk”

name: Traverse the Four Hells
effect: Cast only if there are six Stagnation cards in your graveyard. | Replace your deck with four copies of your starting deck. | Each copy is in one of the Four Hells, and is empowered by that Hell. | Obliterate this card and all copies of it, then end the turn.
bio: The paths between the four hells were torn open, fusing to one hell and one mortal deer.

name: Traverse the Wastes
effect: Cast this card using three Red studs if effects have made you lose life since your last end step. | Draw two cards.
bio:
At the [[Alpha Brick's Destruction|Destruction]]'s agreement, 
'''each of the Four'''
[[File:Zanzel Repentant.png|100px]][[File:Eclipse, The Rage Gyre.png|100px]][[File:Eisenhower Reunited.png|100px]][[File:Hallow, Extortionist of Fun.png|100px]]
sought out one of the temporal aberrations, allying it with them if possible and destroying them otherwise. [[Eclipse, the Rage Gyre|Eclipse]] found nothing but ashes, scrap, and scale. [[Chromafex.mp4, The Meteor|Who]] did this...?

name: Tremity
effect: When this card is cast: Destroy each fighter with 50, 250 or 450 Health.
bio: Cheat the system enough, and the system will soon have enough of you.

name: Treasured Unicorn (Legacy)
effect: When this card survives being attacked, generate two green icons.
bio: Zanzel used this specific breed to supply her forces with supplies.

name: Trey56820 the Ripper
effect: When this card is cast: Summon a Red fighter with total stud cost 2 or less. It has defender and is inert in all zones.
bio:
Standing here, I realize you were just like me trying to make history...
This card was designed by [[Studderies]]

name: Twin Dragons of Salvation
effect: Continued. | Gladiator. | Whenever you cast another gear or gladiator: Summon a 100/300 copy of it with continued. This triggers once each turn per card type.
bio: The mentee lived his life full of merit; [[Thyyrinyr, Sealed Dragon|The mentor]] lived their many lives to nurture merit.

name: TrollTideTroll
effect: When this card is cast: All allied Doges gain 300 health.
bio: The woofmeister.

name: Tricky Magician (Legacy)
effect: At the end of your turns: Give yourself a 200/200 Kitten.
bio: I shall pull great things using my magic hat.

name: Twinedhealer89
effect: Haste. | Dextrous. | Effects can't target or transform this card. | Whenever this card attacks: Obliterate a target allied fighter. If you do, summon an unlocked fighter with the same colour as it. Trigger its effects as though it was cast.
bio: We love topdecking some late game on turn 8

name: Twisted Onyx
effect: A target allied fighter gains 100 Health and Power. | Transform it into into a Immortal Wielder with the effect: | Defender.
bio: If you start thinking that cages are built so that the person inside it stays free, that's called being irrational.

name: Troop in the Game
effect: Once each turn, whenever an effect gives you a card: Summon a 350/350 Wasteland Mercenary that's inert in all zones.
bio: "The troops walk the streets sure, but we all know they each have their hidden allegiances."

name: Twisted Magic
effect: Put a Pixie's Mischief in your opponent's baseplate. If your opponent have 6 Pixie's Mischief in their baseplate: Transform all enemy fighters into snails and put 4 Pixie's Mischief on top of their deck. If not, put 2 additional Pixie's Mischief into their baseplate.
bio: The limits of the magic used by the pixies is still not fully understood, while transformation magic and conjuring of images is known as general examples of their powers, they continue to use their magic in new ways that leave even those who have studied them amazed and confused.

name: Two by Two, Spirit of Shards
effect: When this card is cast, or during your end step: Give yourself a fleeting Nascent Stud.
bio: Pieces of itself scattered across an endless distance of time and space. It refused to die broken.
display_name: Two by Two, Spirit of Shards

name: Typheus the Whelp
effect: When this card is cast: Unlock all allied fighters.
bio: When one is struck by Typheus, the world is split. Then [[Nevermore|nevermore]].

name: Twisted Turret
effect: When this card is cast: Deal 150 damage to all fighters, then summon 2 150/150 Debased Catgirls.
bio: "Don't let 'em shoot their bones at ya! Their bones pierce yer body, you become [[Debased Catgirl|'em]]!" - [[Captain Skewerglee (Necrosyndicates)|Captain Skewerglee]]

name: TwoShue
effect: When this card is cast: Destroy the oldest card in your opponent's hand. They summon a 500/500 Puppy Guarder.
bio: What a puppy guard.

name: TypicalType
effect: When this card dies: It deals 500 damage to all fighters. | After this card attacks: Destroy it.
bio: This ain't no game, boy. It's a minigame!

name: Tyrannical Limb
effect: Cast only if you control an aspect of Shedletsky. Turn your Shedletsky into its red form, The Raging Pulse. It gains 500 power. Effects can't destroy Shedletsky while in this form.
bio: A fiery chicken limb. Holding it fills your mind with thoughts of conquest.

name: UHunterU
effect: Whenever this card attacks: All players lose 200 Life. | Whenever you lose life: This card gains 100 Power.
bio: UHunt, ULive.

name: UAE
effect: This card is immune to damage card effects. | Cast only if you have eight Red cards in your Baseplate. | During your end step, if you have four cards in your hand: Destroy all cards in each player's hands and deal 1200 damage to all fighters.
bio: Watch for his poisonous gas.

name: Uberubert
effect: Whenever this card attacks and destroys another: Both players draw three cards. You can't cast anything else this turn.
bio: Inventor of the Tycoon Genre on [[ROBLOX]].

name: Ultimate Build
effect: When this card is cast: Draw 2 cards. During your end step: All enemy fighters lose 100 power until their next end step.
bio: Test the limits of your imagination.

name: Ultimatesilver661
effect: During your end step, if you've gained 600 life since your last end step: Draw a card.
bio: "It must've been something I ate!"

name: Uglypoe
effect: When this card is cast: Give yourself two rare cards.
bio: Becoming the monster is more fun than taming it.

name: Ultra Bestower
effect: Inert in all zones. Cast only if you control The Ultra Gate. Whenever you cast an Ultra fighter, shuffle two random Ultras into your deck.
bio: The four fundamental icons dictate what can be and what cannot be, yet the most alien of forces transcend colour altogether.

name: Ultra Annihilator
effect: Inert in all zones. |  This card has immunity to other card effects. | Overload. | Cast this card for Free if you control 7 Ultra Fighters. | This card is immune to all damage except from its own effect. | Whenever an allied fighter dies, summon an Ultra Otherer. This fighter loses 200 health.
bio: "[[The Federation (Group)|The Federation]] with [[Kathara]]. [[Nibblex the Starkiller|Nibblex]] with [[Havalu]]. The Ragegyre with [[Javion]]. Now this. No, not again. Never again." -[[Priestess Zanzel, the Promised One]]

name: Uias
effect: When this card dies: Draw a card. Destroy that card if it's not cast by the next end step.
bio: He gets the job done by building machinary that defends his allies as well as himself.

name: Ultoris Tenebrae
effect: When this card is cast: Give yourself Ultoris NOOBrae, a 350/100 fighter.
bio: His army of fanboys will destroy you.

name: Ultimate_Doregriffon
effect: Cast only if your starting deck had 2 or fewer Gladiators and no Duplicates. Whenever a fighter targets this card: Give yourself two Colourless fighters. You gain 200 life.
bio: Doregriffons don't understand humans. If they didn't want to be eaten, why are they made out of meat and treasure?

name: Ultraw
effect: During your end step, if you have less than 3500 life: You gain 1000 Life. Draw a card.
bio: [[Lifegain (Playstyle)|Life Gain]] Tycoon... I like the sound of that!

name: Ultra Obliterator
effect: Cast only if there are 70 or more cards in your deck. Give yourself a copy of this card, then draw two cards. You can't cast actions this turn.
bio: Ultras share a hivemind that allow others to be summoned. When this hivemind reaches a critical mass, regions get torn asunder by the sheer pressure.

name: Ultra Otherer
effect: Inert in all zones. | Cast only if you control The Ultra Gate. When you do, shuffle 5 Ultras into your deck.
bio: Environments rife with colourless studs can be survived only by Ultras, and vice versa. The coloured studs of a person quickly lose their biases to fill the void, causing their very being to dissolve.

name: Unad@ptably
effect: During your end step: Give yourself a crystal card.
bio: Master Idol.

name: Umwelt Shift
effect:
Choose one:
- A target allied fighter and its Soulmate each gain 200 Health and Power, then swap their stats.

- Return a target allied fighter to the hand. Deal 200 damage to all fighters.

- If you have 8 cards in your Baseplate, choose a target allied Vagabond. Summon its Soulmate.
bio: The deep bond between Vassal and Rageborne makes them share feelings, share memories, share their very understanding of the world.

name: Unburden
effect: Cast this card ignoring its colourless cost if you're in Bliss. Draw three cards. You can't cast actions this turn.
bio: "Why... Why can't I get better? Why can't I feel just fine again? Why can't I just make it go away...?"

name: Unc, At The End
effect: When this card is cast: Deal 1230 overloaded damage to a target fighter. Obliterate a random card in your hand and all copies of it in all zones.
bio: "If even one universe manages to surpass the end of all things and transcend the gods, I will have done my job."

name: Unc, A Scholar
effect: Whenever an effect draws you a card: Destroy the newest card in your hand, then search your deck for the most expensive card in there.
bio:
I used to wonder about possibilities.

With pensive thanks to: UncreativeName123

name: Unc, Scribe of Epochs
effect: When this card is cast, if your starting deck contained only Common and Uncommon cards: Target a fighter. Search your deck for a copy of it.
bio: "The winners are history's writers, its underdogs are the editors, and I shall be the publisher."

name: Unc, Uncorrupted
effect: Whenever this card attacks: Draw two cards, then destroy the oldest card in your hand.
bio: Despite common belief, axes are quite effective against [[Nightmare (Group)|nightmares]].

name: Unc, The Consultant
effect: Whenever you cast a fighter: If a copy of it exists in both your Baseplate and Graveyard, summon a clone of that fighter.
bio: "If you or other yous have been affected by time loops, any of them may be entitled to historical compensation."

name: Uncle Doge
effect: When this card is cast: Summon two 150/150 Doges.
bio: very battle. much join.

name: Uncreation
effect: This card is immune to transformation, and swapping card effects. Whenever a Nightmare Action is cast, if your opponent has 5 cards in hand: This card gains 250 health and power.
bio: Soon.

name: UncreativeName123
effect: Whenever an action is cast, if your opponent has 5 cards in hand: Shuffle a random Rare Nightmare into your deck. Each player draws a card.
bio: Is perfection truly so grotesque; can't all be one?

name: Uncomfortably
effect: Whenever this card attacks: Give yourself an uncommon Yellow card and an uncommon Green card.
bio: This is the kind of name that makes me flinch.

name: Unity (Legacy)
effect: This turn, ignore the archetype restrictions on coloured cards.
bio: We are all of different skins. Different creeds. Different ideas. Yet, we all agree on one thing - A bunch of [[Anthrest (Group)|"humans"]] mucking up a [[Anthrested Tree|tree]] looks really disgusting, alright?

name: Unity of Rage
effect: Obliterate a target allied fighter. X is the total stats of that fighter. A second target fighter gains half of X health and Power.
bio: ''Come together as one, Ye Rageborne, and spread the keys to the Apotheosis of Man.''

name: Undead Teddy
effect: Haste. 3 Charges. When this card dies: Summon a copy of it with 1 fewer charge. You lose 100 life.
bio: Some say it was a mistake... // Some say it was an experiment gone wrong... // But despite what they say... // They will never know the true horror that went into making this...

name: Underground Base
effect: At the start of your turns: The fighter with the highest Health loses 200 Power.
bio: Wait, where are the killers?

name: United Front
effect: Liberate. | Destroy the bottom two cards of your deck, then look at your graveyard and choose up to two non-token unranked fighters that cost 4 or fewer total studs. Summon those cards except they're Fading.
bio: A reminder of what they want to prevent.

name: Unmiracle
effect: When this card is cast: Lock all enemy fighters that cost X or fewer total studs for 1 turn. X is the number of allied Nightmares. Give each player a Nightmare
bio: Even prayers can't escape it.

name: Unlimxted
effect: This card is immune to targeting card effects. | If an effect would target this card: Return it to your hand instead.
bio: I have many limiteds...

name: Unleash the Titans!
effect:
All players draw 11 cards.  | 
You can't cast anything else this turn.
bio: If his creations coveted the [[Alpha Brick (Lore)|Alpha Brick]] so badly, Telamon would gladly give them [[Titan (Group)|ALL of it]].

name: Unlicensed Pedromony
effect: Stealth. Whenever you cast a fighter: It joins Pedromony's group. This ability triggers only once. | Whenever a fighter you control in Pedromony's group dies: All fighters you control in Pedromony's group gains 400 health and power.
bio:
It's crazy how people will pay me to be inhumane.
This card was designed by [[Myrmiredon]].

name: Unspeakable Summoning
effect: Deal 6666 damage to a target fighter. Your opponent summons two apparitions of Lezus.
bio: [[Priestess Zanzel, the Promised One|Zanzel]] scoffed when she saw Lezus. These demons are why the world is impure.

name: Unwanted Trend
effect: Ban yourself.
bio: I'm sure no one will find a way to abuse this.

name: Unprocessed Clay
effect: When this card is cast: You lose 1000 life. Search your deck for an action card, a gear card, and a terrain card.
bio:
"No wonder [[Claymaker, Master Architect|he]] thinks us all broken; A chef that cooks using rancid ingredients will never make a dish they like."
-[[Akasegawa the Iconoclast]]

name: Unworld
effect: When this card is cast, or at the start of each player's turn: Until the next endstep, all effects that would make a card gain or lose power do the opposite effect.
bio: <span style="color:#ff1919">Each and every moment, there always is a timeline for worst scenario.

name: Valerian Ranger
effect:
Continued.  |  
When this card is cast: A target fighter gains 200 health.  | 
When this fighter dies, if there's a gear on it: Search your deck for a copy of this fighter.
bio: Each of the 12 plant phyla jockey to infest and recruit new inhabitants, vying for power in the Consulate Plantae.

name: V_yriss
effect: When this card is cast, if your opponent has the same amount of fighters as you: A target fighter loses 300 Power.
bio: Survive THIS!

name: Usering
effect: Haste. When this card is cast: Give yourself a Robux Bundle. It can be used eight times.
bio: Even Pokemon can make good games.

name: VVendigo
effect: Overload. Whenever this card attacks and destroys another: You gain 1C for each 200 excess damage dealt this way.
bio: "Mess with that weird deer that flexes all the time" they said, "It'll be funny" they said.

name: Vacelica
effect: This card is immune to damage card effects. | When this card is cast: Deal 4000 damage to all fighters with the highest power, then all with the lowest health. Put Sterling into your opponent's graveyard if it isn't in one of their zones. | During your end step, if this card is in your graveyard and Sterling is in your opponent's graveyard: Recur them both.
bio: “To the tempo of endless loops, let us dance in ignorant bliss. I can only hope all will be well…”

name: Valkyrie in Control
effect: You gain 500 life. | Give yourself Red Titanic Stud and Green Titanic Stud.
bio: We have so much to gain from these [[Titan (Group)|Titans]]. We shall share their power amongst us Robloxians, so that we might surpass them one day.

name: Valkyrie in Family
effect: You gain 500 life. |  Give yourself Green Titanic Stud and Yellow Titanic Stud.
bio: "Gosh, can't we all just, like, stop the fighting?"

name: Valkyrie in Action
effect: You gain 500 life. | Give yourself Blue Titanic Stud and Yellow Titanic Stud.
bio: Even the smallest insect can make a god bleed. I will never yield!

name: Valkyrie in Mourning
effect: You gain 500 life. | Give yourself Red Titanic Stud and Yellow Titanic Stud.
bio: As Valkyries, it's our duty to pass on the power of the [[Titan (Group)|Titans]]. It's not easy.

name: Valkyrie in Despair
effect: You gain 500 life. | Give yourself Red Titanic Stud and Blue Titanic Stud.
bio: The overwhelming power of the gods broke her spirit. Still, she will pass on what little power she has, no matter how futile it is.

name: Vantas Acantar
effect: When this card is cast: If there’s 4 different colours among cards in your graveyard, give yourself a Nascent Stud and put a copy of this card into your baseplate. Repeat this effect if there's 4 different colours among cards in your baseplate.
bio: A peasant cannot hope to surpass a king.

name: Valletta
effect: When this card is cast: You lose 500 life. Draw two cards. Destroy those cards if they're not cast by your next end step.
bio: With security and an organized team of criminals, Valletta can easily take any threat down and tie loose ends.

name: Vaporwave Plaza
effect: During your endstep, if you have 4 or more colored actions on your baseplate: Give yourself a copy of a random colored action from your baseplate, but it's Inert in all zones.
bio: The eerie emptiness of a place filled with bright lights and neon signs, does it evoke comfort or open to a deeper fear?

name: Vanjohnson
effect: Whenever this card attacks: You gain 300 life. Your opponent loses 300 life.
bio: Those of you who volunteered to be injected with praying mantis DNA, I've got some good news and bad news. Bad news is that we're postponing those tests indefinitely. Good news is that we've got a new test for you: Fighting an army of mantis men.

name: Valkyrie in Mystique
effect: You gain 500 life. | Give yourself Green Titanic Stud and Blue Titanic Stud.
bio: When the [[Titan (Group)|Titan's]] curiosity grew, so did the curiosity of those influenced by them.

name: UristMcSparks
effect: This card is immune to damage, powerloss, returning, destruction, effect copying, and setting card effects. During your end step: Double the Power of all allied fighters. You lose 1500 Life.
bio: UristMcSparks is a human being, contrary to popular belief. Treat him as such.

name: Velleda Lappet
effect: Dextrous. This card can't be counterattacked. Whenever this card attacks: Draw a card and reveal the newest card in your hand. This card gains 50 Power for each stud in its cost.
bio: "One day, I'm gonna be a hero!"

name: Vengeful Vigilante
effect: Whenever you Draft: Unlock this card and it gains 100 Power. This ability also triggers in the graveyard.
bio: Justice is the best served by those who are served the worst injustice.

name: Varis & Thromton
effect: Whenever you discard a card, if this card's in your hand: Add a non-colourless stud to its cost. | When this card is cast: For each non-green colour in its cost, put that colour's stud into your baseplate and this card gains 150 Health and Power.
bio: Two top-class exorcists forced together to exterminate demons all over the world. They've never failed to exorcise a demon before, but what if their greatest foe was right by their side?

name: Venom's Bite
effect: A target allied fighter gains 100 Health and Power. | Transform it into into a Immortal Wielder with the effect: | Whenever this fighter attacks: All enemy fighters lose 50 Health and Power.
bio: The poison isn't life threatening, but it makes your stomach sick - arguably a bit worse.

name: Verdant Limb
effect: Cast only if you control an aspect of Shedletsky. Turn your Shedletsky into its green form, Locus of Icons. He gains 500 health. Effects can't swap Shedletsky's stats while in this form.
bio: A succulent chicken limb. Unimaginable growth awaits those who know how to use it.

name: Vermyn Illyon
effect: This card costs 1R less for each fighter in your baseplate.  | Whenever a fighter dies: Put it into your baseplate, except its inert. Then if there's 30 or more fighters in your baseplate, ban your opponent.
bio: Stealing the Alpha Brick from Telamon, causing mass amounts of destruction and economic collapse. And yet, you think you're in control? How cute.

name: Veteran Arkhivist
effect:
When this card is cast: Recur the top and bottom cards of your graveyard. Both gain Fading.
When this card is recurred: It gains 500 Health.
bio: "I didnae get to see you one last time, [[Caitlin, Paladin of Nature|big yin]]. But I'm happy you did what you could; It was those wee trinkets or the forest. " - Al-Assad Returned

name: Very Peaceful and Reasonable Person
effect: Whenever your opponent casts their third card each turn: Set this card's stats to 1500/1500. Then this card transforms to lose all abilities.
bio: Don't enrage him. Example: Playing cards

name: Verisimilitudal Dissonance (Legacy)
effect: Whenever this card strikes the opponent; generate two colourless icons.
bio: A reality that wants to disappear.

name: Veterans of Strife
effect: Whenever this card's stats would be swapped: If it's Red, it becomes Green and give yourself a Green card. Otherwise, it becomes Red and give yourself a Red card.
bio: They fought for the Alpha Brick. Their only reward was wounds.

name: VertexArray
effect: When this card is cast: Summon a clone of the last dead enemy fighter.
bio: In a blink of an eye, a Zombie Rush.

name: VetexGames
effect: When this card dies: Draw three cards.
bio: Creator of Arcane Adventures. Hates the blood element.

name: Viktor Shklovsky
effect: Whenever you cast your first action or gear each turn, if it's not fleeting: Attach a copy of it to this card, then give yourself a fleeting copy of each attached card.
bio: "Art is the experience of the artfulness of an object; The object is not important."

name: Vice President Yoyle
effect: Inert in play. This card takes 100 less damage from effects.  When this card is cast: Put a Cabinet Meeting on top of your deck
bio: As Vice President, ASliceOfYoyleCake’s main role is to cast a tiebreaker vote in Congress. However, since they can never agree when to cast votes necessary of a tiebreaker, he’s usually just standing there

name: Vicious Bee
effect: Haste. Whenever an enemy fighter dies for the first time each turn: Search your deck for a Bee card.
bio: [[Bee]]s flap their wings 230 times a second, creating a large displacement field that they sit on. This is how bees fly. -[[Ancalagon Sword Critic|Sword Critic]]

name: Vinrole
effect: Whenever your opponent casts a fighter, if they've already cast a fighter this turn: They lose 500 Life.
bio: Guy Fieri? He's popular because of me.

name: Victim of the Xenoqualia
effect: When this card is cast: Put a Cosmic Crack into your baseplate.
bio: [[Queen Shedare II|Shedare's]] attempts to innoculate her people against the realisation of their fictional nature fell on deaf ears.

name: Veteran Mercenary
effect: Whenever an enemy fighter dies: This card gains 100 Health.
bio: There is no room for trickery on the field of battle.

name: Victor Sinister
effect: During your opponent's end step or when this card dies: All players gain a Colourless stud for each enemy fighter cast this turn.
bio: “What makes a human being decent? Fear.”

name: Vie, Battle Witch
effect: Once each turn, whenever an allied fighter's stats would be swapped: Give yourself Witches' Brew first.
bio: An outcast from the council of warlocks, Vie conspires to bring them all to a dizzying end.

name: Violent Creation
effect: Destroy a target allied fighter. Select an unranked fighter card in your deck that costs fewer total studs than that fighter and summon it, triggering effects as though it was cast.
bio: The [[Rageborne (Group)|Rageborne]] fed on every ounce of desire, but they were no wasteful. Every body, a home to keep.

name: Violent Larcenist
effect: Whenever a card with Liberate leaves your graveyard: Your opponent loses a Colourless stud and you gain a Colourless stud. This ability triggers only once per turn.
bio: For some Lordbreakers, the hatred of immortality trumps the love of their city.

name: VioletVelvet
